Name: Caplugs
Description:
Founded in 1948 in Buffalo, N.Y., Caplugs is the leader in custom molded components, masking solutions and product protection. With 13 manufacturing facilities and a large team of in-field sales managers across the globe, we provide the personalized service, range of capabilities, wide variety of catalog parts, manufacturing expertise and scalable infrastructure to be your trusted partner. 
Caplugs has more engineers on staff, processes for creative solutions and molding experts for reliable quality. Plus, facilities and resources to get the job done quickly and economically.

As a versatile custom molder, we take our customers' projects from concept to full production and logistics support. We lead the industry in experience and expertise.

Caplugs By the Numbers

• Over 500,000,000 parts in stock.
• 32,000,000+ parts produced per day.
• Over 50,000+ standard parts.
• Over 375 molding machines.
• Over 15 design engineers.
• 13 global manufacturing facilities.
• The 1 partner you need.

Name: ARRK Europe Limited
Description:
ARRK is one of the world's leading product development specialists in the market today. With a long and established history that dates back over 70 years, ARRK has amassed a wealth of knowledge and technical know-how to assist engineers and designers with their development and manufacturing needs. 
ARRK offers an extensive 3D Printing, Prototyping, Vacuum Casting, CNC Machining, Mock-ups, Rapid Tooling, Moulding, Composites and Low Volume Manufacturing service to clients from a wide range of industries.  ARRK prides itself on delivering high standards of customer care, service and added value, to help clients with their development and manufacturing needs. 

Our Core Capabilities:
3D Printing & Prototyping - Stereolithography (SLA), Selective Laser Sintering (SLS), Metal Printing (DMLS), Polyjet, Vac Casting, Paint and Finishing, Block Modelling/Mock-ups, CNC Machining, Metal/Sheet Pressings, Rapid Tooling & Moulding, Composites and Low volume manufacturing solutions.

Additional services available through ARRK Europe Limited
Composites – Low volume composite manufacturing service. CNC Machining and Premium Paint Service also available.

Name: Grupa Azoty Polyolefins S.A.
Description:
Grupa Azoty Polyolefins jest częścią Grupy Azoty - jednego z największych koncernów chemicznych w Polsce oraz Europie. Tworzymy segment Poliolefin - jednostkę biznesową wyspecjalizowaną w produkcji polipropylenu. Nasze zintegrowane instalacje do produkcji poliolefin stanowią nowoczesny oraz niezależny zakład zlokalizowany w centrum Europy.

Zintegrowany kompleks chemiczny w Policach obejmuje:
- morski terminal gazowy
- instalację do produkcji propylenu w technologii Oleflex, o wydajności 429 tys. ton propylenu rocznie 
- instalację do produkcji polipropylenu w technologii  Grace UNIPOL o wydajności 437 tys. ton polipropylenu rocznie w trzech typach: homopolimery, kopolimery udarowe i kopolimery randomiczne.
-  infrastrukturę logistyczną - sercem naszej Platformy Logistycznej jest 60 silosów magazynowych o poj. 450 ton granulatu każdy. Plac składowy zapewnia magazynowanie do 22,4 tys. ton polipropylenu,

Produkowany w Policach polipropylen Gryfilen to wysokiej jakości tworzywo, które znajdzie zastosowanie w wielu branżach  i różnorodnych aplikacjach przetwórczych.


Grupa Azoty Polyolefins is part of Grupa Azoty - one of the largest chemical concerns in Poland and Europe. We create the Polyolefin segment - a business unit specialized in the production of Polypropylene.

Our integrated chemical complex in Police includes:
- an offshore gas terminal.
- propylene plant (PDH) in Oleflex technology  with a capacity of 429kt per year.
- polypropylene plant in Grace's UNIPOLtechnology with a capacity of 437kt of polypropylene in total in three types: homopolymers, impact copolymers and random copolymers.
- logistics infrastructure that provides a storage, logistics and shipping area for polypropylene. The Logistics Platform has 60 storage silos with a capacity of 450 tons each.. A yard provides storage capacity for 22,4 kt of PP. 

Polypropylene Gryfilen produced in Police is a high-quality thermoplastic material designed for wide range applications.

Name: Italian Gasket
Description:
OUR VISION :
Guarantee the overall quality, in respect of the environment and our ethical values, focusing on training, research & development and technology, to become “THE” trusted partner for our customers.
OUR COMPANY :
Italian Gasket was founded in 1984. It produces technical rubber items not only o-ring (nearly more than 500 million of pieces) such as grommets, filters, muffs, caps, fairleads, pipettes, little stoppers, frames, bellows, o-rings, frames, car safety parts, car interior parts, silicone connectors, electronic devices, suction cups, membranes, high tech sealings which are produced with any kind of elastomer.

In 40 years Italian Gasket has opened extra BU in Italy for TOOLS and PLASTIC and in HUNGARY for the rubber product manufacturing in order to give a better and more complete service to the customer.  

Italian Gasket supplies markets whit high standard needs:  besides the main automotive sector it supplies also the pneumatic, home appliance, lighting, electronics, heating, oil & gas, and medical. 

The technical service is guaranteed by a skilled and professional team and optimized by the use of Cad/Cam systems. The inner proces on development and construction guarantee speed and flexibility.

Name: PROTEFILM
Description: Con más de 30.000 metros cuadrados de planta de producción, contamos con personal industrial altamente capacitado y tecnología de punta que permite asegurar la calidad de nuestra producción, con una mejora constante a través de la innovación de procesos e instalaciones. Además, estamos en continuo desarrollo de productos orientados a nuevas aplicaciones, mejoras en la performance de los actuales o la obtención de reducciones de costos que a su vez le permiten a nuestros clientes ser más competitivos
Location: Ingeniero Juan Allan, Buenos Aires Province

Name: Vernay
Description:
Vernay is a trusted solutions provider for customers facing challenging flow control issues. The company's engineers and chemists are widely recognized for their problem-solving abilities and for creating custom flow control solutions that align with the unique product visions of their customers. Additionally, Vernay is committed to maintaining a state-of-the-art materials R&D laboratory for developing exclusive formulas for their customers.

As a global company, Vernay serves customers across all regions of the world. With manufacturing, engineering, and testing capabilities in the U.S., Italy, Netherlands, Singapore, and China, they are well-equipped to support customers internationally. Furthermore, Vernay has local sales engineers in each region to provide assistance in the customers' languages and to address diverse customs, as well as to manage Vernay's resources to meet the complex supply chain needs of all customers.

Name: The ALP Group
Description:
ALP Group is a global leader in EPDM solutions, specializing in innovative polymer-based products for a wide range of industries. With over 35 years of experience, ALP delivers cutting-edge technology and sustainable solutions for the automotive, construction, HVAC, and industrial sectors.

Our diverse portfolio includes more than 4,000 products, providing weather sealing, thermal, and acoustic insulation systems that ensure efficiency and energy savings. As a trusted partner to OEMs and aftermarket clients, ALP Group is committed to driving growth through research, development, and a focus on quality.

With 13 companies across the globe and a commitment to sustainability, we continue to lead with innovation, setting new standards for the future of automotive solutions, insulation technology, and green building materials.

Name: ROTOTEC S.p.A
Description:
Rototec S.p.A. is a dynamic company in continuous expansion present throughout Italy and abroad (France, Spain, Hungary…). The company was founded in 2000 as part of the System Group, leader since 1980 in the production of complete pipeline systems (pipes, fittings, specials,…).

Right from its founding, Rototec S.p.A was soon specialising in the production of corrugated and smooth tanks in linear polyethylene manufactured using rotational moulding technology.

The factory, located in Lunano in the province of Pesaro/Urbino covers an area of 18000 m2 and includes a production department of 5000 m2, an outdoor area for storage/handling of 13000 m2 and an office area of 400 m2 housing the finance, sales, transport/logistics and technical departments.

Name: Oldrati Group
Description:
Oldrati has been operating for over 60 years as an industrial excellence in the design and production of technical articles made from rubber, plastic, and silicone, standing out for its vision, approach, and performance.
With 1,400 employees and an aggregate turnover exceeding 180 million euros, the Group meets the needs of various industrial sectors, including Automotive, Oil & Gas, and Heating, as well as consumer sectors such as Sports, Healthcare, and Household.
The Group integrates all production phases internally, from design to compounding and the creation of the finished product, distinguishing itself with a unique production model.
Ranging from product co-design to multi-component assembly, Oldrati brings its guiding principle, All in One, to life, translating it into reliability and quality across every process and production stage.

With production sites in Turkey and Slovakia, as well as in Italy, where the Headquarters are located, Oldrati strategically targets an international market comprised of the leading global players in the sector.

Technological innovation and sustainability, which form the foundation of the Group’s continuous development, are reflected in projects focused on digitalization, automation, material regeneration (Ogreen), and energy efficiency, alongside concrete actions to reduce emissions.

Market focus, material research, and product development are the keys to the future, enabling Oldrati to anticipate market trends with innovative materials and solutions tailored to meet customer needs.

Name: Intertrade
Description:
Intertrade Co., established in 1984 by Mohamed El-Soufy Ramadan, is a proud family-owned business now led by Khaled El Soufy, our esteemed CEO and Chairman. As the largest producer of PVC gaskets in Egypt, we have built a robust reputation for quality and customer service.

Our facility, located in 10th of Ramadan City, Cairo, spans 12,000 square meters. Here, we produce up to 10,000 gaskets daily, with the capacity to scale up to 20,000. From raw materials to finished products, every stage of our manufacturing process is subject to stringent quality control measures, ensuring that we meet and exceed both customer specifications and our own high standards.

Intertrade Co. specializes in a wide range of products, including PVC compounds, PVC products, PVC gaskets, and magnetic strips. Our commitment to innovation and excellence drives us to continually develop high-quality products at competitive prices, solidifying our position as Egypt's leading producer of premium PVC products.

Our reach extends beyond Egypt, with a thriving export market across the Middle East. We are dedicated to expanding our global footprint, leveraging our expertise and dedication to quality to serve diverse markets around the world.

Our mission is to produce and continually enhance high-quality products while maintaining competitive pricing. We strive to be recognized as an industry leader by our customers and employees, driven by high performance, innovation, and a commitment to exceeding customer expectations.

Name: CW Seals
Description: CW Seals

Name: Spartan Composites, Inc
Description:
At Spartan Composites, we take pride in producing high-quality mats made in the USA, engineered to withstand the toughest conditions in the field. Whether you're working in environmentally sensitive areas, navigating rough or unstable terrain, or ensuring traction and stability for heavy equipment, our versatile and cost-effective solutions are designed to help you complete your projects safely and efficiently.

Our durable, heavy-duty mats are built to keep your operations moving, even in the most challenging environments. From establishing temporary roads to stabilizing access points, Spartan Mats protect both the ground and your workforce, ensuring the safe and seamless movement of support equipment. By minimizing the need for extensive clean-up or repairs, our mats help keep your projects on track and within budget.

Serving a diverse range of industries—including pipeline and underground, utilities, wind energy, drilling, and oilfield operations—Spartan Composites offers premium matting solutions for any terrain or challenge. Whatever your project demands, we have the right matting solution to help you get the job done.

Name: Lutze Group
Description:
Welcome to the Lutze Group – your trusted partner in industrial solutions.
With over 35 branches across 6 European countries, we deliver conveyor belt technology, wear protection solutions, minerals processing equipment, and plastics technology to a multitude of industries.

Conveyor belt technology expertise
We ensure seamless operations with our deep expertise in conveyor belt technology. From belts to drums, rollers, cleaners, and monitoring systems, we provide tailored solutions and 24/7 expert service for your specific needs.

Comprehensive wear protection solutions
Protecting your assets is our priority. Our comprehensive wear protection solutions in rubber, polyurethane, polyethylene, ceramics – glued, bolted, welded, or spray-coated, safeguard your equipment, extending its lifespan and minimizing downtime.

Rock and Minerals processing equipment
We offer rock and minerals processing machines, systems, and services designed to optimize efficiency and productivity for various industries, including stone and gravel, demolition and recycling, concrete and asphalt.

Innovative polyurethane solutions
Our plastics technology factory specializes in custom-made polyurethane products. Leveraging advanced manufacturing techniques, we provide bespoke components, custom molding solutions, and unique polyurethane products tailored to your needs.

Global reach, local commitment
With worldwide activities and service jobs, we bring our expertise to your doorstep. Whether it's our innovative plasterboard belts, Luwirep repair system, or reliable LUCON conveyor belts, we exceed expectations with every solution we provide.

Customer-centric approach
At Lutze Group, your success is our passion. We build lasting relationships based on trust, reliability, and exceptional service, dedicated to helping you achieve your goals every step of the way.

Name: Sati Group Spa
Description:
Sati Group spa è, da oltre 60 anni, leader nella produzione e nella distribuzione di nastri trasportatori in gomma, tubi industriali in gomma e pvc, lastre e tappeti in gomma, materiali espansi e fascette e collari stringitubo.
L'Headquarter, ubicato a Bologna, è caratterizzato da una superficie coperta di oltre 30.000mq che consente al personale qualificato la possibilità di assicurare puntualità, qualità e celerità di consegne.

Satibelt, Satisheet, Satihose, Satiblock e Satifoam sono i marchi che permettono di contraddistinguere per qualità i prodotti Sati Group poiché ognuno di essi è garanzia di ricerca e analisi costante dei materiali migliori.
La continua ricerca di prodotti innovativi come elemento imprescindibile per crescere e l’investimento costante in impianti ad alta tecnologia ha permesso all'azienda di forgiarsi di un nuovo prodotto dal cuore interamente Made in Italy: il nastro trasportatore bordi e tazze Sativertical

Name: TrafFix Devices
Description: TrafFix Devices, Inc. is manufacturer of traffic control devices and crash attenuation products. We manufacture all of our own products and take tremendous pride in their engineering and technical performance. Our products are designed and engineered to meet the highway requirements of countries all over the world.

Name: Minnesota Rubber and Plastics Trelleborg Sealing Solutions
Description:
Minnesota Rubber & Plastics (MRP), now part of Trelleborg is one of the world’s leading developers, manufacturers, and suppliers of precision seals, bearings, and custom-molded polymer components. We focus on meeting the needs of industries that demand critical-to-function elastomeric and thermoplastic parts. Capabilities include materials science and formulation, fully functional product prototyping, operational excellence, and supply chain consolidation.
The combined expertise of Trelleborg and MRP provides customers with exceptional innovation opportunities. With an emphasis on research and development, the company empowers its technicians to design, formulate, develop, and test a wide range of highly engineered materials and parts. Our new Innovation Center provides customers with enhanced direct access to materials science expertise and a fully integrated design-build-prototype-test process that enhances innovation and greatly accelerates product development.

Name: SFC Solutions Automotive France
Description:
Notre engagement : développer, produire et distribuer des pièces et des matériaux pensés pour l’avenir de tous en prenant en compte les attentes de nos parties prenantes. Nous proposons une large gamme de produits et de matériaux responsables et robustes.

Notre entreprise est spécialisée dans le développement et la fabrication de systèmes d’étanchéité et de mélanges caoutchouc, SFC Solutions Automotive France a rejoint le groupe allemand Mutares en juillet 2022.

De la conception au produit fini, le site de Charleval (France) est doté d’un atelier de mélangeage de caoutchouc EPDM, d'un atelier d’extrusion, de finition et d’injection bi-matière avecson propre Bureau d’Etudes, son laboratoire et son pôle innovation. 
Les autre filiales SFC Solutions sont également des sites de production ultra-compétitifs (extrusion et finition), au plus proches de nos clients principaux. 
Notre vocation première est de développer et de fabriquer des systèmes d’étanchéité innovants pour le secteur automobile, qui permettent d’assurer la protection des véhicules contre les éléments extérieurs tels que le bruit, la poussière ou encore l’eau (joints de portes, coffres, vitres…) ; 
Notre forte expérience dans le secteur automobile et notre capacité à nous adapter sans cesse nous permettent aussi d’assurer la conception et la production de pièces d’étanchéité en caoutchouc et TPE pour tout autre domaine d’application ; 
Enfin, notre atelier de mélangeage caoutchouc ultra moderne basé en France permet de fabriquer jusqu’à 85 tonnes de mélange par jour. De la formulation à la fabrication du caoutchouc : nos experts présents sur site s’occupent de tout, tout en privilégiant des matériaux innovants et respectueux de l'environnement.

Name: ILPEA
Description:
Founded in 1960, ILPEA is a worldwide leader in the design and manufacturing of advanced plastic, rubber, and magnetic products. 
With headquarters in Italy and operations across 17 countries we work with leading home appliance, automotive, and building brands to create innovative, high-performance components. Our three divisions - Plastic, Rubber and Magnetic - combining cutting-edge materials, proprietary processes, and extensive industry know-how to consistently deliver excellence, reliability and innovation.
Location: Bardello con Malgesso e Bregano, Varese

Name: Rahco Rubber, Inc.
Description:
At Rahco Rubber, we manufacturer custom-engineered, high-precision rubber parts, components and seals for OEMs and their suppliers. 

When companies turn to us, it’s because they know that every component is critical to maximize product performance, cost efficiencies and manufacturability — from conception to commercialization. 

As a family owned and operated business, Rahco prides itself on successful, lasting relationships with customers — and employees — that span decades. We embrace a customer-focused philosophy based on trust, dedication to delivering the highest quality and lean manufacturing excellence.

Since 1967, Rahco has built a reputation as a best-in-class supplier and value-added partner to the nation’s most sophisticated manufacturers, working as an extension of their staff to design, improve and optimize parts that meet lifestyle demands, mitigate risk, and help build a sustainable, competitive advantages.

Along with automated production processes, Rahco’s on-staff chemists and engineers utilize state-of-the-art technologies, equipment and resources to produce highly-engineered rubber parts to exacting specifications, with zero defects. 

We accommodate short lead-times, change requests and can take on any size order as a vertically integrated, one-stop operation — with offices, manufacturing, laboratories, shipping and receiving all from our 60,00 sq ft facility — serving global companies, predominantly in: Agriculture & Irrigation, Appliance, Plumbing, Consumer Electronic, Off-Road and Power Sports, Food Service, Heavy Truck and Water Treatment & Distribution industries.

We believe our purpose is to create value. If you’re developing new products, facing performance challenges with existing ones or concerned about the materials in your current parts and their alignment to specification — Rahco Rubber can help.

Name: ARGOMM GROUP
Description:
The Argomm Group is an international group of industrial companies headquartered in Italy that for over 40 years has been synonymous with reliability and professionalism in the entire cycle of design, development, production and supply of custom parts in elastomer, plastic and bi-component materials.

The Argomm Group's global presence and synergy of skills enables it to act as a single point of contact for customers in the manufacture of custom parts for integrated sealing systems: from the design and co-design of the shape to research and testing of materials, prototyping (including rapid prototyping), functional testing and industrialisation, right up to mass production.
Reliability is the most important feature of the solutions offered by the Argomm Group: solutions designed and manufactured to specific customer requirements with the aim of ensuring the highest quality performance in compliance with costs and service.

Name: INTERPOLIMERI GROUP
Description:
Plastics distribution in Europe. More than 40 years of activity in serving the plastics market with competence and passion. Official distributor of many global plastics producers: ExxonMobil Chemical, LG Chemicals, LyondellBasell, Ascend. 
Our headquarters are in Italy, Padova. We have subsidiaries in Spain, Portugal, Belgium, Germany, Hungary, France, Slovakia and Czech Republic.

Name: RongFengDa (Guangzhou) International Co., Ltd.
Description:
Established in 2006, the factory covers an area of over 10000 square meters and has built 30 production lines and supporting equipment with a production capacity of 10000 tons per year.

We mainly produce various types of polymer new energy plastics and high-quality electronic information transmission products, including low smoke halogen-free(LSZH) materials, toy materials, photovoltaic materials, robot drag chain materials, electric vehicle charging cable materials, and special polymer modified plastics such as XLPE, XLPO, PUR, PUC, TPE, TPU etc. We also produce supporting products such as color masterbatch for PP, PE(XLPE), PLA, PVC, TPE, TPU, ABS, PC, PET, PETG, PA series, PS, POM, ASA, etc. and additive masterbatch of various plastics. 

We have an independent research and development team to support customers' various customization requirements.

Name: El Helal Group
Description:
Ranked among the Middle East’s leading petrochemicals manufacturers, HGS is an international company based in Egypt. The company began in 1961 and its development has been phenomenal ever since. With a labor force of over 1500 individuals, Helal Star Group has managed to expand its operations throughout Africa, the Middle East and Europe.
HGS specializes in the production of a wide range of plastic household products including brushes, squeegees, buckets, ropes, mops and many other cleaning utensils. Our company aims to employ the most efficient and advanced production methods by continuously investing in the latest Italian machinery and production lines.
HGS global presence continues to grow immensely; exporting to over 35 countries worldwide and supplying 30 private label brands all over the world. Our striving vision for expansion is matched by the development of substantial relationships with our local and global success partners. Today, Helal Star Group is proud to be one of the few companies worldwide that can produce all components of its final product from A to Z, granting it the ability to tailor customer needs from specific product components to production time to packing specifications.

Name: Harsh Auxi Chem Pvt Ltd
Description: Leading Manufacturer of PVC Stabilizers

Name: Vipo
Description: We are experts in problem solving using polymers! A global supplier of polymer solutions to industries with years of experience in defense, oil and gas and renewable energy. Due to our high level of expertise in using rubber in demanding environments, we are able to provide bespoke engineered solutions to solve business challenges in any industry.

Name: SIMTEC Silicone Parts, Inc.
Description:
SIMTEC is a leading, US-based manufacturer  of Liquid Silicone Rubber (LSR) Single-Shot, Two-Shot, and Multi-Shot (LSR/Thermoplastics/Metal)  injection molded components. A member of the RICO Group, SIMTEC is a single-source provider of high-precision, close tolerance applications, with services ranging from design support, material selection, prototyping, high volume injection molding and clean room hygienic injection molding for customers in the automotive/mobility, medical/healthcare, consumer, mother and baby care, and industrial markets.

As a technology-driven company, we work with leading raw material suppliers and world-renowned research institutions in the United States and Europe in order to provide our customers with a superior level of service and unparalleled quality, utilizing the highest quality materials. We manufacture applications ranging from custom O-Rings, seals, gaskets, valves, baby bottle nipples and diaphragms with volumes from the hundreds of thousands to millions.

SIMTEC is an ISO 9001, IATF 16949, ISO 13485, and cGMP and I Compliant company that is committed to conducting operations in an environmentally responsible manner. Our goal is to meet and exceed all applicable legal environmental requirements. In addition, we also integrate environmental values into our decision making process. By considering the environmental impact of proposed and existing Liquid Silicon Rubber manufacturing processes, we become catalysts of change for a healthier planet.

Extraordinary LSR Solutions

Name: STEEP Plastique
Description:
STEEP Plastique is a Tier 1 automotive supplier meeting the needs of car manufacturers. We are present in all product families.

We are experts in injection moulding of engineering thermoplastics and develop complete functions for integration into thermal, hybrid and electric cars and powertrains.

STEEP Plastique is a key figure in technological and environmental innovation in the automotive sector. We contribute to the weight reduction of vehicles by transferring metal functions into plastic.

Our know-how extends from design to mass industrialization.

Customer satisfaction is the leitmotiv of our development.

Name: NRK (Nederlandse Rubber- en Kunststofindustrie)
Description: Every day thousands of products from rubber and plastics are made from car tires to sailing boats. A world without is unthinkable, a sustainable future too. For companies in the rubber and plastics industry supply a wide variety of components, modules and finished products that are essential for applications in industry and commerce, construction, packaging and consumer products. The Dutch Federation of Rubber and Plastics Industry NRK represents the interests of some 430 companies grouped into 19 industry associations.

Name: Echo Engineering & Production Supplies, Inc.
Description:
Welcome to Echo Engineering's LinkedIn company page. We are a global leader in precision masking solutions and engineered rubber and plastic components. With over 50 years of experience, we have been the preferred partner for numerous manufacturing leaders worldwide.

At Echo, we deliver high-quality, cost-effective products that meet the unique needs of our clients. Our expertise lies in providing customized solutions, including rubber and plastic components, tape, and molded products. We take pride in utilizing advanced manufacturing techniques and cutting-edge technologies to ensure the highest standards of craftsmanship and performance.

Our commitment to excellence extends beyond our products. We believe in building long-term partnerships with our customers and understanding their specific requirements and goals. Our dedicated team of experts provides personalized solutions and exceptional customer service at every stage of the manufacturing process.

Join global manufacturing leaders who have experienced the Echo Engineering advantage. Discover the benefits of cost savings, superior quality, and a customer-centric approach. Connect with us today to explore how we can support your manufacturing needs and bring your next project to life!

Visit our website or contact us for more information: www.echoinnovates.com

Name: Optinova Group
Description: Founded in 1971, Optinova is a world-leading extrusion partner for advanced medical and industrial tubing. With sales offices around the world and four extrusion plants in Finland, Thailand, and the US, we are serving partners from 50+ countries across industries.

Name: Meccanostampi
Description:
Con 60 anni di esperienza, Meccanostampi ha acquisito un ruolo leader nella produzione di stampi ad iniezione e di articoli tecnici stampati in tecnopolimeri ed offre un servizio di alta qualità per quanto riguarda lo studio di prodotto, progettazione e costruzione stampi, così come la fornitura di pezzi stampati secondo i più severi standard di qualità. 

Oggi Meccanostampi si compone di oltre 260 dipendenti, di cui 40 sono dedicati alla progettazione e costruzione degli stampi. 

La capacità produttiva di stampaggio è rappresentata da 140 presse ad iniezione disposte in 4 stabilimenti su una superficie di oltre 25.000 mq.

Name: Halston Global
Description:
Way back in 1948, late Shri Kapurchand Gulabchand Sanghvi, who was nothing less than a visionary, founded M/s. Saurashtra Mill Stores, house of rubber beltings, in Nagdevi market, Mumbai. Halston Distributors, a business house and an associate group company, incepted in 1998 is an extension of his vision and a tribute to him.

Halston Distributors started as sole distributors of V belts in India. Being primarily into various types of rubber transmission products for industrial and agricultural applications, they have successfully built to date, a net-work of 6000+ dealers, consumers, OEM's and continue to grow across the length and breadth of Maharashtra, Gujarat, Andhra Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh & Chattisgarh - ably supported by a competent sales team excellent communication network and efficient administration.

Halston Distributors have also forayed into business of Rubber/PVC/ Industrial and Hydraulic Flexible Hoses and pillow blocks, besides having acquired distributorships of renowned companies. Today, Halston Distributors have got discerning customers spread over varied industries like textiles, automobiles, cement, construction, oil & gas, petrochemicals. fertilizers, power plants, project consultants, etc.

Name: Vin Industries
Chemtech Process Services, Inc.
Description: At Chemtech, we specialize as a prominent distributor based in the USA, dedicated to supplying premium Polymers and Colorants. Our extensive range of raw materials caters to diverse industries, and our commitment extends beyond mere supply – we actively assist clients in finding tailored solutions to meet their unique requirements. Leveraging our technical expertise, we identify products suited to specific end-use applications. Additionally, we offer comprehensive transaction management services, ensuring safe and competitively priced inventory management, logistics, and import/export services. Explore our product section to discover the depth of our capabilities. We proudly collaborate with esteemed manufacturers in the USA and Canada, working synergistically to provide an extensive range of high-quality products.

Name: Indea Group
Description:
Indea Group (former Hispamoldes Group) is a benchmark player in the Spanish thermoplastic injection moulding segment and in the manufacture of injection moulds and tools. It has over 350 employees divided across its four productive facilities (three in Spain and one in Morocco) and it generates around €38 million of revenue.

SAPA Group, one of Europe’s leading makers of specialist next-generation parts for the sustainable mobility industry, has taken a majority interest in Grupo Hispamoldes, a Quarza’s portfolio company, the investment vehicle created by Cristian Abelló in 2019, which will stay on as one of Hispamoldes’ shareholders.

SAPA, a leading player in the plastic injection moulding in the European automotive industry, sells its products to major European OEMs, including Stellantis, Volkswagen, Ferrari and BMW (Rolls Royce). It has eight production plants around the world and over 1,500 employees. In 2022, it generated around €250 million of revenue.

The integration of Hispamoldes Group into SAPA, with the goal of creating a leading supplier in the European sustainable mobility industry, will give rise to Grupo Indea, through which it will be able to further its consolidation and expansion plans, reinforcing and increasing its business volumes, expanding its geographic reach and diversifying its customer portfolio.

Name: Lopigom SpA
Description:
Lopigom provides rubber and plastic products.
Core business are O-rings, seals, customized gaskets, plastic items, rubber+metal parts, 2k injected parts, assembled parts. 

Main Rubber raw material : EPDM, NBR, HNBR, FKM, FFKM, VMQ, FVMQ, LSR , AEM, ACM, NR, SBR, CR, PU.
Main Plastic Material : PA, PA66, PA6/66 GF , POM, ABS, PEEK, PP, HDPE, PC, PS, TPE, TPV, TPU.

Our field of application are : Automotive, Home Appliances, Heating, Plumbing, Gas, Sanitary, Pharmaceutical, Pneumatic, Electronics, Aerospace, others. 

QUALITY SYSTEM CERTIFIED : 
||  ISO 9001:2015  ||  IATF 16949:2016  ||  EN 9100:2018  || ISO 14001:2015  ||

Name: MPT Plastica
Description:
MOLDING PERFORMANCE TECHNOLOGIES

Name: formary
Description:
formary is a B2B platform that digitizes the traditional thermoforming industry and is based in Backnang near Stuttgart. 

The team around formary has set itself the goal to change inefficient and traditional processes in the procurement of thermoformed parts forever. Through smart, fast and effective processing from inquiry to delivery, formary reduces the effort for customers and suppliers. In this way, we create a win-win situation and, as a platform, aim to shape the joint future of the thermoforming industry. 

Individual thermoformed parts can be configured quickly and easily in the digital configurator. Purchasers receive an offer within 24 hours - formary assigns the optimal supplier from the network to each inquiry. This saves formary customers time-consuming supplier searches for B and C parts, requires less time and effort, and allows them to concentrate on their core business. 

In the field of thermoforming, formary offers roll and sheet manufacturing. In addition to the manufacturing process, another range of finishing operations can be covered. These include stamping and CNC milling, as well as the production of assemblies by gluing, welding and screwing and lacquering, or printing. 

Sustainable and fair relationships with our suppliers and customers are extremely important to us. We live this also within the formary team to push the common mission to create a win-win-win situation for the thermofroming market.

Name: EquiSafe AB
Description:
I vår egna fabrik i Laholm har EquiSafe tillverkat hållbara och snygga häststaket sedan starten 1986. 
År 2021 tog Alexander med lång erfarenhet i branschen över rodret på det gamla familjeföretaget och fortsatt utveckla fabriken och produkterna. 
Framförallt har vi utvecklat staketet för ännu längre hållbarhet och stabilitet. Vi har idag moderna sätt att återvinna plast  och utvecklat eltråden i slanorna till tråd med mycket längre hållbarhet. 

Alla Equisafestaket är tillverkade av 100% återvunnen plast som inte släpper ifrån sig farliga ännen. Den tas omhand hos oss och återvinns på bästa sätt.

Det tycker vi är hållbarhet på riktigt. Allt på vår lilla fabrik med vår egen personal.

Vi tar vara på den plast som annars hade bränts upp eller skickats utomlands för vidare processer. 
Vi kallar det numera RS-staketet. Recycled and sustainable står RS-staketet för. 
Hållbara staket även för kommande generationer med säkerhet i fokus. 
Det finns bara en planet med hästar! 

Välkommen att kontakta oss för rådgivning om just ert staketprojekt.

From compact to complex, major manufacturers look to us to fabricate some of the most demanding and intricate parts.  Our in-house capabilities include:
•	Roll or sheet slitting
•	Film lamination

•	Precision die cutting for high volume production 
•	Tabulation & kitting
•	Pick & place reel equipment 
•	Down-packing for liquid dispensed solutions

Seit über 40 Jahren sind wir Ihre Experten für die Herstellung, Verarbeitung und den Vertrieb von Produkten aus Gummi-und Elastomer-Werkstoffen.

 

Das mittelständische Familienunternehmen mit Sitz in Stuttgart wurde 1976 gegründet und wird heute in 3. Generation geführt.

Das Unternehmen ist mittlerweile auf 7500m² Produktions- und Lagerfläche gewachsen und beschäftigt 20 Mitarbeiter.

Durch den Vertrieb von Anlagenkomponenten und Ersatzteilen erhalten Sie bei uns alles aus einer Hand.

 

Des Weiteren sind wir Hersteller von Industriellen Gummi- und Elastomerprodukten.

Wir produzieren maschinell Zuschnitte und Dichtungen, stellen Verschleißschutzauskleidungen her und fertigen Manschetten, Schläuche und Blähmanschetten.

Unsere Techniker beraten Sie in Bezug auf Materialauswahl und Fertigungsverfahren.

 

Unser Vertriebsteam beliefert Sie In enger Zusammenarbeit mit Fertigungsbetrieben aus ganz Europa und Deutschland flexibel und kurzfristig mit Artikeln der Industrietechnik und Fördertechnik.

Name: Matec Group s.r.l.
Description:
MATEC, was founded at the end of 70’s, in the City of Milan, Italy.
The initial idea was to propose “FLEXIBLE SOLUTIONS”.
In the very beginning, Matec was counting a staff of few people and a small production site, while today, Matec is well positioned on a land of approx 15,000 sqm with warehouses, workshops, welding and production lines in Peschiera Borromeo, close to the city of Milan, besides the Linate Airport and the main Milan ring road and the main motorways.
The company moved to Peschiera Borromeo in 1980. Early technical and marketing innovations began to produce successes and, in 1985, the company moved to a larger building in the same city and started the production of Flexible composite hoses. The Italian’s first flexible composite hose, was developed in the early 1990’s, with the brand of COMPOTEC.
A second major milestone occurred in 1995 when the company decided to acquire an historical firm, very well known in the field of flexible metallic hoses, and quick connect fittings, the company ENCO located in Buccinasco, south of Milan, an innovative step towards diversification.
In the 2000’s, Matec Group continued to develop an array of innovative products, including the first Food grade Composite hose with FDA approval and a series of Fire Proof Composite hoses.
In 2000, Matec Group finalized the acquisition of another historical company well known and established in the field of Mandrel built Rubber hoses, the company FARIVO and the sales topped with innovative new products contributing significantly to growth.
In 2010, Matec Group acquired one of the oldest and best known Italian companies specialized in the production of Expansion Joints, know with the brand TOPFLEX.
This latest acquisition is now completing the synergy of the global offer that MATEC Group is offering in the field of Flexibles.

Name: Goodfish Group
Description:
The Goodfish Group is a privately-owned, plastic injection-moulding, extrusion, vacuum-forming & composites manufacturing service business with sites in Cannock, Worcester & St. Asaph.

Our Group has been built up through performance improvement of acquired  businesses. Our directors are constantly looking out for & reviewing acquisition opportunities in plastics and adjacent activities.

We employ 100+ skilled engineers, technicians and manufacturing operatives.

Our customers are automotive Tier 1s and multinational businesses with wide-ranging activities in construction, domestic heating, medical, point-of-sale displays, electronics, leisure, packaging plus specialists in areas such as automation and security.

Our award-winning business has doubled in size every two years since we started up in 2010. In the year to Dec-23 we reached sales of £15m. We are targeting £25m by 2025.

20% of our sales are to export markets, primarily Tier 1 and OEM plants in Poland, Hungary, Czech Rep., India, China, France, Germany & Turkey.

We specialise in technical moulding and extrusion in specialist materials. With our own tooling design office, we are able to help our customers design cost out of their tooling as well as out of their mouldings, extrusions and assemblies.

Our in-house printing capability is supported by external coating suppliers. Our assembly skills enable us to deliver sub-assemblies, rather than just mouldings or extrusions, to our customers. We also heat-stake, sonic-weld and prepare detailed reports on mouldings using our in-house CMMs.

All three of our businesses are accredited to ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and OHSAS18001.

Our injection moulding equipment ranges from 35t to 1,000t. We currently have 60+ injection moulding machines and 25+ extrusion lines. We also offer vacuum forming and composite services since 2017.

Description:
Unisto is a leading international provider of security and branding solutions. Since 1926, we have been a trusted partner for companies and organizations across various industries worldwide. Tailored to customer needs, our security seals provide the highest level of protection. We also offer digital security seals and digital solutions that enable real-time monitoring of the sealing process for enhanced security and control.

In brand profiling, Unisto is a trusted partner for leading brands in watches, eyewear, jewelry, beverages, perfumes, fashion and textiles. Customer-centred teams co-create customized Point-of-Sale, product branding and packaging solutions that elevate brand presence. Sustainability is a core value at Unisto. Through our "Unisto Green Footprint" initiative, we are committed to continuously improving our production processes and products to reduce environmental impact.

Unisto meets the highest industry standards and undergoes regular audits by recognized independent organizations to ensure compliance and excellence in all areas.

Name: EwelPlast sp. z o.o. - plastic pallet manufacturer
Description:
EwelPlast sp. z o.o. is a manufacturer of EURO -type plastic pallets.

The "EP Pallet" was designed from the ground up by our company, resulting in a positive patent report. Thanks to our design, we have reduced the pallet's weight to 14 kg without compromising its dynamic load capacity of 1200 kg, static load capacity of 6000 kg and racking load capacity of 1000 kg.

Our product is certified by the PZH for indirect food contact.

We also produce ESD pallets (guaranteeing effective protection against the risk of electrostatic discharge) and Self-Extinguishing pallets in classes V2-V1-V0.

Additionally, we offer the following options for our pallet:

CUSTOMIZATION
The ability to customize pallets by adjusting the color to best match the company's brand and applying the company logo.

ANTI-SLIP INSERTS
The option to apply anti-slip inserts in any configuration according to the customer's needs. They effectively prevent specific loads from shifting, ensuring the goods are safe and stable.

RENTAL
Flexible pallet rental services tailored to your time needs. At the end of the rental period, you have the option to purchase the pallets at an attractive price!

TRANSPORT
We have our own fleet and offer favorable delivery terms.

Name: ACP Plásticos
Description:
Fundada em Novembro de 1987, a organização ACP consolida-se como um dos nomes de referência no setor de artigos Office e escolares. O acrônimo da marca expressa a vitalidade da organização em permanecer como símbolo inabalável no empório Office.
Há 33 anos, Ademir Cesar e Cícero Rodrigues de Souza, amigos de trabalho até então, decidem firmar uma sociedade produzindo inicialmente artigos de PVC (Policloreto de Vinila) com apenas 15 funcionários, posteriormente iriam aumentar essa variedade de artigos, dando início a fabricação de produtos de Polipropileno, Polietileno e confecção, também ampliando seu corpo de colaboradores para mais de 200 pessoas.
Certamente você já viu o Logo ACP em vários lugares, certo? Agora você já sabe o que significa essas iniciais, Ademir e Cícero Plásticos. A cor verde predominante em nosso Logo simboliza a essência que alimentou os corações dos fundadores no princípio dessa caminhada e essa essência chama-se: Esperança !
Essa história vitoriosa começou a ser escrita em Mandaqui e agora se encontra no maior polo industrial do país, Guarulhos. Hoje a organização é dirigida por Ademir Cesar e Solange Bruzadelli, que assumiu a função de Diretora após o falecimento do Co-fundador Cícero Rodrigues de Souza
Hoje a ACP produz mais de 600 produtos, variando entre a Linha Office e Escolar. Aqui nada é desperdiçado, todo material que sobra da produção é reutilizado em seu processo fabril. Pensamos de forma sustentável. Contamos com mais 80 representantes espalhados por todo território nacional. Vamos chegar até você, mas não de qualquer forma, vamos chegar com qualidade; ou melhor... Com mais qualidade!

Name: NGI - Créateur de solutions
Description:
NGI - Créateur de solutions
 Conception, fabrication & distribution de produits multi-matériaux pour l’industrie.

Présent depuis plus de deux générations dans le secteur de l’industrie en France, NGI apporte la preuve de son professionnalisme, par sa qualité de fabrication outillages et sa fiabilité pour l’industrialisation des produits. 

L’entreprise est spécialisée dans la conception et l’industrialisation de produits plastiques et métalliques.

Sa reconnaissance, sa fiabilité et sa réussite auprès de ses clients lui ont permis d’accroitre l’activité avec différents secteurs pour proposer la fabrication de produits semi finis ou finis.
NGI intègre dans son offre l’expertise technique pour tous les projets, de la consultation jusqu’à son industrialisation.  Nous complétons nos offres avec de l’assemblage, du stockage et de la distribution au national et à l’international.

Le développement des sociétés familiales COMTEC (fabrication d’outillages), DEMOTEC (injection plastique) et NGI (assemblage et décoration) ont permis de faire leur place dans le secteur de l’industrie.

Regroupé en une seule identité au début des années 2000, NGI s’implante à Dongguan en Chine en 2002 pour proposer des solutions de fabrication toujours plus compétitives avec des délais maîtrisés.
Après plusieurs années d’existence et des milliers de références de produits spécifiques fabriqués chaque année, NGI se développe continuellement pour satisfaire la demande client et rester une société leader dans la fabrication de produits spécifiques.

The company’s vision is to produce rubber products that will not only meet, but also anticipate and exceed the demands of the most stringent international standards within the various fields of application, in the context of an increasingly demanding and global market.

This is possible only by pursuing a continuous research anddevelopment of materials, equipment and processes used for the manufacturing of our products. Name: Coating Technology srl
Description:
Coating Technology is an Italian company specialized in anti-friction and technical cleaning treatments on elastomers.
Utilizing advanced coating technologies, we enhance your product performance by reducing friction and increasing resistance to wear, high temperatures, water, chemicals, and oils.

We take pride in our ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 certifications, which underscore our commitment to quality and environmental sustainability.

With extensive experience in automotive, food, and medical sectors, we provide tailored solutions for O-rings, valves, sealing systems, profiles and much more.

Among the numerous services we offer, you will find: high-pressure technical cleaning in closed chamber, solvent-based coatings, transparent and colored PTFE-coatings, plasma treatments, PFAS-free solutions and coatings suitable for applications in the food, drinking water, medical and cosmetic industries.
In addition, we have an internal laboratory equipped with state-of-the-art tools for compliance testing, including friction coefficient measurement and cleanliness analysis according to VDA 19 standards.

Our treatments also encompass anti-adhesion, anti-friction, and soft-touch coatings using products compliant with FDA, WRAS, and MOCA standards.

Name: AVK GUMMI A/S
Description:
AVK GUMMI manufactures very high quality rubber components for use in demanding applications. The drinking water sector, the food industry, the energy sector, the healthcare and chemical industries are primary segments. AVK GUMMI is among the world leaders in these areas.
AVK GUMMI supplies high quality compounds approved for drinking water applications to the whole AVK Group and has developed a universal EPDM rubber quality that is drinking water approved worldwide. AVK GUMMI supplies all major customers in the food industry in Europe and is expanding its customer base quickly in China.
Rubber production started back in 1955, and today the production is carried out with modern, high-tech and automated machinery. In 2001 AVK GUMMI commissioned one of the world’s most advanced, fully automatic rubber mixing plants. In 2012 the mixing plant is extended and mixing capacity is doubled.

AVK GUMMI emphasizes on quality and environment. The quality, environment and working environment systems are certified in accordance with IATF16949/ISO9001, ISO14001 and OHSAS 18001 respectively. These systems include 100% control of each rubber compound, full traceability with the help of charge number, SPC control, FMEA, zero defect production and an extraordinarily clean production environment making it possible to supply high quality rubber components and meeting the strongest demands of the industry on sealing materials.

Name: ATA Kalıp ve Plastik
Description:
ATA KALIP, Sürekli yenilik hedefi ve geliştirdiği stratejiler doğrultusunda, profesyonel bir yönetimle kalıp üretimi konusunda birçok sektör tarafından vazgeçilmez bir iş ortağı olmuştur.
1991 yılında kurulan ATA KALIP Bugün teknolojiye yaptığı yatırımlarla ve sektördeki tecrübesiyle İkitelli Organize Sanayi Bölgesi’nin en modern yapısı olan Trios 2023 (sanayi Bölgesi )içerisinde 5500 metrekarelik kapalı alanda teknolojik bir KALIP FABRİKASI olarak hizmet vermektedir.ATA KALIP, Sürekli yenilik hedefi ve geliştirdiği stratejiler doğrultusunda, profesyonel bir yönetimle kalıp üretimi konusunda birçok sektörde tarafından vazgeçilmez bir iş ortağı olmuştur.
Yüksek müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı çalışmaları sayesinde uzun yıllardır Türk Kalıp sektöründe ilk 5 firma içerisinde yer almanın haklı gururunu taşımaktadır.
ATA KALIP Sürekli yenilenen makine donanımıyla yıllık 650 adet plastik ve metal enjeksiyon kalıpları (kalıbı) imalatı gerçekleştirmektedir.

Name: BARNEM TECNOLOGIE PLASTICHE SRL
Description:
Dal 1972 BARNEM  si occupa di ingegnerizzazione e produzione di componenti e gruppi in plastica di elevato contenuto tecnologico ed estetico, a basso impatto ambientale. 

I processi produttivi, fortemente integrati e verticalizzati, si svolgono su due siti produttivi a Brescia. 
L'Azienda presidia un ciclo produttivo verticalizzato, che va dalla  ingegnerizzazione di prodotto e di processo, all'officina stampi, e a seguire 2 reparti di stampaggio termoplastici  dotati di 26 presse da 40 a 400 tons, di recente acquisizione e tutte automatizzate. 
Il ciclo produttivo si completa con la verniciatura, la marcatura laser, l'assemblaggio finale ed il controllo tramite EOL Machine, nonché da un laboratorio interno a supporto sia del processo produttivo che dell'attività del Servizio Qualità.

Negli ultimi anni BARNEM si è rivolta prevalentemente al settore automobilistico, in particolare componenti per interno vettura, con elevati requisiti estetici.
L'Azienda è certificata IATF e 14001.

BARNEM è una realtà giovane e dinamica, che si confronta con un mercato complesso e per questo è alla ricerca di nuove sfide e di personale che condivida questa visione.
L'Azienda è in fase di forte sviluppo e di introduzione di nuove tecnologie all'avanguardia attente a contenere l'impatto ambientale. 
È sempre alta l’attenzione a stimolare investimenti in Ricerca e Sviluppo, innovazione tecnologica, trasformazione digitale dei processi produttivi, miglioramento delle condizioni di lavoro, anche nell’ambito del paradigma 4.0.

Per ulteriori informazioni, consulta il sito www.barnem.it (in corso di rifacimento)

Name: RubberForm Recycled Products, LLC
Description:
RubberForm Recycled Products, LLC is a world-class manufacturer and marketer of innovative solutions for parking lot safety, construction site safety, municipal traffic safety, industrial plant safety, road construction safety and site preparation risk mitigation products. 

Our safety, risk mitigation and safety eco-green products are made from U.S. scrap tire rubber and specially formulated compounded recycled plastics that provide cost-effective, durable, and attractive alternatives to those made from concrete, metal, wood, or plastic. To maximize value to our customers, we have innovated numerous proprietary manufacturing processes and material formulations that ensure resistance to temperature variations, moisture damage, UV light, oils, fuels, salts, and the other environmental elements.

We are proud to say that all RubberForm products are made in the U.S. by an American workforce with all recycled material sourced from the U.S. We’re a dedicated member of the U.S. Green Building Council and all our products are GreenSpec listed to support LEED certification scores and keep properties safe and eco-friendly.

Name: Formation Plasturgie Tunisie
Description: A propos de TPC 1-Qui sommes, TPC est un cabinet de conseil au service de la performance et de l’excellence opérationnelle. Acteur majeur du conseil en Lean management, Lean manufacturing. Nous sommes présents dans tous les secteurs économiques. Le Lean management est une démarche d’amélioration continue, Il favorise l’élimination progressive de la non-valeur-ajoutée afin de réduire les coûts et les délais, tout en améliorant la qualité d’un produit ou d’un service pour une pleine satisfaction des clients. Mettant nos clients au cœur du changement de la performance par une meilleure complémentarité entre la vision stratégique « Top – Down» et la conduite par des chantiers opérationnels « Bottom – Up ». 2-Notre Mission TPC est né pour répondre aux besoins des organisations qui font face à des défis de plus en plus complexes. Pour chaque situation, TPC identifie avec vous les experts, les moyens et les méthodes, et vous aide à concevoir et mettre en œuvre votre stratégie opérationnelle. Nous avons pour mission de vous accompagner par : • le Diagnostic personnalisé des pistes d’amélioration et principaux leviers pour l’entreprise ; • le déploiement de nos démarches pour améliorer votre performance SMART en Sécurité, Qualité, Délais, Coûts et Management ; • vous rendre acteur de votre performance et de fédérer tous les niveaux de l’entreprise autour d’une vision commune de l’amélioration continue. 3-Notre vision 3.1-Atteindre l’excellence opérationnelle 3.2-Penser Lean & Ecoute client 4- Notre Expertise 4.1-Conseil en Excellence opérationnelle 4.2-Conseil en Lean Management 4.3-Conseil en Lean Manufacturing

Name: Vamas S.p.A.
Description:
We are a company active since the early seventies in the production of soles, integrating artisan experience with the best process and product technologies, to continue to be a reference point in the world of luxury fashion and sportswear. 
The company was born with the aim to grow in between one of the most famous Italian supply chain: the Tuscan Leather District. Over the years and our entrepenuer history, starting from San Miniato, our business has opened to international markets, technological innovation and new materials, first of all the polymeric materials.
We integrate the expertise of our craftsmen with the best processes and product technologies to be (and continue to be) a reference point in the world of luxury fashion and sportswear.
We have always had a positive attitude to problem-solving: we respond to customer needs and requests with ideas that respect their deadlines, taste and expected standards. When it comes to quality, we never compromise: "Quality over quantity!".
Our mission is to grow pursuing sustainable innovation and ensuring environmental, social and local well-being. And now that the company is led by new, younger and even more creative minds, our desire to experiment and innovate is stronger than ever. We know that making the entire production process efficient means taking into account and implementing many different elements and factors. Each phase must be carried out respecting the highest performance criteria. The goal is always to optimise performance and achieve the quality levels our clients expect from us.
The future is here, just a few steps away.

Name: RIS Rubber NV
Description:
RIS Rubber provides sophisticated solutions in the domain of moulded rubber products and rubber to metal bondings. Custom-made products when appropriate; serial production if necessary. With 180 skilled employees, modern testing facilities and an innovative R&D department, we have been a specialist international manufacturer since 1955.

Flexible production
RIS Rubber operates production presses of various dimensions and closing force at two locations, so we can develop moulds for many applications. In Lelystad (the Netherlands) we operate machines specifically for smaller series and high-grade niche products. In Kula (Bulgaria) we mainly produce larger series. The benefit to you: a top quality, solutions for competitive prices.

Let’s make things together!
Collaborating to find a solution is absolutely central to RIS Rubber. We convert your story and requirements into a product. We calculate and analyse the design model using advanced design and measuring equipment. The demand comes from your end; we have the knowhow and expertise.

As for the solution… We create it together.

Let’s make things together!

Name: ECO UK Services Ltd
Description: We are a UK based company offering de-burring services for rubber, plastic and non-ferrous metal. In order to successfully use cryogenic process technology, it is important that the optimal application-specific parameter settings of the deburring system are determined. When it comes to this requirement, we support our customers at all times and help to ensure that we can even make short-term solutions with sample and/or pre-series components that are suitable for acceptance possible in the case of new deburring components. With our many decades of expertise, we are able to help you with all questions and problems concerning application technology in and around the deburring process that is optimal for meeting your needs and requirements at any time. Hand trimming is time consuming and expensive, quality cannot always be maintained. Cryogenic de-flashing guarantees a precise, even and clean finish that can be reproduced time after time. It also results in no changes to the colour, shape, surface or material characteristics of the components whatsoever with 100% reliability. We are able to carry out cryogenic de-flashing at temperatures between – 20 and -150 degrees C. Our processes are particularly suitable for complex and delicate shapes, even in the case of undercuts! The materials that can be processed range from rubber/elastomers/silicone – NF-metals and right through to highly filled engineering plastics. ECO UK offers training sessions on the use of the process and the operation of systems for purposes such as introducing employees to de-burring, de-flashing systems, instructing operating staff or increasing efficiency. If you are impressed with the results of the de-flashing we offer we can supply you with the latest machines from MEWO GmbH for your own use. If your present production does not justify a de-flashing machine of your own ECO UK SERVICES LTD can offer a de-flashing service for you.

Name: REGN
Description:
Reaching outstanding technical and environmental performance with plastic and elastomer materials is possible. 

We are here to make it happen. 

We offer services covering technical investigation, training and project management (from A to Z). Our expertise in material science and formulation allows us to design materials to reach highest performance. Our understanding in materials architecture guarantees constant performance in use.

Our constant focus on building bridges between different industries and stakeholders allows our customers to achieve their goals efficiently. We take great care on providing our customers with scientifically sourced and proven data that can be used to as a base for technical communication.

You want to know more ! Get in touch with us !

Atteindre des performances techniques et environnementales exceptionnelles avec des matériaux plastiques et élastomères est possible. Nous sommes là pour que cela se produise.

Nous proposons des services allant de l’évaluation technique, à la gestion de projet (de A à Z) en passant par la formation. Nous avons à coeur de créer des ponts entre les différentes industries et parties prenantes afin de permettre à nos clients d’atteindre le plus rapidement possible leurs objectifs. Vous voulez en savoir plus ! N’hésitez pas à nous contacter !

Name: Arab Int. Expo for Plastic, Petrochemicals & Packaging
Description:
Arab International Plastic Industries Exhibition is a prestigious event held under the auspices of the Jordan Chamber of Industry and supported by the Chamber of Chemical Industries, Plastic Industries Division, and Chemical and Fertilizer Export Council. This annual exhibition brings together leading plastics companies from around the world to capitalize on the rapidly growing markets of the Middle East and North Africa.

As a premier international exhibition for plastics, rubber, petrochemicals, fertilizers, plastic recycling, printing, and packaging, the event showcases cutting-edge products and services to a growing market in Jordan and the Arab region. The goal is to foster trade links between Jordan and global markets while promoting the development of the region's economy.

The three-day event is expected to attract a large number of exhibitors, visitors, and professionals from the industry. It will provide a platform for specialists to network, collaborate, and establish relationships with potential partners and clients. The exhibition will also feature advanced technology and machinery for manufacturing plastics and petrochemicals.

In 2024, we invite the global plastic industry to participate in this exciting event. By joining us, your company will be connected to the central hub of this fast-growing regional market, providing exclusive access to buyers from across the region. This is an unparalleled opportunity to meet, educate, communicate, and do business with over 100 companies from more than 20 participating countries.

Name: Vissan - Soluções em Injeção Plástica
Description:
Na Vissan, estamos moldando o futuro da indústria de injeção plástica. Fundada por dois sócios engenheiros com uma sólida bagagem no setor automotivo, nossa missão é elevar os padrões de qualidade e inovação em todos os aspectos do processo de fabricação. Da concepção à produção, estamos comprometidos em entregar excelência em cada peça que fabricamos.

 Processos Eficientes: A eficiência é a espinha dorsal de nossa operação. Utilizamos práticas avançadas de gestão e otimização de processos para garantir a entrega pontual e dentro do orçamento, sem comprometer a qualidade.

 Parceria e Compromisso: Valorizamos profundamente nossos relacionamentos com os clientes. Estamos comprometidos em entender suas necessidades específicas e colaborar de perto para fornecer soluções personalizadas que impulsionem seu sucesso.

 Conecte-se conosco e descubra como a Vissan pode ser seu parceiro ideal para todas as suas necessidades de injeção plástica.

Name: PETER - Polyester, renewed
Description: PETER is more than just a name – it embodies our mission. We are dedicated to transforming polyester (PET), the world’s most common textile fiber, by giving it a second life. The "-er" suffix highlights our active role in this process, while the mirrored "RE" stands for recovery and continuous regeneration. Using our patented technology, we convert textile and complex packaging waste into high-quality, virgin-like rPET, offering a scalable, sustainable solution.

Name: Vision Tech
Description:
Vision Tech nasce nel 1997 su iniziativa di Attilio Rubino, Michele Barone e Carmen Rubino in un laboratorio artigianale di assemblaggio accessori nautici e vulcanizzazione di tasselli per cinghie dentate.
Vision Tech, oggi amministrata da Carmen Rubino, produce cinghie dentate e nastri ibridi sincronizzati per il settore delle macchine confezionatrici del packaging e delle automazioni industriali. È presente in tutto il mondo con prodotti all’avanguardia e grazie a una rete vendita innovativa, supportata da una forte specializzazione nel problem solving e in ricerca e sviluppo. Produciamo e trasformiamo cinghie dentate ad anello continuo, cinghie dentate per il trasporto sincronizzato, nastri ibridi sincronizzati di nuova generazione e nastri per trasportatori. Ci distinguiamo per taglio particolari a disegno in materiale plastico, poliuretano, gomma, silicone e mescole speciali in utilizzo su macchine automatiche industriali, alimentari e nelle automazioni in genere. Negli ultimi 12 anni, grazie alla creatività di Attilio Rubino, abbiamo sviluppato e realizzato 23 brevetti, abbinati ad oltre 80 articoli di gamma.
Oggi Vision Tech, forte della sinergia con la consociata PR Rubino che dal 1978 produce nastri di trasporto e di processo, dispone di oltre 45 dipendenti collocati in 4 sedi produttive in Italia, laboratori di prove di collaudo e laboratori di ricerca e sviluppo.

Name: MTM PLASTİK GERİ DÖNÜŞÜM

Organize Sanayi Bölgesi'nde yer alan 8000m2 kapalı alandaki modern tesisinde sürdüren şirketimiz, en son teknolojiyi kullanarak faaliyet göstermekte olup aylık 1000 ton granül üretme kapasitesine sahiptir.

Plastik geri dönüşüm süreçlerinde lider konumda olan şirketimiz, çevresel sürdürülebilirlik ve sıfır atık politikalarını benimsemekte ve bu doğrultuda faaliyet göstermektedir. Parkurumuz, sürekli olarak yenilenmekte, özenle toplanan ve dikkatle ayrılan malzemelerin ayrı ayrı işlenmesiyle birinci sınıf geri dönüşüm granül hammadde üretimi yapılmaktadır.

Description:
Da oltre 70 anni lavoriamo nel settore delle tubazioni per il trasporto dei fluidi.
Qualità e Sicurezza sono gli aspetti fondamentali del nostro lavoro ed il focus che ci accompagna in ogni attività.
La padronanza di un ciclo produttivo chiuso ci consente di tenere sotto controllo ogni aspetto della produzione ed avere
piena autonomia della ripartizione dei carichi di lavoro, questa è la formula vincente per accrescere la flessibilità gestionale e
migliorare il servizio verso tutti i nostri Partner commerciali.
 
L’esperienza, la cultura “Made in Italy” e la realizzazione di prodotti Top di gamma ci portano a
collaborare con le più prestigiose aziende motociclistiche e automobilistiche, fornendo prodotti destinati al mercato e alle massime competizioni sportive, ma non solo.
Anche la fornitura di tubazioni per i settori farmaceutico, alimentare, industriale, agricolo e movimento terra hanno permesso di sviluppare nuove tipologie di prodotto, ampliando le nostre conoscenze e gli orizzonti di mercato.
 
La soddisfazione del cliente è il nostro obiettivo principale, diventando il partner commerciale di cui hanno bisogno.

Name: Bergamaschi Blow Moulding Solutions S.R.L.
Description:
TANICHE, STRUTTURE, COMPONENTI: LA PLASTICA COME SOLUZIONE INDUSTRIALE

IL RUOLO DELLE TANICHE NEL PACKAGING
Un contenitore non è semplicemente un involucro, ma un sistema progettato per proteggere, trasportare e conservare. Ogni dettaglio, dallo spessore al materiale, è pensato per rispondere a una funzione precisa. Le nostre taniche non sono semplici recipienti, ma soluzioni tecniche avanzate, ottimizzate per l’industria.

IL CORE BUSINESS CHE VA OLTRE IL PACKAGING
La stessa conoscenza che ci permette di realizzare contenitori di alta qualità ci consente di progettare e produrre, canali di alimentazione per elettrodomestici, moduli galleggianti, cabinati tecnici e molte altre soluzioni, customizzate, per ogni esigenza tecnica compatibile con il soffiaggio di materie plastiche.

IL CONCETTO DI SOLUZIONE
Ogni applicazione è una sfida: una tanica dev’essere robusta, ma maneggevole; un modulo galleggiante dev’essere leggero da installare, ma stabile e sicuro sull’acqua; un componente di un elettrodomestico deve mantenere la sua forma e funzione per anni. Trovare la giusta soluzione significa conoscere la plastica in ogni sua sfumatura.

Yılların getirdiği tecrübemiz ve geniş ürün yelpazemiz ile farklı sektörlerin taleplerine hızlı, güvenilir ve uygun fiyatlı çözümler sunmayı hedefliyoruz.

Ürünlerimiz arasında çeşitli boyut ve formlarda kauçuk contalar, flanş contaları, o-ringler, sızdırmazlık çözümleri ve özel üretim conta seçenekleri yer almaktadır. Hem küçük ölçekli işletmeler hem de büyük sanayi projeleri için mükemmel uyum sağlayan ürünlerimiz, uzun ömürlü ve yüksek performanslıdır.

Neden Conta Marketi?

Geniş Ürün Yelpazesi: Her türlü endüstriyel ihtiyaca uygun, farklı boyutlarda ve malzemelerde conta seçenekleri.
Özel Sipariş İmkanı: Müşterilerimizin özel proje ihtiyaçlarına göre tasarlanmış ve üretilmiş conta çözümleri.
Hızlı Teslimat: Stoktan hızlı sevkiyat ile projelerinize zamanında destek.
Uzman Destek: Ürün seçiminde ve projelerinizde ihtiyaç duyduğunuz teknik desteği sağlıyoruz.
Sızdırmazlık ve güvenilirlik en önemli önceliklerimizdir. Kaliteli malzeme kullanımı, hassas üretim süreçlerimiz ve müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışımızla, conta ve sızdırmazlık çözümlerinde sektörün öncüsü olmayı hedefliyoruz.

Projelerinize değer katacak çözümlerimiz hakkında daha fazla bilgi almak için bizi ziyaret edin ve geniş ürün kataloğumuzu keşfedin. 

Contamarketi.com olarak, size en uygun çözümleri sunmak için buradayız!

Name: POLYASTRA
Description:
Polyastra LLP | Precision-Engineered Plastics for the Future of Self-Service
Where high-stakes engineering meets flawless execution.
In the world of self-service kiosks and biometric security, a fraction of a millimeter is the difference between a successful transaction and a field failure. At Polyastra LLP, we don’t just manufacture plastic parts; we engineer the critical interfaces that define the modern user experience.
The "Vetted" Standard We are proud to be a Tier-1 component partner for global leaders like Embross Systems, providing mission-critical hardware for CLEAR kiosks. When the world’s most recognized biometric platforms require durability, precision, and aesthetic excellence in high-traffic aviation environments, they turn to Polyastra.
Our Core Competencies We specialize in the complex, "difficult-to-mold" components that house the brains of a kiosk:
•Biometric Camera Cones: Engineered for zero light-bleed to ensure 100% sensor accuracy.
•High-Diffusion Light Guides: Achieving perfect luminosity and status-signaling clarity.
•Structural Shrouds & Enclosures: Combining industrial-grade durability with a premium finish.
•Passport Reader Brackets: Precision-molded for secure, ruggedized document scanning.
The Polyastra Edge: Moldflow-First Engineering We eliminate "trial and error" from the supply chain. By utilizing advanced Moldflow Analysis, we identify potential warpage, sink marks, and weld lines before a single tool is cut. This proactive approach ensures:
•Reduced Speed-to-Market: Getting your kiosk from CAD to the terminal faster.
•Cost Mitigation: Significant savings on re-tooling and engineering changes.
•Field Robustness: Parts designed to survive the "war zone" of public retail and airport environments.
Let’s Build the 2026 Enclosure Together. www.polyastra.com

Name: IŞIN BORU
Description: EMS Onatça Plastik Sanayi, 1990’lı yıllarda üretim faaliyetlerine başlayan EMS Onatça Plastik Sanayi, 2005 yılından bu yana Adana’da yer alan, 120.000 m² kapalı alana sahip modern tesislerinde üretim faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir. Kurulduğu günden itibaren gelişen teknolojiyi yakından takip eden firma; güçlü makine parkı, alanında uzman teknik ekibi ve yüksek kaliteli hammaddeleriyle IŞIN THERM markası altında sektörde güvenilir bir konuma ulaşmıştır. IŞIN THERM ürün grupları, Polipropilen (PP-R), Polietilen (PE) ve PVC hammaddelerinden üretilmekte olup, ürün yelpazesi bakımından oldukça geniştir. Polipropilen grubu ürünler, müşteri taleplerine göre çeşitlendirilen renk seçenekleriyle beyaz, gri, siyah, yeşil ve mavi olmak üzere beş farklı renkte sunulmaktadır. IŞIN THERM boru ve ek parçaları; soğuk ve sıcak su tesisatlarında, içme suyu şebekelerinde, endüstriyel tesislerde, gaz taşımacılığında, tarım ve kimya sektörlerinde, altyapı sistemlerinde güvenle kullanılmaktadır. Ürünler, yüksek basınç altında uzun ömürlü ve güvenilir performans sunacak şekilde tasarlanmıştır. 20°C’de 20 atü, 65°C’de 10 atü işletme basıncında güvenle çalışabilen sistemler, 95°C’ye kadar sıcaklıklara dayanıklıdır. Üretimlerimiz TSE, DIN ve EN standartlarına uygun olarak gerçekleştirilmekte, kalite süreçleri uluslararası gereklilikler doğrultusunda titizlikle yürütülmektedir. Sürekli yenilenen makine parkı ve otomasyon sistemleriyle üretim hızını her geçen gün arttırarak sektörün önde gelen üreticileri arasında yer almaktadır. EMS Onatça Plastik Sanayi, müşteri taleplerine hızlı ve esnek çözümler sunabilmek için geniş hammadde stoğuna sahiptir. Üretilen boru ve ek parçalar; kalite kontrol süreçlerinde boy, uzama, kırılma ve basınç testlerinden geçirilmekte, her ürün yüksek kalite standartlarındadır.Yurt içi ve yurt dışı pazarlarda kazandığı güvenin sorumluluğuyla EMS Plastik; kalite politikasını sürekli geliştirerek, üretim ve hizmet anlayışını her geçen gün ileriye taşımaya devam etmektedir.

Name: Net Floor Coverings
Description:
Net Floor Coverings is a manufacturer of thermoplastic-based heterogeneous floor coverings for commercial use.
• Established in 1992 with 100% Turkish capital.
• A boutique flexible flooring manufacturer that mainly offers flooring solutions for different business areas, primarily the construction,
hardware, automotive and cabin manufacturing sectors.
• Has a final product capacity of 4,000,000 m2/year.
• Specialized in PVC-based commercial floor coverings.
• Has experience and knowledge in the field of calendering PVC and non-PVC thermoplastic based sheets.
• Tends to have visual, dimensional and functional diversity in all product groups.
• Takes valid national and international norms as basis for its production processes and products.
• Exports to Middle East, Balkans, the Caucasus, Central Asia, Africa, and Europe.
• Has the ability to design and manufacture products beyond standard products for its customers.
• Produces 100% recyclable products.
Production:
We manufacture long-lasting products using 100% suspension PVC with high mechanical strength in our products. We produce with extrusion
technology based on the use of high pressure and heat, which allows us to shape the chemical properties of PVC at the highest level. With the calendering technology we use in our production, we process the physical properties of PVC in the most flexible way and we can manufacture T-Group
flexible floor coverings.
Customer Profile:
Our commercial floor coverings are used and marketed in many commercial areas by both industrial companies and merchant companies. Construction, automotive, container, prefabricated building, elevator, raised auto flooring and hardware sectors are among our main customers in our
flooring business. Our markets are used in the countries of the Caucasus, Eastern and Central Europe, Central Asia, the Middle East, and North and
Central Africa.

Name: AGRISELLO SAS
Description: L’Agrisello nasce per volontà del nonno Enrico col nome di S.A.G.A., Stampaggio Articoli tecnici Gomma e Affini all’inizio degli anni ’50. All’inizio degli anni ’60, il nonno condivide l’azienda col figlio Franco che aggiunge alla scuola di perito meccanico anche quella di perito chimico ed infatti all’Agrisello viene inserito un reparto di produzione delle mescole per poter offrire un servizio completo: progettazione, costruzione stampi, compoundazione mescole, stampaggio. Nei decenni ’70 ed ’80 le richieste delle aziende automobilistiche spingono Agrisello ad organizzare un laboratorio controllo mescole per poter garantire la formulazione di mescole a capitolato, una crescita importante per l'azienda. Gli anni ’90 vengono ulteriormente consolidati prima con l’ingresso del figlio Fabio, ragioniere, a cui fu devoluta la gestione amministrativa dell’azienda poi con l’ingresso di Stefano che aveva appena ultimato gli studi di Ingegneria Meccanica ed al quale viene affidata la conduzione della parte produttiva. L’alternarsi di momenti positivi e negativi nel mercato mondiale ma soprattutto il grande sviluppo urbanistico degli ultimi decenni hanno racchiuso l’Agrisello in un contesto poco adatto all’industria. Verso la metà degli anni ’00, a Stefano viene affidata la conduzione dell’Agrisello che sposta l’attività in un’area industriale adeguatamente organizzata come quella di Muggiò. Assimilato il background di grande spessore Stefano porta l’Agrisello verso una sempre più spinta specializzazione sia intermini di materiali dalle prestazioni sempre più elevato sia in termini di tecniche di stampaggio sempre più avanzate. Questa strada porta a riconoscimenti sia nazionali che internazionali come il premio Berchart, il premio Eccellenza Lombarda e la Certificazione di qualità Vision.
