Name: Tecnosystem Srl
Description:
Presente sul mercato nazionale e internazionale da oltre 30 anni, Tecnosystem produce direttamente minuterie plastiche su misura per esigenze di qualunque settore, fornendo un "servizio chiavi in mano" che inizia con la progettazione e termina con la consegna del prodotto finito e collaudato.

Il nostro stabilimento è dislocato su una superficie complessiva di 2000 mq e consta di un reparto stampaggio completamente automatizzato mediante 15 presse Aurburg, un ampio e curato deposito interno per gli stampi che curiamo come se fossero i nostri, e un magazzino articolato ed organizzato per la gestione dei materiali da lavorare. 
L'esperienza derivante dal decennale rapporto con fornitori qualificati ci consente di stampare qualsiasi minuteria in plastiche quali:

poliammidi (PA), PET, polipropilene (PP), polietilene (PE), resine acetaliche (POM), polistirolo (PS), metilmetacrilato (PMMA), poliuretani-elastomeri (PTU), policarbonato (PC), polisulfone (PSU), polifenilossido (PPO), polibutilentereftalato (PBT), ABS, etc etc.

Tutti i materiali utilizzati sono di prima scelta e con richiesta di certificazione.

Tecnosystem è certificata ISO 9001:2015

Name: yellu!

Name: Encablist

For example, you can keep ropes, strings and all your household appliances organized, as well as lamps, stereo, computer, server, printers, TV, earphones and battery charger.

Tangled cables can become a real pain. Everyone has dealt with tangled cables before, whether in a personal or professional environment. Cable organizers available on the market today seem to only offer permanent solutions, such as hiding cables or permanently fixing them to a surface.

Encablist takes a more practical and versatile approach to cable management.

Encablist is protected by industrial design model and by an international patent in most countries.

Encablist is a registered trademark.

Name: Bright Rubber

Unmatched Expertise: Our team of experienced engineers possesses deep knowledge in rubber technology, ensuring that every component we produce meets the exacting demands of your applications.

Quality Excellence: We are committed to unwavering quality standards, employing stringent manufacturing processes and rigorous quality control measures to deliver products that exceed expectations.

Tailored Solutions: We understand that each application has unique requirements. We work closely with our customers to design and manufacture custom rubber components that perfectly match their specific needs.

Industrial Rubber Parts: We manufacture a wide range of industrial rubber components, including gaskets, seals, grommets, bushings, and hoses, tailored to meet the specific requirements of your machinery and equipment.

#BrightRubber #IndustrialRubberParts #HydraulicSeals #PneumaticSeals #RubberSolutions

Name: The Sustainable People GmbH
Description:
About us

The Sustainable People is a German manufacturer of eco-friendly designed innovative everyday products in the areas of pet supplies, garbage disposal and packaging. Together with our customers, we help to reduce the environmental impact of plastic.

Our core range includes dog waste bags and garbage bags made of different materials and in different sizes. We also offer suitable accessories. In the B2B sector, our portfolio is rounded off by individual solutions such as mailing bags, which we can offer "tailor-made" according to customer requirements.

In order to keep the environmental impact of plastic as low as possible, we pursue the following approach: the materials used are made of biodegradable / bio-based or recycled / recyclable plastic in order to save resources and protect the environment.

Our history

In 2013, while jogging around Hamburg's parks and canals as a student, our founder Arne noticed almost 100 dog waste bags lying by the wayside over a distance of about 5 km. Shocked by the sheer number of plastic bags, the desire arose to solve this problem and reduce the negative impact of plastic on the environment. In the same year, Arne developed biodegradable dog waste bags for urban use together with a Swiss company. This makes him one of the pioneers in this field worldwide.

The Sustainable People GmbH was founded in 2016. Since then, our young company has developed rapidly. With our biodegradable dog waste bags, we are now the market leader in the German urban market (as of April 2023). In addition, many of our B2C products are already available in hundreds of shops (stationary / online) and delight our customers. Whether municipalities, companies or consumers: we offer suitable solutions for various areas of everyday use to reduce the environmental impact of plastic.

During the last 50 years, RECAR has been improving and growing. Its 10 high-capacity extrusion lines allow it to manufacture and serve large quantities of product in a short time.

The activity of the company, plastic extrusion, is aimed mainly at the production of specific PVC-HDPE profiles for greenhouse structures, always starting from virgin raw material (WITHOUT USING RECYCLED MATERIAL in any of its production lines). This quality requirement prolongs the useful life of its profiles by between 2 and 5 years more compared to the competition (depending on the intensity of local solar radiation), providing the end user with a lower maintenance cost and therefore enabling more profitability of the greenhouse facility.

L'azienda è specializzata in esecuzioni su disegno del cliente e seleziona le migliori materie prime per garantire risultati eccellenti su ogni articolo tecnico.

L'azienda ha sede a Parma, e opera su tutto il territorio nazionale diventando un importante punto di riferimento e partner esperto e specializzato nello stampaggio di articoli tecnici in Vulkollan, Silicone, Viton, EPDM, Neoprene, gomma naturale e molto altro, con esecuzioni specifiche su disegno, rivestimenti di ruote e rulli, trafilati ed estrusi, guarnizioni speciali, cingoli, raschiaolio, antivibranti e silent block.

Il parco macchine dell'azienda si costituisce delle più avanzate tecnologie del settore e il processo produttivo si svolge all'interno di un sistema di qualità certificata (UNI EN ISO 9001:2008).

Lineagomma impiega per la propria produzione gomma antiusura 100% naturale: una soluzione innovativa che possiede un'incredibile resistenza all'abrasione, grande flessibilità e un elevato coefficiente di attrito.

La realizzazione avviene attraverso il processo di vulcanizzazione a caldo su piastre in acciaio a caldo oppure a freddo. Lineagomma utilizza il 100% di energia pulita prodotta da fonti rinnovabili: questo non significa solo una produttività a impatto zero sull’ambiente, e a costi molto inferiori rispetto alla media, ma anche un’attenzione maggiore verso gli articoli prodotti e verso il processo di lavorazione, che viene controllato in modo da ridurre gli sprechi e massimizzare la resa produttiva.

Abbattiamo i costi, non la qualità. Il prodotto viene seguito in ogni sua fase di lavorazione da un attento controllo di qualità eseguito da tecnici specializzati offrendo un prodotto affidabile, sicuro e duraturo.

Our talented team of experts has over 30 years experience, researching and developing functional polymer materials and Materchem has gained government recognition as a Hi-tech enterprise and Polymer Processing Technology Center. As further evidence of our commitment we run a post-doctoral center and have already obtained 40 invention patents.

In line with our goal to become a recognized global player and to assure the reliability and stability of our products, we also invest heavily in new technology and employee training, all supported with the best quality and management systems. This includes certification to ISO 9001, ISO14001 and ISO/TS16949 standards, REACH, ROHS and Europe - REACH registered.

We would thank our existing customers for their support. We are looking forward to working with them and new customers, developing new and innovative products and creating value in the global polymer market.

At Inpress Technologies Inc., we turn sustainable innovation into real-world performance. We partner with manufacturers and distributors around the world to produce injection-molded components that combine durability, circularity, and modern engineering. Our focus is to accelerate global adoption of crumb-rubber composite solutions across key markets including retail, commercial, industrial, and agriculture. Together, we’re building a more circular economy and proving that recycled materials can outperform expectations.

- Segurança em Primeiro Lugar: Previne aberturas e fechamentos bruscos, quedas de objetos e oferece mais segurança para seus pets.

A família KLYPO já conta com o KLYPO e o KLYPO MAX, ambos produzidos em plástico ABS de alta qualidade. E prepare-se para a novidade: em breve, a HASTE KLYPO, feita de metal, com instalação prática e rápida e o melhor, com regulagem de abertura personalizada!

Quer mais tranquilidade e segurança para o seu lar?

Name: Özbil Elektrik Malzemeleri Otomotiv ve Pvc San. ve Tic. A.Ş.
Description:
ÖZBİL A.Ş olarak Zengin bir geçmişe sahip olan şirketimiz ve mükemmeliyet için olan arzumuz ile tüm dünya geneline güvenilir bir şirket olarak kendimizi kanıtlarken, Türkiye'deki bütün sektörlerin hortum ihtiyaçlarını tek bir çatı altında karşılamaktan büyük gurur duyuyoruz. 
ÖZBİL A.Ş ,1959 yılından bu yana, Hepgülüm Grubu ile devam eden ticari hayatını 1991 yılında Kerem Hepgülüm ortaklığıyla Özbil A.Ş adı altında yeni bir yapılanma dönemine girmiştir.  Bu yeni yapılanma ile beraber güçlü bir itibar oluşturmuş ve aynı zamanda uluslararası bilinirliği yüksek markaları da bünyesine eklemiştir. Uzman ekibi, çözüm odaklı ve vizyon sahibi kurumsal politikaları rehberliğinde, müşteri beklentilerini eksiksiz bir şekilde yerine getirmek için sürekli olarak çalışmakta, güçlü stoğu ve geniş ürün yelpazesi ile müşterilerinin tüm taleplerini hızlıca karşılamaktadır.
ÖZBİL A.Ş çeşitli sektörlerde faaliyet gösteren işletmelerin farklı ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak üzere tasarlanmış kapsamlı Üretim ve Tesisat hizmetleri sunmaktadır. Hortum imalatından, estalasyon hizmetine kadar, müşterilerilerinin büyümesini sağlayan, verimliliği artıran ve somut sonuçlar sunan yenilikçi çözümler sağlamaktadır. Sektördeki lider konumunu korumanın yanı sıra sürekli büyümeyi ve gelişmeyi hedeflemektedir. Teknolojik yenilikleri yakından takip ederek ürün ve hizmet yelpazemizi genişletmeyi, uluslararası pazarlarda daha geniş bir etki yaratmayı amaçlamaktadır. Bu vizyonla, her geçen gün daha da büyüyen ve güçlenen bir şirket olma yolunda ilerlemektedir.
ÖZBİL AŞ’ye gösterdiğiniz ilgi için teşekkür ederiz. Web sitemizi keşfetmeniz, sunduğumuz hizmetler ve kataloglarımız hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinmeniz için sizi davet ediyoruz. Sizinle çalışmak ve her çeşit hortum ihtiyaçlarınızı karşılamak için buradayız.

Name: LEBO PRODUCTION AB
Description:
LEBO Production AB is a Swedish company that was founded by the current owner in 2003. LEBO is a company which fundamentals are in manufacturing, processing and trading within the industrial rubber & industrial silicone segment.  

LEBO specializes in customer-specific products, developed for areas of use that place high demands on quality and safety, within the healthcare, pharmaceutical, automotive, food, manufacturing and cleaning industries.  

Our Head office with production, sales, test center and development departments are located in the Stockholm area and from our warehouse in the USA we can provide fast deliveries and short lead times worldwide. 

Since 2014, LEBO owns the exclusive rights to the materials, Polyrade and Nanorade, with a unique composition. Nanorade and Polyrade have been developed through years of testing together with chemists, for the best possible water pick-up with reduced energy consumption, specifically for squeegees to be used with scrubber dryers. The company also has a well-developed technique for serial production of squeegees.  

LEBO also represents Rogers Corporation as "Preferred Converter" with processing and sales of their unique products such as the registered brands Poron and Bisco. 

Our vision is, as a strategic supplier and partner, to provide technical solutions, products and services to each individual customer that best solves the customer's needs and possibilities and ensures a long-term and mutual relationships. 

We are certified according to ISO 9001:2015.

Name: Axiom Medical, Inc. (Axiom USA)
Description:
Axiom Medical, an all-American WOSB, was the first medical manufacturer to recognize the inherent problems associated with existing wound drainage technology. Prior to 1976, all wound drains were made of PVC, which is known for its danger of leeching plasticisers into the body and its hardness and tendency to cause whipping inside the patient. With the introduction of Axiom silicone wound drains, post-operative wound care became easier for both the patient and the surgeon.

Initially pursuing the cardiovascular market, Axiom broadened its product line to include all varieties of drains suitable to this specialty area. It offered the first configuration of flat drains available for use adjacent to the heart.

In 1983, the plastic surgery and pediatric markets were targeted with the addition of closed wound drains and silicone petite wound drains. Axiom offers the most extensive line of drainage products, including patented designs, available for this specialty area.

Axiom went on to introduce ClotStop coating as an industry exclusive. ClotStop coating is held as an exclusive worldwide, placing Axiom in a state-of-the-art position within the industry.

A majority of Axiom's products are conceptualized by surgeons with market tests being carried out by Axiom's consulting physicians.

Along with the manufacturing and distributing of silicone extruded wound drains, Axiom Medical has created a new division, AXIOM USA, producing non-medical silicone extrusions and custom moldings for laboratory, pharmaceutical, OEM, food industry, marine, military, and government. All provided with the same superior medical quality.

Name: Elbi Plastik
Description:
ELBİ olarak, 2020 yılının ilk çeyreğinde yapmış olduğumuz yatırımlarımızı 30 yıllık sanayicilik deneyimimizle harmanlayarak yenilikçi bakış açımız ve deneyimli uzman kadromuz ile %100 yerli ve millî sermayemizin vermiş olduğu gurur ile sizlere hizmet vermekteyiz. 
 
Ham maddeden üretime üretimden satışa kadar olan süreçte ELBİ olarak her zaman çözüm ortaklığı için yanınızdayız. 
 
Daima yaratıcı ve yenilikçi bir kimliğe sahip olan ELBİ yüksek kalite üretim hatları ile 20.000 ㎡ kapalı toplamda 25.000 ㎡ tesisimizde üretim yapmaktayız. 
 
Amaç: müşterilerin isteklerini anlamak onlara kaliteli ve zamanında ürün sunmaktır. Çevre dostu ürünümüz ile tavuk ve kanatlı sektöründe uyacak şekilde sürekli genişleyen ürün yelpazesi ile değerli müşterilerimizin ihtiyacını karşılamak için yenilikçi ve kaliteli ürünlere odaklanmaktır.
 
Müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman önceliğimiz olarak görmekteyiz ve dünya çapında müşterilerimize yüksek kaliteli ürünler sunarak onların başarısına katkıda bulunmayı amaçlamaktayız. Elbi olarak, sektördeki liderliğimizi sürdürmeye ve müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmaya devam etmekteyiz.

Name: GULSINE
Description:

Manufacturers can reduce approval timelines by up to two years, extend validated shelf life, and respond to regulatory questions with clarity and confidence.

The GULSINE platform supports products containing plastic and multi-material components, helping R&D, quality, and regulatory teams streamline validation while reducing experimental burden and cost.

Sustainability is built into our approach. By enabling accurate lifetime definition and reuse of high-value devices, GULSINE helps extend product life, reduce waste, and significantly lower carbon footprint across global healthcare supply chains.

In 2023, Gulsine Ltd supported medical and biopharma innovators worldwide — delivering regulator-ready science, accelerated development timelines, and lab-based stability services for critical products including pacemakers, vascular grafts, biopharmaceutical bags, and medical packaging.

Name: A.T.E. s.r.l.
Description:
Since 1982, A.T.E. s.r.l. has been a trusted partner in the design and production of high-quality plastic components through blow moulding technology. With more than 40 years of experience, we combine Italian know-how, innovation and flexibility to deliver tailored plastic solutions for a wide range of industries, from household appliances and heating systems to automotive, furniture and beyond.

Our expertise lies in extrusion blow moulding, injection moulding, over-injection, welding, finishing, assembly and dimensional testing. By managing the full production cycle – from prototyping and tooling to large-scale series production – we ensure consistent quality, efficiency and reliability. Thanks to advanced automation, robotics and in-line testing, every component meets the highest technical standards and customer requirements.

Materials processed include HDPE, LDPE, PP, PA, ABS, TPU, TPE and other thermoplastics, allowing us to provide solutions tailored to the specific needs of each sector. Production volumes range from pilot lots and pre-series to millions of parts per year, ensuring both agility and scalability.

We operate with a strong commitment to quality and sustainability, certified by ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2015. Description:

Headquartered in Zibo, Shandong, with production bases in Shanghai, Anhui, Jiangsu, Malaysia, and Vietnam. Stock Symbol 688087.

As an environmentally responsible company, INTCO has the annual capacity to recycle 100,000 tons of EPS foam, and 50,000 tons of PET bottles to food-grade PET plastics, saving 450,000 tons of crude oil, sparing 2 million trees and reducing 300,000 tons of carbon emissions per year. At the present, INTCO has eliminated 2.5 million tons of global carbon emissions, reduced 3.75 million tons of crude oil expenditure, and saved 25 million trees!

In the future, INTCO will take advantage of its full supply chain integration in plastic recycling to expand its r-PS pellets to 300,000 tons per year, and r-PET pellets to 1 million tons per year. It will also enlarge its "plastic family" by expanding its business horizontally to PE, PP, and HDPE. Driven by proactive innovation, INTCO will continue its advancement of plastic recycling technologies to become a global leader in resource recycling, and contribute to sustainable development in the new global carbon economy!

INTCO Recycling, Renewing the World.

Name: GULSINE
Description:
GULSINE: Redefining Product Lifespan for a Sustainable Future

GULSINE offers a groundbreaking digital platform that accurately defines and predicts the lifespan of products across the healthcare sector — from biotech and biopharma to medical devices and beyond.

Our proprietary algorithm accelerates time-to-market by up to two years, enabling extended shelf-life, streamlined validation, and more resilient global supply chains. The platform is designed to work with any product that includes plastic or multi-material components, helping teams validate faster while saving critical resources.

At our core, we champion sustainability. GULSINE empowers the re-use of high-value devices, ensuring longer product life, less waste, and a significantly reduced carbon footprint.

In 2023, Gulsine Ltd proudly supported medical and biopharma innovators by delivering validated science and accelerated progress. We also provide lab-based stability services for critical products — from pacemakers and vascular grafts to biopharmaceutical bags and medical packaging.

Interested in learning how much time and cost you can save?
Reach out for a free demo and see the GULSINE platform in action.

Name: Reiss Manufacturing, Inc.
Description:
Reiss Manufacturing, Inc., founded in 1896 and 4th-generation-family-owned, is a silicone rubber compounder and processor. Also known as Ronsil, our silicone division was formed in 1946 and has been a pioneer since the silicone industry’s infancy. We are committed to manufacturing silicone rubber products with exceptional quality, backed by unparalleled customer service. 
Our core competencies include formulating, mixing and milling, extruding, calendering, molding and fabricating. We pride ourselves on leveraging our 125+ years of manufacturing experience and our highly-skilled workforce to deliver silicone, fluorosilicone, EPDM, Nitrile, Viton and other elastomeric products that meet the highest standards of excellence and reliability.

We work closely with our customers to understand your unique design and performance challenges, allowing us to offer cost-effective solutions. 

We are ISO certified, providing a full complement of testing and measurement equipment, including durometer gauges, and an optical comparator, rheometer, tensometer, as well as tools to test compression deflection and specific gravity.

Reiss Manufacturing works to foster long-term partnerships with our suppliers and customers and to meet the evolving demands of modern industry. Connect with us to explore how our silicone expertise can contribute to your success.

Name: EB PLAST S.R.L.
Description:
EB Plast è un punto di riferimento nello stampaggio a iniezione di materie plastiche, con oltre 30 anni di esperienza nella realizzazione di soluzioni tecniche su misura per il settore industriale.

Fondata nel 1991, l’azienda adotta un approccio integrato che copre l’intero ciclo produttivo: dal co-design e prototipazione rapida, alla costruzione di stampi, fino allo stampaggio, all’assemblaggio e alla gestione logistica del prodotto finito.

L’organizzazione è articolata in tre divisioni specializzate:

- EB Plast: stampaggio a iniezione con un parco macchine tecnologicamente avanzato.
- EB Mould: progettazione, costruzione e manutenzione stampi.
- EB Lab: prototipazione rapida tramite tecnologie di stampa 3D.

Affidabilità, innovazione e controllo di ogni fase del processo produttivo rappresentano i nostri principali punti di forza, insieme a un impegno concreto verso la sostenibilità ambientale: utilizziamo energia da fonti rinnovabili grazie a un impianto fotovoltaico, promuoviamo l’impiego di materiali riciclati e adottiamo pratiche di gestione responsabile dei rifiuti.

EB Plast è il partner ideale per trasformare un’idea in un prodotto industriale finito, garantendo qualità, efficienza e supporto tecnico continuo.

Nuestros asesores están comprometidos en entender sus necesidades únicas y traducirlas en envases que no solo sean llamativos, sino que también sean altamente funcionales y cautivadores.

Más de 30 años de experiencia

Actualmente, atendemos a industrias farmacéuticas, cosméticas, alimenticias, agroindustriales y promocionales, brindando soluciones que contribuyen a la calidad de los productos de nuestros clientes.

La calidad de su producto comienza aquí

Name: Kunststofftechnik Schnitzler GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Unser Unternehmen ist ein führender Hersteller von Hochpräzisionskunststoffteilen in Multikavitätenwerkzeugen, spezialisiert auf die Elektrotechnik, Automobil- und Medizintechnikbranche. 

Wir bieten eine Vielzahl von Dienstleistungen, darunter Insert Molding, integrierte Montage und Baugruppenmontage sowie Mehrkomponentenspritzguss und Mikrospritzguss. Unser hoher Automatisierungsgrad, unterstützt durch eine eigene Automatisierungsabteilung, gewährleistet Effizienz und Konsistenz in der Fertigung.

Unsere Kunden profitieren von individueller Projektbetreuung und Beratung, einschließlich Prototypenbau und rheologischer Berechnungen zur optimalen Auslegung von Teilen und Werkzeugen. Wir sind stolz darauf, Fertigung mit Flowbox Equipment anzubieten, um höchste Präzision sicherzustellen.

Zu unseren Kernkompetenzen gehören Mehrkomponentenspritzguss, Spritzguss, Mikrospritzguss, und vollautomatisches Insert-Molding. Darüber hinaus bieten wir mehrfarbige Inline-Bedruckung von Kunststoffteilen im Tamponprintverfahren und baugruppenspezifische Montage an.

Unsere Zertifizierungen nach 🅳🅸🅽 EN ISO 9001, 🅳🅸🅽  EN ISO 50001 und 🅳🅸🅽 EN ISO 13485 für Medizinprodukte belegen unsere Verpflichtung zur Qualität und Effizienz. Mit 40 Spritzgussmaschinen der renommierten Fabrikate Arburg, Ferromatic und Demag, Schließkräften von 40 bis 275 Tonnen und der Verarbeitung einer Vielzahl von Thermoplasten, bieten wir flexible Lösungen für verschiedenste Anforderungen.

Unsere Kapazität erstreckt sich von Schussgewichten kleiner als 0,1 Gramm bis zu 800 Gramm, und wir verarbeiten eine Vielzahl von Materialien, darunter PET, PA, PA6, PA66, POM, PC, ABS, PBT, PEEK, PPS, PPO, LCP, TPE, COC und verschiedene Blends.

Sie benötigen hochpräzise Kunststoffteile?
  
Entdecken Sie bei unsere zertifizierte  Qualität,  maßgeschneiderte Lösungen und  zuverlässigen Service alles rund im Bereich Kunststoff.

One of the key elements that has always ensured the peak performance of battery is quality of its parts and the Battery Vent Cap has always been a critical determining factor. Until the early 90’s, the battery vent cap industry was made of small enterprises which were unable to provide the consistent quality that would make it match global standards vent cap performance.  
It was the vision of the Founder Shri Shyam Sunder Jaiswal that established SMJ Venture as a company engaged in Hard Rubber Cell covers. From a humble beginning in 1994, his vision has steered the company to its present leadership standing in the segment. His learned understanding of the market helped the company branch out into Battery Vent Caps which provided a giant leap for the brand name to become a trusted associate to many of the country’s top Battery Brands. Armed with a success story Shri Jaiswal and his two able sons Rohan Jaiswal and Assini Jaiswal powered the company by adding new products to help achieve newer milestones. Manufacture of Dies and Molds for plastic Injection molding of Caps & Closures, Writing Instruments, Electric Goods, Home Appliances and Precision Components. Further the company launched Renewed- Micro Laser Welding services, specifically for Tools and Dies repair and then into CNC Wire Cut Services, Laser Engraving services, Precision Components and VMC Machining services.
What started out as a humble venture in 1994 is today a company manufacturing more than 12 million Battery Vent Caps a year and growing. OEM supplier to most of the battery manufacturing companies in India and abroad.

Our group is equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and employs a variety of techniques, including polymer physics, chemistry, materials science, and engineering to achieve our goals. Name: SMG Machines (Formerly Manjeet Kneader)
Description:
Manjeet Singh, the founder of SMG Machines, has for long spearheaded design, innovation, and change in the rubber and plastic industry. Prior to establishing SMG Machines (then Manjeet Industries), he was one of the founders of Manjeet Plastics, a leading manufacturer and supplier of rubber footwear since 1960.

In 1984, he imported a dispersion kneader machine from Taiwan to expand his footwear business. He felt fascinated by its wide-ranging utility, and decided to use his technical acumen to build the country’s first variant of the same machine. He began R&D in 1985 and demonstrated success in 1986, when he engineered India’s first dispersion kneader, thereby revolutionizing the rubber and plastic industry.

In 2008, Manjeet Singh was joined by his son, Manvir Singh. Together, they have ensured that SMG Machines continues to exhibit a steadfast commitment to innovation, precision, and quality.

Vinylgulve designet efter dit ønske.

Kedelige gulve vækkes til live, og giver visuelle indtryk der er medvirkende til at øge kundernes oplevelser. Og dermed sikre større salg. Det kan være totalindretning af hele lokalet. Hvor kunden “guides” gennem hele salgsområder. Eller det kan være mindre zoner hvor der ønskes fokus på specifikke kampagner, og hvor gulvet blot rulles sammen igen efter kampagnen og genbruges til senere brug.

Det der før var umuligt er nu muligt med Fotogulve´s Vinylgulve.

Name: Alpin Rubber And Plastic Technologies
Description:
Alpin’s History

Alpin Rubber and Plastic Technology. is a recognized industry leader in the production and manufacturing of rubber and plastic products. Founded in 2015, the company began as a small-scale business with the vision of providing high-quality rubber and plastic solutions to meet growing industrial demands.

In its early years, Alpin Rubber and Plastic Technology focused on supplying basic rubber components such as gaskets and felts to local manufacturers. However, with its commitment to innovation and customer-focused approach, the company quickly expanded its product range and diversified its customer base.

In 2016, Alpin Rubber and Plastic Technology made major investments in research and development, paving the way for groundbreaking developments in rubber and plastic technologies. This has resulted in specialized products that appeal to a variety of sectors, including the automotive, defense, construction and medical sectors. The company’s commitment to quality and reliability quickly gained recognition and it began to form long-term partnerships with major companies.

Alpin Rubber and Plastic Technology took significant steps in sustainability and environmental responsibility in 2018. The company adopted environmentally friendly practices and began to incorporate recycled materials into its production processes. This commitment to sustainability has not only reduced waste, but has also enhanced the company’s reputation as an environmentally conscious industry player.

In early 2020, Alpin Rubber and Plastic Technologies solidified its position as a global player in the rubber and plastics industry. It expanded its operations by establishing state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities in key regions around the world. This strategic expansion has allowed the company to better serve its international customer base and meet diverse market needs.

Name: ROTOSPACE – Rotomoulding Innovation & Production Solutions
Description:
ROTOSPACE is a trusted B2B partner specialising in the production of plastic components using rotational moulding technology. With over 20 years of experience, we deliver the most demanding and innovative projects across diverse sectors including automotive, industrial, medical, agricultural, and even aerospace.

What sets us apart is our proprietary RotoMoulding 2.0 philosophy – a unique set of rigorous standards and procedures that ensure exceptional precision, durability, and outstanding quality in every product we deliver. We thrive on tackling ambitious projects that others might consider too challenging.

We offer comprehensive support at every stage – from technical consulting and design, through prototyping, to full-scale production and reliable on-time delivery. Our dedicated specialists work closely with clients to optimise costs and product functionality, boosting efficiency and competitiveness. Plus, we implement CarbonFootprint Control standards to minimise the environmental impact of our production processes.

Based in Międzyrzecz, at the heart of the rotational moulding industry, ROTOSPACE is a dependable partner across Poland and Europe, committed to quality, innovation, and a personalised approach.

Choose ROTOSPACE and unlock innovation that pushes beyond industry boundaries.

"At Khushi and Tashi Enterprise, we pride ourselves on maintaining an extensive inventory of essential components for the plastic manufacturing industry. Our offerings include:

Conical Twin Screw Barrels: We provide bimetallic options, short, half, and full SKD variants to suit your unique requirements.

Gear Boxes: We offer high-quality gearboxes designed to enhance the performance of your machinery.

Hydro motors: Our range of hydro motors is built to deliver reliable power and efficiency to your operations. We export to the USA, Europe, the Middle East, and South Africa. 

PVC Additives: Explore our selection of PVC additives, carefully curated to optimize your manufacturing processes.

Extruder Machines: We stock a variety of extruder machines in sizes such as 51/105, 55/110, 65/132, 80/156, and more, to accommodate a wide range of production needs.

We take pride in offering a diverse product range and a commitment to delivering quality-assured products at competitive rates.

We are your Partner in excellence.

Tais produtos se destacam em função de sua excelente qualidade, são resistentes, logo de alta durabilidade, e tem ótima aceitação no mercado por atender às necessidades do setor.

Dentre o mix de produtos da empresa, encontram-se diversos tipos de desempenadeiras, martelos, bebedouros e comedouros para frango, bicos e mamadeiras para bezerro.

Pesquisa realizada junto ao comércio varejista e em agropecuárias, demonstrou que algumas características devem ser observadas nestes produtos, dentre elas estão a densidade das espumas, o descolamento dos cabos e o empenamento das desempenadeiras, além da qualidade da matéria prima utilizada nos bebedouros, comedouros e mamadeiras. Atenta às necessidades acima, a BEMAC coloca a disposição de seus clientes produtos diferenciados!!!

Continuamos a disponibilizar serviços de sopro e injeção em projetos e serviços terceirizados.

Name: Styropol
Description:
Styropol – termoizolacja, która pracuje na Twój wynik.
Jesteśmy po to, by Twój dom był ciepły zimą i przyjemnie chłodny latem., bo dobra izolacja to codzienny komfort i wymierne oszczędności.

Styropol to marka obecna na rynku od ponad 30 lat, od początku kojarzona z solidnością, jakością i technologiczną precyzją. Dziś kontynuujemy tę historię, łącząc doświadczenie naszych specjalistów z nowoczesnym podejściem do produkcji i zarządzania.

W 2022 roku wznowiliśmy produkcję, inwestując w zaawansowane laboratorium badawcze i nowoczesne linie technologiczne. Nasze materiały skutecznie ograniczają straty ciepła, pomagając tworzyć budynki energooszczędne, komfortowe i tańsze w utrzymaniu.

Działamy w 100% na energii odnawialnej i wdrażamy zasady gospodarki o obiegu zamkniętym. Gwarantujemy wysoką jakość, terminową realizację zamówień w modelu just in time i partnerskie podejście do współpracy.

Za naszą jakością stoją ludzie – wielu z nas budowało markę Styropol już w latach 90. i wciąż tworzy ją z tą samą pasją. Dziś łączymy ich doświadczenie z nową energią, by dostarczać inwestorom i wykonawcom izolację, która naprawdę robi różnicę.

Styropol – Twój ekspert w izolacji termicznej.

Name: CelloplastGD Srl flexible compounds TPE
Description:
CELLOPLAST GD è un’azienda italiana che da oltre 50 anni produce elastomeri termoplastici, ed è un punto di riferimento nel mercato di TPE, TPV, TPO, e Master Batch Espandenti, oltre ad essere tra i primi produttori europei di compound base sughero. Grazie alle sue 7 linee di produzione con una capacità produttiva di oltre 10.000t/y, un laboratorio attrezzato per il controllo qualità e per la ricerca e sviluppo di nuovi prodotti, CELLOPLAST GD è attenta alle necessità e alle richieste della propria clientela realizzando materiali personalizzati per ogni particolare esigenza. La pluriennale esperienza consente a Celloplast GD di dedicarsi alla progettazione dell’elastomero più adatto per ogni singola esigenza e a fornire soluzioni tecniche ottimali, specifiche per ogni singolo cliente. La manodopera qualificata, le più moderne tecnologie e i migliori sistemi operativi permettono di soddisfare le richieste della nostra clientela garantendo tempestività nelle risposte e qualità costante. Grazie a questa attitudine, Celloplast GD è diventata negli anni leader nella produzione di compound per il settore dei tappi sintetici, garantendo forniture per le più importanti aziende manifatturiere.

CELLOPLAST GD is an Italian company that has been producing thermoplastic elastomers for over 50 years as a point of reference in the market of TPE, TPV, TPO, and Master Batch Expanders, as well as being among the first European producers of cork-based compounds. Thanks to its 7 production lines with a production capacity of over 10,000t/y, a laboratory equipped for quality control and for the research and development of new products, CELLOPLAST GD is attentive to the needs and requests of the customers creating customized materials for every particular need. Many years of experience for Celloplast GD means the ability to design the most suitable elastomer for industrial needs to provide optimal customized technical solutions.

For over three decades, Vinayak Technoplast has been trusted by India’s most respected brands—including Maruti Suzuki, Hyundai, Tata Motors, MG Hector, Anand Group, RR Kabel, Polycab, OmegaStrap, and Merlin—as a technical authority in injection molding and precision tooling.

We specialize in solving the manufacturing challenges that slow Indian OEMs down: warpage, flashing, high rejection rates, premature mold failure, and inefficient cycle times. By combining engineering insight with advanced mold development, polymer science, and zero-defect processes, we help brands produce components that are consistent, reliable, and production-ready at scale.

Our mission is simple: To eliminate manufacturing inefficiencies for Indian OEMs by delivering high-precision molds and components that reduce cycle time and ensure zero defects

Our vision: shift India’s plastic industry from “cost-per-part” to “value-per-cycle.”

Through precision engineering, data-driven mold optimization, and a relentless focus on performance, we enable OEMs to launch faster, produce smarter, and operate with absolute manufacturing certainty.

Name: Super Industrial Dongguan Ltd/Super Industries LLC
Description:
At Super Industries LLC, our story begins on the water. For more than two decades, we have been designing and manufacturing inflatable water sports products that bring families, friends, and adventurers together. What started as a specialized OEM factory has grown into a trusted global supplier for outdoor retailers, sports brands, and waterparks.

We pride ourselves on combining craftsmanship and innovation. From high-performance towable tubes to heavy-duty river and waterpark inflatables, every product is built with advanced welding technology, durable materials, and thoughtful design. Alongside our OEM expertise, we have launched our own brand, WAVECRAFT TUBE – Built to Last. Better for the Planet, which focuses on performance, sustainability, and retail-ready packaging for the U.S. market.

In 2024, we established Super Industries LLC in the United States to bring our expertise closer to our partners. With localized support, faster logistics, and brand-building services, we now help clients with OEM manufacturing, private label products, and WAVECRAFT TUBE brand solutions, all designed to inspire more people to enjoy the water with safe, durable, and sustainable inflatables.

All'inizio degli anni 2000, Samec, crea il marchio FIXGUM riconfermandosi così nel mondo degli espansi con l'introduzione, nel corso del tempo, di macchinari sempre più all'avanguardia nella lavorazione di quest'ultimi. Name: Malpani Pipes And Fittings Limited
Description:
Malpani Pipes & Fittings Limited, an ISO 9001:2015 certified company based in Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh, manufactures a range of high-grade plastic pipes. Our products include High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) Pipes, Medium-Density Polyethylene (MDPE) Pipes, and Linear Low-Density Polyethylene (LLDPE) Pipes, all marketed under the brand name Volstar. Our manufacturing plant located in central India i.e. Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh, with an Annual Production capacity of 11,500 MTPA. Our plant is well equipped with essential machinery, infrastructure, and an in-house testing facility, which ensures that our product conforms to the requisite standards.


Malpani distributes its products to both wholesalers and retailers. Additionally, Malpani supplies pipes for government projects through authorised contractors involved in local, state, or federal development schemes. Malpani also supplies pipes to farmers under welfare policies launched by the Central or State Government. Malpani has a dedicated in-house testing facility to ensure its products adhere to stringent quality standards. Additionally, in the case of supply to any government project or under welfare policies for farmers, Malpani is required to have its products tested by third-party laboratories. These agencies include the Central Institute of Petrochemicals Engineering & Technology (CIPET), SGS, Bureau Veritas, Dr. Amin Controllers Pvt. Ltd., Rail India Technical and Economic Service, and Certification Engineers International Limited (CEIL). This verification process is a mandatory requirement set by the government.

Name: Plasticade Canada
Description:
Founded in 1954 as the American Louver Company, Plasticade is a family-owned, leading manufacturer and marketer of plastic and recycled rubber products.

We specialize in visibility products that increase safety for the public and workers in construction areas, including MASH-approved roadway work zone products; recycled rubber traffic and safety products; and innovative signage solutions for business advertising and promotion. We also manufacture and market HVAC products under the American Louver brand.

Traffic Safety
Plasticade is dedicated to providing traffic control devices that are designed to maximize safety and efficiency for construction personnel and to keeping drivers and pedestrians safe in construction zones. Our comprehensive line of barrels, barricades, and channelizers help regulate and direct traffic while buffering workers and improving construction visibility and mobility.

All products manufactured by Plasticade are thoroughly tested and developed to meet or exceed safety standards and are MASH approved. Made from high-durability plastic polymers, they can withstand repeated impacts from vehicles and exposure to the elements.

Our Mission
We make exceptional products that make a visible difference for those who rely on them and offer remarkable value for those who buy them. We lead our markets through innovation, smart design, manufacturing excellence and responsive service.

Rubber Products
An innovator in manufacturing using post-consumer recycled tire rubber, Plasticade Rubber offers a full line of high-quality molded-rubber safety products for traffic, construction, parking lot, industrial and airport applications. We also specialize in custom solutions for your needs. Plasticade Rubber products not only deliver performance and long life, but the recycled content also helps conserves energy and materials resources.

Name: Raghav Polymers Group

Raghav Polymers | Bhavya Polyfilms Pvt Ltd

As a responsible entity, we place a strong emphasis on environmental sustainability. Headquartered in Hyderabad, India, our global footprint extends through strategically located branch offices across the world, ensuring seamless operations and exceptional service to our clients worldwide.

Name: Compositive
Description:
Compositive jest liderem w produkcji nowoczesnych, ekologicznych i biodegradowalnych granulatów kompozytowych z domieszkami mączki drzewnej, łuski kawy, konopii, a także biodegradowalnej skrobi termoplastycznej.

Granulaty Compositive to przede wszystkim kompozyty szeroko modyfikowalne pod kątem osiągnięcia wysokiej wytrzymałości, które z powodzeniem mogą zastąpić popularny plastik.

Tworzone są według unikalnej i autorskiej technologii i przeznaczone są przede wszystkim do przetwarzania metodą wtrysku, wytłaczania, termoformowania lub rozdmuchu.

Do produkcji granulatów Compositive wykorzystujemy odpady powstałe z własnej produkcji mebli drewnianych, a także łuski palonej kawy czy konopie, po to, by w ramach filozofii zero waste odzyskiwać surowce i tym samym dać im drugie życie.

Produkty, które powstają z naszego granulatu są przyjazne środowisku, a przy tym cechują się wysoką wytrzymałością, odpornością na ścieranie, obciążenia, działanie wilgoci, butwienie, a także na promieniowanie UV.


Dlaczego warto wybrać granulaty Compositive?

•	produkcja granulatu Compositive to recykling surowców z innej działalności poprodukcyjnej 
•	granulat Compositive może być zastosowany do produkcji wszędzie tam, gdzie stosuje się inne tworzywa sztuczne np. plastik
•	podczas produkcji na bazie granulatów Compositive zmniejszamy koszty energii i tym samym emisję CO2 o ponad 40%, gdyż tworzywo z dodatkiem naturalnych komponentów nie wymaga tak dużych nakładów
•	kupując granulat Compositive i produkty z niego stworzone, chronisz naturalne środowisko i wspierasz ideę zamkniętego obiegu „zero waste” 

Co możemy zrobić dla Ciebie?
•	stworzymy dla Twojej firmy unikalny granulat o recepturze dostępnej tyko dla twojego zakładu produkcyjnego
•	dostarczymy możliwości dla Twojej firmy, aby wyróżnić ją i Twój nowy produkt na rynku
•	ograniczymy Twoje koszty energii emisję CO2, dzięki czemu zaoszczędzisz pieniądze
•	Sprawimy, że Twoje firma przyczyni się do proekologicznej idei #mniejplastiku

Name: T & R Tooling and Injection Molding, LLC
Description:
T&R Tooling offers plastic injection molding from 101 to 528 ton (5 to 65 ounce shot capacity) with core pull and robotic interfaces. Through a close alliance with our affiliates we have access to presses with capacities up to 1000 tons. Our shop is fully equipped to handle all fixturing and secondary operations should this be a requirement for your parts.
Our goal is to provide quality products and services, outstanding customer service and competitive pricing, while striving to meet your delivery requirements.
We were certified from September, 2016 to September, 2022. While we are not officially AS9100D & ISO 9001:2015 certified as of Sept. 2022 we do stay in compliance with them. We have been audited and carry certification as a supplier under Alpine Advanced Materials. Their HX5 material is half the weight of 6061-T6 aluminum yet has 93% of the strength.
Tool repair is our specialty. Our highly skilled team can handle any and all of your repair needs. Our primary goal for repairs is to “fix it right” the first time. We pride ourselves in the quality workmanship that goes into all of the repairs we perform for our clients. Using the latest state of the art equipment, we can produce high quality, consistent and precise tooling repairs that will meet or exceed your expectations.
No matter where you are in the design process, we can help. We can work with your design idea whether it’s in your head, on paper, an existing part/mold, or in most any industry accepted file format. T&R Tooling uses the latest in state-of-the art software to bring your concepts to reality.  We currently use SolidWorks and Mastercam software in our design process.  All software is maintained to the latest version.
We can take concept to molded parts in as few as 7 days. We now offer 3D printing and can print molds as large as 3” x 4” to run as many as 100 cycles in most materials.

Description:
We support retail trade by providing innovative systems for organizing and presenting products: shelf lighting, separators, supports, price strips and others.
We cooperate with the largest retail chains in Poland. For them, we design and produce individual products to highlight the offered products on the shelves and increase sales.

Out of concern for the natural environment and sustainable development, we have created a line of products made from biodegradable raw materials instead of fossil fuels. We have developed a production technology from PLA polylactide and cellulose. PLA is a completely biodegradable plastic made from corn. Products made of PLA have the properties of traditional plastics and decompose in the biodegradation process. Thermoplastic cellulose, in turn, is characterized by a negative CO2 emission balance in the production process and also has properties similar to traditional thermoplastics.

Since 2014, we have been the representative of Candor Ltd in Eastern Europe. We offer professional LED shelf illumination systems that do not require the use of tools. They can be mounted by anyone on any type of racks and shelves.

Depuis 1885 et à travers les générations, Wattelez conçoit de nombreux produits techniques, innovants et astucieux à base d’élastomère pour protéger les personnes et les équipements.

Du caoutchouc vulcanisé aux thermoplastiques élastomères, nous transformons sur nos sites de Poissy (78) et Chalonnes-sur-Loire (49) une large variété d’élastomères et de polymères.

Name: Bilplas Savunma
Description:
Bilplas Savunma 1996 yılında plastik, kauçuk üretimi ve serigrafi konusunda hizmet vermek amacıyla Ankara’da faaliyetlerine başlamıştır. Firmamız kurulduğu günden bu yana Elektro-Mekanik sanayi ve Askeri kuruluşların plastik-kauçuk malzeme ve serigrafik baskı ihtiyaçlarını karşılayan bir alt yüklenici olarak çalışmaktadır. 
Bilplas Savunma, Zeliyha YILDIRIM tarafından kurulmuştur ve üretime 3 çalışanı ile birlikte Ostim O.S.B’de başlamıştır. Şu anda şirketin çalışan sayısı 50’dir. 

Şirketimiz faaliyetlerine savunma sanayi ihalelerine girerek ve serigrafi yaparak başlamıştır. Askeri alanda 1011, Adapazarı 1. Ana Bakım Merkezi Komutanlığı ve Gölcük Deniz Kuvvetleri Komutanlığı için pek çok üründe yerlileştirme çalışmaları yapmış ve hiç yasaklı duruma düşmeden teslimatlarını başarıyla gerçekleştirmiştir. 2000’li yılların başlarında savunma sanayi firmalarına plastik ve kauçuk parça üretimi ile çalışmalarına devam etmiştir. Günümüzde ise sadece savunma sanayi firmalarına çalışmakta olup ASELSAN, FNSS, ROKETSAN gibi önemli firmaların onaylı alt yüklenicisi konumundadır.

Ürettiğimiz her ürün savunma sanayi firmalarına yönelik spesifik özelliklerde olduğu için, yaptığımız her iş AR-GE çalışması niteliği taşımaktadır. Bu kapsamda fabrika alanımızın büyük bir bölümü yeni ürün geliştirme faaliyetleri amacıyla kullanılmaktadır. Firmamız bugüne kadar 20.000’in üzerinde farklı ürün üretmiştir ve bu sayı her geçen yıl artmaktadır. Ürünlerimiz askeri standartlara(ASTM, AMS, MIL, SAE, DIN) uygun olarak üretilmektedir. Ayrıca firmamız Milli ve NATO tesis güvenlik belgesine de sahiptir.

Name: Allen Field Company Inc.
Description:
Since 1946 the Allen Field Company has been developing and supplying unique plastic components for the packaging industry. Our proprietary product line includes the following categories:
 
  •  Display Aids and Plastic Hangers: Plastic clips and hangers to display products at retail (POP). We’ve provided solutions on products that include hosiery, small electronics, clothing accessories, food products and more.
  •  Plastic Handles: Used on retail or industrial packaging to add design value, assist in handling product at retail, in shipping, or within a manufacturing environment. Solutions provided include consumer electronics, accessories for the home, medical devices, sporting goods, and more. 
  •  Box Connecting Clips: Plastic clips that fasten two corrugated panels together and eliminate the need for tape, glue or banding. Multiple use, easy to open and close, reduce handling damage are just a few of the value points of this product line. Solutions include rack servers, automotive parts, exercise equipment, and more.
 
Equally, if not more, important to understand is our custom design and manufacturing capabilities. One of the hardest things to do in sales is to solve a problem when nothing exists to solve it. With us, many times the solution is a question away. It could be as simple as providing one of our hangers in a different size, color, or maybe a hot stamped logo. We don’t stop at simple. Some of our custom design challenges have included: developing a plastic component to protect pavers from damage during transport, or designing a unique plastic handle for a high-end audio product package.

Name: Profextru Productie BV
Description:
Profextru ontwikkelt, produceert en verkoopt duurzame kunststof profielsystemen, zoals damwanden en systeemwanden voor de agrarische sector.

De productie van onze systemen draagt bij aan de reductie van het groeiende aanbod van recyclebare kunststof. Bovendien zijn de damwanden uit onze productielijn Prolock een duurzaam alternatief voor hardhouten damwanden. Moderne productieprocessen, gekenmerkt door innovatie en controle, vormen de basis van onze kwaliteitsproducten. Wij hebben de ambitie om onze systemen continu te verbeteren en te vernieuwen. De inzet van Profextru daarbij is om de verworven marktpositie te behouden en te verbeteren.

Duurzaamheid is ons keurmerk. De producten van Profextru hebben een levensduur van ruim vijftig jaar. Daarna kunnen ze nog zes keer worden gerecycled.

De expertise van Profextru zorgt steeds voor nieuwe producten en toepassingen. Onze vakmensen ontwikkelen en vervaardigen de daarbij benodigde gereedschappen en matrijzen. De nieuwe producten worden na een uitgebreide testfase in productie genomen.

De productieprocessen van Profextru verlopen volledig geautomatiseerd. Met een geringe hoeveelheid arbeid en een minimale kans op fouten is Profextru uw betrouwbare fabrikant en leverancier. Profextru beschikt over een eigen kunststofbrekerij en gereedschapmakerij.

Name: CK Produktion
Description:
I CK Produktion er vi specialister i plastsprøjtestøbning siden 1978. Vi designer, udvikler og producerer tekniske og funktionelle plastkomponenter til en bred vifte af brancher i industrien. 

Vi er mere end blot en leverandør - vi er jeres videnspartner og eksterne plastteam. Store nok til at løfte de største opgaver, men aldrig større end at vi altid er helt tæt på, når I har brug for os. 

Med os som partner er jeres projekt i trygge hænder fra idé til færdigt produkt, og vi er garant for kvalitet, fleksibilitet og effektivitet i hele processen. 

Vi understøtter jeres ESG arbejde med viden, dokumentation og praktiske løsninger, og vi arbejder aktivt for at fremme cirkulære principper og ressourceinnovation for at skabe fremtidens ansvarlige plastløsninger. 

CK Produktion er ejet af Vink Plast ApS. Vi er dermed en del af Vink Group, som er blandt Europas førende plastkoncerner.

Name: PEEK CHINA
Description: PEEKChina as a 16 years Chinese thermoplastic Polyetheretherketone manufacturer who is only focusing on PEEK material. Production of engineering plastic PEEK semi-finished and finished products. Materials can be ARKPEEK-1000, ARKPEEK-CF30, ARKPEEK-GF30, ARKPEEK-MOD, ARKPEEK-ESD. For the semi-finished products, we cooperated with Jilin University and launched 15 lines of profile continuous extrusion production, which include PEEK Pipe, PEEK Sheet, PEEK Rod, PEEK Film, and PEEK Parts & Components are both in machining process and injection molding. As well, we are researching with Xi'an Jiaotong University on PEEK 3D filaments and printers. From 2015, we became involved with long term implantable medical PEEK. Our medical PEEK ARKPEEK-MED and ARK-BioPEEK, has been certified by a lot of laboratories and colleges, it complies with ASTM F2026 and FDA/SGS certified, more and more medical device manufacturers and implantable material consumers choose us. As a Chinese top new material PEEK innovator, we spend 20% of our income on technical research. Our main customers are from USA, Europe, North America and Korea.

Name: Deisenhammer Group
Description: About Deisenhammer Group The Deisenhammer Group is an international alliance of specialized elastomer and polymer manufacturers. It consists of three production companies — Deisenhammer (Austria), HG Group (Mexico), and DEG Elastomer Solution (Turkey) — complemented by a strategic cooperation partnership in Slovenia, providing additional capacity and fast intra-European supply routes. This structure enables true nearshoring, dual-source capability, and a highly resilient global supply chain for international customers. Company Background Founded in 1989 in Austria, the group has evolved from a stamping-focused operation into a global manufacturer of high-precision elastomer, polymer, and composite components. With further expansion into Mexico and Turkey, the Deisenhammer Group has built an integrated international production network that supports both regional markets and global OEM standards. Global Presence Austria – European technical headquarters, engineering & production Mexico – NAFTA headquarters & production Turkey – Production with a focus on hose systems and elastomer solutions Slovenia – Cooperation partner supporting additional capacity & fast EU supply chains Our Solutions Sealing applications: Delivering reliable performance in demanding industrial environments Fluid management: Solutions that ensure controlled transport of liquids and gases NVH: Components designed to reduce noise, vibration, and mechanical stress Thermal management solutions: Helping regulate temperature and insulation across various applications Customized polymer components: Tailored to niche requirements including solutions for semiconductor, energy, and emerging technology sectors. Commitment to Quality The Deisenhammer Group combines technical depth, modern manufacturing capabilities, and global reach. Our strength lies in delivering precise, reliable, and customer-focused solutions across international value chains.

Name: Profextru Productie BV
Description:
Profextru ontwikkelt, produceert en verkoopt duurzame kunststof profielsystemen, zoals damwanden en systeemwanden voor de agrarische sector.

De productie van onze systemen draagt bij aan de reductie van het groeiende aanbod van recyclebare kunststof. Bovendien zijn de damwanden uit onze productielijn Prolock een duurzaam alternatief voor hardhouten damwanden. Moderne productieprocessen, gekenmerkt door innovatie en controle, vormen de basis van onze kwaliteitsproducten. Wij hebben de ambitie om onze systemen continu te verbeteren en te vernieuwen. De inzet van Profextru daarbij is om de verworven marktpositie te behouden en te verbeteren.

Duurzaamheid is ons keurmerk. De producten van Profextru hebben een levensduur van ruim vijftig jaar. Daarna kunnen ze nog zes keer worden gerecycled.

De expertise van Profextru zorgt steeds voor nieuwe producten en toepassingen. Onze vakmensen ontwikkelen en vervaardigen de daarbij benodigde gereedschappen en matrijzen. De nieuwe producten worden na een uitgebreide testfase in productie genomen.

De productieprocessen van Profextru verlopen volledig geautomatiseerd. Met een geringe hoeveelheid arbeid en een minimale kans op fouten is Profextru uw betrouwbare fabrikant en leverancier. Profextru beschikt over een eigen kunststofbrekerij en gereedschapmakerij.

Name: Kesterke Technologietage
Description:
Die Kesterke Technologietage sind der kompakte Branchentreff für marktführende Kunststoffexperten im Norden. Bewährte Ausrichtung mit geringem Zeitaufwand auf den Punkt gebracht.

Auf den Kesterke Technologietagen treffen sich die marktführenden Kunststoffexperten, informieren sich, tauschen sich aus, besprechen Projekte und vertiefen Kontakte mit Geschäftspartnern. Ein Muss im jährlichen Veranstaltungskalender für Kunststofftechniker, Spitzgießer sowie Werkzeug- und Formenbauer in Norddeutschland.

Unabhängig, ob Geschäftsführer, Einkäufer, Vertriebler, Produktmanager, Entwickler oder Anwender: Jeder spricht nicht nur mit jedem, jeder kennt jeden. So bringen Aussteller und Besucher gemeinsam den Kunststoff in der Region voran.

Kompakt: Die Technologietage finden ausschließlich an einem Tag statt, dafür mehrmals jährlich an verschiedenen Standorten in Norddeutschland. 

Bewährt: Die Teilnehmer erhalten aktuelle Informationen. Der Austausch findet in familiärer und ungezwungener Atmosphäre statt. Einfach nur schön.

Auf den Punkt: Der Veranstaltungsrahmen ist übersichtlich. Die Ausstellerstände sowie der Vortrags- und Ausstellungsbereich sind eng beieinander.

Der Veranstaltungsort ist stets gut erreichbar und die Anreise somit von kurzer Dauer. Parken, Eintritt und Catering sind kostenfrei.

Für Aussteller ist die Teilnahme mit einem niedrigen Kostenbeitrag und einem geringen Organisationsaufwand verbunden. Für Besucher ist eine Teilnahme am kompakten Branchentreff kostenfrei.

Als zertifiziertes Unternehmen nach ISO 9001 und IATF 16949 sowie umweltzertifizierter ÖKO-Profit-Betrieb (durch WIF Dortmund) legen wir größten Wert auf Qualitätssicherung und Prozessoptimierung – hierdurch garantieren wir Ihnen Dienstleistungen und Produkte auf höchstem Niveau.

Name: Composite Analytica
Description:
Composite Analytica develops CheFEM 3 – advanced software for predicting the durability of polymers and composites in harsh environments.

Trusted by industry leaders including Shell, Boeing, NASA, and SLB, CheFEM 3 integrates calibrated chemical physics, finite element modeling, and artificial intelligence to deliver actionable predictions of service life and failure under the most demanding conditions.

With CheFEM 3, engineering teams can:
 Quantify residual service life of polymer and composite assets – from subsea pipes to wind-turbine blades.
 Replace lengthy certification tests through validated, physics-based prediction of long-term performance.
 Predict chemical resistance and fugitive emissions (H₂, CO₂, N₂ etc.), supporting confident material selection for harsh environments.

Name: Mantaline Corporation
Description:
Founded in 1964, Mantaline has earned a reputation as a market leader in providing cost effective, value-added solutions to our customers by driving operational excellence to enhance product innovation and performance and by building a team culture centered on customer service, engagement, and accountability.

At Mantaline, we deliver best-in-class engineered polymer solutions targeting a diverse range of industrial markets, including Automotive, Heavy Truck, and Building & Construction. Our core manufacturing processes focus on custom profile extrusions, tubing, and molded products across the full portfolio of elastomeric materials.  We specialize in providing the ideal materials for manufacturing high-performance seals and components, including dense and sponge EPDM, Silicone, Neoprene, Nitrile, and a comprehensive selection of Thermoplastic materials (TPE, TPV and TPO).  Serving market leaders across the United States, Canada, Mexico, Europe, and Asia, we are recognized for delivering advanced sealing solutions for the most demanding applications.

Mantaline’s world-class operations range from application engineering, in-house tooling design and fabrication, and rapid prototyping to precision extrusion, injection and compression molding, and a wide range of specialized secondary processes.  We stay ahead of the competition by embracing innovation and continuous improvement through the implementation of automation and cutting-edge technology.  We have introduced best-in-class quality control to the extrusion process via in-line continuous measurement, surface quality detection, and product segregation systems that ensure the consistency and accuracy of every part we supply.

Name: PTG Silicones
Description:
PTG Silicones, Inc. is a fluid flow control and sealing technology company located in New Albany, Indiana – just across the Ohio River from Louisville, Kentucky.  We specialize in designing and manufacturing liquid silicone rubber injection molding components for the health care, food packaging, transportation, industrial/electronics, large appliance, and consumer end-use markets.

Our ISO 9001, 13485, and FSSC 22000 certified facility is outfitted with a wide range of molding and infrastructure equipment from prominent manufacturers in the industry, including Arburg, Stäubli, and Mitutoyo. This allows for highly-automated “lights out” manufacturing to improve quality and reduce customer costs. Our experience in silicone rubber (“LSR/LIM”) molding, combined with a strong investment in automation and the most current processing technologies, offer solutions that exceed performance, safety and quality specifications.

We have years of experience working with an array of materials including various silicones, nylon, PEEK, polycarbonate, PBT, PET, thermoplastic elastomers, thermoplastic rubbers, and much more. Our services span the entire product development process; offering assembly, slitting and die cutting, engineering, material selection, mold specification, post curing, surface treatment, and pre-production tooling. From single prototypes to high volume runs, we’re geared to handle virtually any production capacity.

Our certified team is always seeking new ways to increase the value of our services. We’re environmentally conscience and practice lean manufacturing methods to reduce waste. Our molds are used in applications such as gaskets, flow control valves, and seals. From health care to industrial electronics, we’ve supported numerous industries worldwide. Contact us to see how we can fulfill your silicone needs today.

Amcom polysol pvt ltd  is a leading manufacturer of specialty and high-performance engineering compounds, dedicated to delivering innovative solutions for a wide range of industries. Name: PRISM Worldwide
Description:
Prism is a full-service custom compounder and material provider focused on sustainability, particularly the reuse of end-of-life tires—a largely untapped polymer resource. 

By taking a novel approach, Prism has developed patented chemistry and technology to convert tire rubber into high-performance polymer intermediates. These are used in their ANCORA Thermoplastic Elastomers (TPE) and ENNOVA rubber-modified olefins, suitable for a variety of injection molding and extrusion applications. Additionally, Prism offers ANCORA V, a vulcanizable, tire-derived polymer that enhances both sustainability and performance in rubber compounding.

Name: MAXWISE INDUSTRIES
Description:
MAXWISE INDUSTRIES is a professional one-stop solution provider, offering a comprehensive range of services covering product design, mold-making, injection molding, and product assembly. 

With our Sales Offices located in Shenzhen and Hong Kong, we operate advanced manufacturing centers in Dongguan and Vietnam, equipped with cutting-edge mold-making and production equipment originating from Switzerland, Japan, and Taiwan. Our Quality Labs, furnished with miscellaneous advanced testing devices, offer a full spectrum of research and quality inspection capabilities spanning the process from our material selection, new material development, product design & development, mold design & making, manufacturing to the QA process, catering to different test needs from our universal customers. We have established and well-maintained a strict and professional quality control system under the certification of ISO9001, ISO14001, ISO13485, ISO22000, and IATF16949 ensuring stringent adherence to industry standards and the reliability and high quality of all our work.

With over a decade of accumulated experience, MAXWISE has become an expert in precision mold and manufacturing, meeting the demands of high precision and intricate geometries. We possess extensive expertise in HASCO and DME standard tools, accumulating substantial experience in 2K injection molding, over-molding, insert molding, silicone injection molding, silicone compression, CNC machining, surface treatments (such as pad printing, heat transfer printing, laser engraving, powder coating), and complex product assembly. Our clientele spans various industries worldwide, including smart home appliances, baby care products, consumer electronics, sporting goods, pået supplies, automotive components, medical devices, outdoor equipment, Lighting, Education, and more.

Name: Stil Gomma s.r.l.
Description:
ARTICOLI TECNICI IN GOMMA, SILICONE, E  VASTA GAMMA DI ELASTOMERI, TERMOPLASTICI E METALLI PER TUTTE LE APPLICAZIONI. 

Stil Gomma non è semplice produttrice di guarnizioni standard. Infatti, è da sempre specializzata nella progettazione e nella produzione di materiali, componenti e processi al fine di realizzare prodotti tecnici custom richiesti dalla committenza. Questa nostra caratteristica ci ha reso una realtà altamente specializzata e tecnica. 

Il nostro Ufficio Tecnico vi aiuterà a trovare la soluzione migliore per i vostri progetti. Studiamo, progettiamo e realizziamo prodotti trasformando la più vasta gamma di elastomeri, termoplastici e metalli (gomme naturali o sintetiche, plastica, siliconi, metalli) e producendo articoli stampati e co-stampati o da sovra stampaggi multipli (gomma-metallo, silicone-metallo, gomma-metallo-plastica).

In oltre 40 anni di attività abbiamo costruito e continuiamo a coltivare una fitta rete di specialisti e di partner che ci permette di gestire qualsiasi componente necessaria alla realizzazione dei prodotti. Grazie all'esperienza in numerosi e diversi settori, Stil Gomma mette a disposizione dei suoi preziosi clienti un solido ed efficiente servizio di co-design e co-engineering.

Als Familienunternehmen legen wir großen Wert auf langjährige Beziehungen zu unseren Mitarbeitern, Kunden und Lieferanten. Dabei sind Chancengleichheit, Respekt, Flexibilität und Verlässlichkeit wichtige Grundpfeiler unserer Zusammenarbeit. Gegenseitige Unterstützung gepaart mit Eigeninitiative und einem kooperativen Führungsstil sichert unsere gemeinsamen Erfolge. Anspruchsvolle Tätigkeiten werden stetig von verantwortungsvollem Wirtschaften und nachhaltigem Umgang mit unseren Ressourcen begleitet und fördern persönliches Wachstum. Dabei bietet unser familiäres Umfeld Gestaltungsspielraum für die Entfaltung individueller Bedürfnisse. 
Die Wertschätzung der eigenen Leistung finden sich in der Vielfalt unserer Benefits wieder.
Pütz – Tradition verpflichtet!

Description:

Grazie a un approccio estremamente versatile, siamo in grado di adattarci alle specifiche esigenze tecniche di ogni cliente, offrendo soluzioni su misura per i più diversi settori applicativi.

Lavoriamo con realtà operanti nei settori enologico, caseario, petrolchimico e farmaceutico, garantendo sempre elevati standard di sicurezza, resistenza e affidabilità. I nostri tubi flessibili possono essere forniti sia in rotoli che raccordati, pronti all'uso, e sono progettati per assicurare la massima efficienza in qualsiasi condizione di utilizzo.

Affidarsi a noi significa scegliere un partner tecnico competente, flessibile e orientato alla qualità, in grado di supportare il cliente nella scelta della soluzione più adatta per ogni tipo di applicazione industriale.

Name: Metalplast Srl Società Benefit
Description: METALPLAST, nata nel 1976, opera con successo da quasi 50 anni nello STAMPAGGIO AD INIEZIONE DELLE MATERIE PLASTICHE. Munita di certificazione UNI EN ISO 9001, METALPLAST offre ai suoi clienti un'assistenza completa: dalla scelta del materiale fino a tutte le fasi di sviluppo del prodotto e del post stampaggio. METALPLAST produce prevalentemente per conto terzi e la produzione spazia fra gli oggetti più diversi. I principali SETTORI commerciali sono: Automotive, Illuminazione Elettrica, Arredamento, Casalinghi, Macchinari Utensili e Hobbistica, Macchinari Agricoli, Apparecchiature Elettriche ed Elettroniche. Il reparto produttivo occupa una superficie di 1.200 Mq. e si avvale di un parco macchine costituito da 13 presse ad iniezione che hanno una forza di chiusura con un tonnellaggio tra 50 e 380: il peso della stampata può variare da pochi grammi fino a 1.5 Kg. I MATERIALI principalmente usati sono tecnopolimeri: PA, PC, PPS, PBT, POM, ABS, PAI. Inoltre, METALPLAST ha recentemente inserito in produzione MATERIALI COMPLETAMENTE NATURALI che, essendo BIODEGRADABILI AL 100%, garantiscono IL RISPETTO DELL'AMBIENTE. METALPLAST dispone di 3.200 Mq. di magazzino e 3.000 Mq. di spazio esterno. METALPLAST offre su richiesta il servizio di stoccaggio del prodotto finito. METALPLAST garantisce la custodia e la manutenzione ordinaria degli stampi dei clienti in prestito d'uso. L'assistenza per la manutenzione straordinaria degli stampi è garantita da alcune qualificate officine meccaniche che operano in collaborazione con METALPLAST. METALPLAST si è dotata delle tecnologie digitali dell'INDUSTRIA 4.0 che permettono di monitorare in modo continuo tutte le fasi del ciclo produttivo garantendo la tracciabilità dei lotti. L'integrazione dell'ERP, ha permesso a METALPLAST di automatizzare la quasi totalità delle attività di produzione e logistiche. Da Ottobre 2024 Metalplast è munita della CERTIFICAZIONE SICUREZZA ISO 45001:2018 e della CERTIFICAZIONE AMBIENTALE ISO 14001:2015.

Name: Langer Group
Description: Langer GmbH & Co. KG is a renowned company based in Illmensee that specializes in various areas of plastic processing. Since our establishment, we have earned an excellent reputation as an expert in plastic injection molding, tool and mold making, cubing model construction, and testing equipment manufacturing. In the field of plastic injection molding, we specialize in producing high-quality plastic parts. Our state-of-the-art injection molding machines allow us to provide precise and customized solutions for various industries, including the automotive industry, machine components, and architectural elements. Tool and mold making is another core area of our company. Our highly skilled employees have extensive experience in designing and manufacturing high-precision tools and molds for the plastic industry. We place great importance on innovative technologies and utilize modern CAD/CAM systems to develop customized solutions for our customers. Another specialty of Langer GmbH & Co. KG is cubing model construction. We create tailor-made cubing models for the automotive industry, supporting our customers in product development and validation. Our cubing models are known for their highest accuracy, precision, and quality, serving as vital tools for prototyping and series production. Additionally, we offer testing equipment manufacturing, enabling us to produce customer-specific testing tools and fixtures for quality assurance. We develop and manufacture testing devices that meet our customers' stringent requirements, ensuring reliable product testing.

Name: Guangdong Grand Sky Advanced Material Technology Co., Ltd.
Description: Guangdong Grand Sky Advanced Material Technology Co., Ltd., established in 2001, is a high-tech enterprise integrating R&D, production, sales, and service, listed on the New Third Board (NEEQ). With a registered capital of 40 million yuan, the company is headquartered in Shunde, Guangdong, and has subsidiaries in Wuhu, Anhui, and Guanghan, Sichuan. The total operating area exceeds 30,000 square meters, equipped with over twenty internationally advanced production lines and an annual capacity of more than 10,000 tons. Name: Deisenhammer HG Group
Description:
Deisenhammer HG Group is a joint venture between the two companies, Deisenhammer and HG Group, combining their strengths to provide high-quality rubber and plastic products worldwide.

Company Background
Deisenhammer was founded in 1989 in Austria, originally focusing on stamping operations. Over the years, it evolved into a manufacturer of drawing-based rubber products.
In 2018, to expand into the NAFTA region, HG Group was established, becoming the headquarters for Deisenhammers operations in North America.

Global Operations
Deisenhammer HG Group operates from four key locations, ensuring efficient production and distribution:
•	Austria: The Technical and Europe Headquarters and production site, focusing on innovation and technical development.
•	Mexico: The NAFTA Headquarters, managing operations across North America.
•	Slovenia: Enhances the company's production capacity within Europe.
•	Turkey: Expansion of production options, particularly in the area of hose production.

Product Offerings
Deisenhammer HG Group’s diverse product range includes:
•	Rubber and Plastic Injection Products: Manufactured to meet various industrial requirements.
•	Composite Components: Combining materials like rubber, plastic and metal for improved functionality.
•	Assembly Products: Tailored solutions for different applications.
•	Stamped Gaskets: Continuing the tradition of high-quality stamped products out of several materials.
•	Sealing Solutions and Hoses: Designed for durability in demanding environments.

Commitment to Quality
Deisenhammer HG Group is committed to maintaining high standards of quality and precision. By leveraging advanced technologies, the company ensures that its products meet the needs of clients across different industries.

Name: Repulp
Description:
Siamo una azienda che produce e vende pallet in plastica riciclata. La nostra attività si basa su di un percorso di ricerca che fonde innovazione e sostenibilità. il nostro scopo è recuperare la plastica, anche quella presente nella raccolta differenziata della carta, e darle una seconda vita, come prevedono gli obiettivi UE: arrivare al 100% di plastica riciclata entro il 2030.
Il nostro pallet in plastica riciclata è un esempio di prodotto sostenibile: nasce da una tecnologia nuova, chiamata Ecopulplast. l'abbiamo pensata, realizzata e testata nell'ambito del progetto europeo Life-Ecopulplast, basato sul riutilizzo del pulper - il principale scarto delle cartiere - nell'ottica di una economia circolare.
Trasformando le plastiche eterogenee del pulper in nuova risorsa, abbiamo dato vita ad un pallet del tutto nuovo, più resistente e sicuro dei normali pallet in legno.
Un pallet durevole, riciclabile e sostenibile, attraverso cui la logistica delle aziende può farsi portavoce di un'etica ambientale, abbattendo al tempo stesso i costi sul lungo periodo.
