Name: Suzhou D-top Plastic Technology Co.,Ltd
Description:
D-top Mould – Your Trusted Partner for Precision Mold Making & Injection Molding Solutions
Since 2014, D-top has been dedicated to providing high-precision mold manufacturing and injection molding services for global industries, including Automotive, Consumer Electronics, Medical, and Home Appliances.
With a commitment to precision, durability, and cost-efficiency, we offer:
One-Stop Tooling Solutions: From DFM analysis and mold design to mass production.
High-Quality Standards: Precision molds tailored to optimize your cycle times and part quality.
Reliable Technical Support: Expert engineering advice to reduce costs and minimize risks before steel cutting.
D-top Mould – Turning Your Concepts into Reality.
Our Core Capabilities:
 Plastic Injection Molds (Single & Multi-cavity)
 2K / Overmolding & Insert Molding
 Die Casting Molds
 Rapid Prototyping & 3D Printing
 High-Precision CNC Machining Services
 Value-Added Assembly & Surface Finishing
Quality Policy Statement:
At D-top Mould, we are committed to delivering zero-defect tooling and parts. Our ISO [e.g., 9001:2015] certified facility implements stringent quality controls at every stage—from raw material verification (Steel & Resin) to final CMM inspection. We ensure every mold meets international standards (HASCO/DME/LKM) and your specific requirements.
Global Reach & Competitive Pricing:
Our world-class molds are priced competitively for the global market. We have successfully exported to over 50 countries across Europe, North America, and Asia. As your preferred molding partner, we aim to build long-term, mutually rewarding relationships.
 HIGH PRODUCTION STANDARDS:
Equipped with advanced CNC centers, EDM machines, and wire-cutting facilities in China, we ensure manufacturing excellence. We don’t just build molds; we ensure strictly controlled lead times (T1) so your product launch is never delayed.
 TECHNICAL EXPERTISE:
We focus on the engineering behind the mold.

Name: Csplast srl
Description:
Csplast è un’azienda che opera nel settore della costruzione di stampi a iniezione e nello stampaggio di materie plastiche. Siamo in grado di rispondere alle più svariate esigenze e forniamo un servizio completo che va dallo sviluppo del concept design fino alla produzione in serie dei vostri prodotti.

Grazie alla nostra lunga tradizione ed esperienza manifatturiera, siamo in grado di rispondere ad ogni esigenza dei nostri clienti, provenienti dai più svariati settori, come ad esempio quello della sicurezza, dell’automazione, del medicale, dell’impiantistica alimentare.

Tutte le fasi di realizzazione del prodotto vengono svolte all’interno della nostra sede di Colorno (PR), a partire dallo sviluppo del design, dall’ingegnerizzazione, fino alla costruzione dello stampo ad iniezione e allo stampaggio ad iniezione del pezzo. Questa integrazione di tutto il ciclo produttivo in un unico fornitore e referente, permette di offrire un servizio completo, che va ad ottimizzare notevolmente i costi di gestione e i tempi di sviluppo del progetto.

Siamo costantemente alla ricerca dei materiali più innovativi ed efficienti presenti sul mercato e siamo sempre aggiornati sulle soluzioni tecniche di ultima generazione relative al nostro settore, così da offrire il meglio ai nostri clienti. In tutto questo, non dimentichiamo mai il rispetto per l’ambiente, facendo scelte green ed eco-sostenibili nell’uso delle materie prime e nel tipo di impianti utilizzati.

Scegliere Csplast significa scegliere l’attenzione per la cura del cliente, tipica di un’azienda a conduzione familiare, che negli anni ha saputo crescere e adattarsi alle richieste di un mercato globale in cambiamento, ma senza mai dimenticare la creatività e l’attenzione al Made in Italy propri della nostra cultura.

Name: Kewell Converters
Description:
Foam engineered for performance. Foam engineered for you.

At Kewell Converters, we’re the UK’s most experienced independent foam converter and foam fabricator, trusted for over 50 years to deliver bespoke foam solutions that perform when it matters most.

Based in Kent, we design and manufacture high-quality foam parts, foam inserts, foam shapes, and protective foam solutions for the most demanding industries: from military and defence to aerospace and industrial applications.

We don’t just cut foam, we solve problems. Our expert team combines CAD design, CNC machining and deep material knowledge to create custom foam solutions that meet exacting standards for performance, durability and sustainability. Whether you need lightweight foam panels, bespoke case inserts, foam gaskets, branded foams or specialist Zotefoams materials, we deliver with precision, speed and reliability.

- Uncompromising quality: ISO 9001 certified, because reliability isn’t optional
- Sustainable innovation: ISO 14001 certified, driving smarter, greener manufactured foam solutions
- Proven expertise: over 90% of our work comes from repeat customers who trust us as long-term partners

Our values, caring, innovative, quality, integrity, are built into every project. That’s why procurement teams and engineers across high-risk sectors choose us as their go-to foam fabricator.

We’re proud to be family-run, with a national reputation for technical excellence and dependable delivery. Follow us here for insights into specialised foam materials, protective foam solutions, and bespoke manufacturing capabilities, and see how our team can make your next project easier, safer, and smarter.

Ready to discuss a project? Visit: kewell-converters.co.uk or email enquiries@kewell-converters.co.uk to speak with our expert, friendly team.

Name: Himalaya Plast Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
At Himalaya Plast, we set the global benchmark in gasket manufacturing.

We are a global manufacturer of precision-fit gaskets in TPE, TPV, and TPO, engineered for uPVC, aluminium, and façade profile systems.

Our sealing solutions are trusted by leading system companies, profile manufacturers, and builders worldwide, because we consistently deliver:
	•	 Perfect fit with every profile
	•	 Long-lasting durability under all conditions
	•	 Advanced extrusion technology with strict QC
	•	 Zero compromise on quality at any stage

From design to extrusion, we combine material expertise, process control, and customer-focused innovation to produce gaskets that perform beyond expectations.

But we don’t just manufacture gaskets. We engineer confidence — ensuring that every window, door, and façade system sealed with a Himalaya Plast gasket delivers lasting performance, safety, and trust.

Our vision: To be the world’s most recognized and trusted name in gasket solutions, setting new standards of reliability and innovation in building systems globally.

If you are a profile manufacturer, system company, or builder seeking precision-fit gasket solutions that scale with your business, let’s connect.

Name: Gulf Engineered Rubber & Plastics Solutions
Description:
Gulf Engineered Rubber and Plastic Solutions - Precision by Design.

As a part of Skellerup Holdings, Gulf is a global solutions provider. Our services include, design, engineering, and manufacturing of precision engineered rubber and plastic components. Our trusted global supply chain, world class quality control, responsive customer service and products are geared to help you improve your business. We can work with you from the inception to create better designs that drive down your costs, improve efficiency and give your products a competitive advantage.

Skellerup Holdings a NZD $350m public company and employs 850 plus staff and has been in existence for more than 113 years in New Zealand. Gulf Engineered Rubber and Plastic is specifically part of the industrial polymer group which includes the following companies:
- Gulf U.S. (Mooresville, NC)
- Gulf U.S. (Whitewater, WI)
- Gulf Asia (Nantong, China)
- Gulf Australia (Sydney, Australia)
- Gulf Italy (Ala, Italy) 
- Gulf NZ R&D (Auckland, NZ)

Our core competencies includes compression, transfer and injection molding (including LSR). We have extensive experience in processing both elastomers and thermoplastics including: EPDM, SBR, Nitrile, Silicone, Fluoroelastomer, Ethylene Acrylic, Chloroprene, Natural rubber, and a broad range of engineered resins.

The range of engineered products is extensive and includes over-molded sub-assemblies, pipe gaskets, diaphragms, washers, gaskets and custom rubber moldings, “O” rings, check valves, duckbills, umbrella valves, and components for medical and safety applications.

Accreditation to ISO13485, TS16949, ISO 9001 indicates Gulf Rubber’s total commitment to quality.
Gulf holds a range of internationally recognized approvals for service in potable water including NSF61, KTW, WRAS, W270, ACS, and AS4020.

Name: MAXPLA Srl
Description:
Maxpla nasce nel 1973 come costruttrice di stampi per articoli tecnici in materiale plastico, si sviluppa poi anche nel settore dello stampaggio delle materie plastiche e collabora con i più rinomati produttori di tecnopolimeri.

 Nel 1985 adotta i più sofisticati sistemi computerizzati nel controllo delle macchine e della progettazione.

Name: Silcotech North America Inc.
Description:
Silcotech has been a global leader in liquid silicone injection molding for the medical, healthcare, packaging, consumer electronics and consumer markets since 1984.

Our core competency is providing turn-key, mass production, large volume liquid injection molding solutions. 

Based in Bolton, Ontario, Canada, our 22,500 square foot manufacturing facility runs 24/7 where our highly-trained, specialized technicians serve a global customer base for all their design, tool-making and manufacturing injection molding needs. Silcotech also owns and operates a similar facility in Noida, India and is opening a US site in York, South Carolina in 2014.  

Silcotech is ISO 9001:2008, ISO 13485:2003 and ISO 14001:2004 registered and FDA compliant utilizing lean Six Sigma, GMP and Risk Assessment. Plans are in the works to register to TS 16949 in 2014.

Name: Prical srl | Gaskets for windows, doors, and industrial applications
Description:
Founded in 2005, Prical manufactures gaskets and accessories in EPDM rubber, silicone, PVC, TPE, and other technical materials such as ABS and polyamide.
Thanks to technological innovation and a highly specialized in-house production process, we provide customized solutions for a wide range of applications.

We specialize in the extrusion of rubber gaskets with high thermal, elastic, and mechanical properties, ensuring long-lasting sealing performance and durability.
For all compounds used, we receive Control Certificates 3.1 EN 10204, and our suppliers conduct rigorous quality tests, including rheometric curves, hardness, density, and physical/mechanical properties.
In collaboration with them, we also develop custom compounds tailored to meet even the most demanding technical specifications.

We operate in over 60 countries and have a strategic hub in Miami, allowing us to efficiently serve the USA, Canada, Central, and South America with fast and reliable shipping. Our global distribution network now covers every major market.

Prical stands out for the quality of its products and customer-focused approach, offering full support from prototype to mass production.
Our goal is to be a competitive, innovative, and reliable partner, capable of transforming every technical requirement into a concrete solution.

GASKETS AND ACCESSORIES IN:

Silicone (available in all RAL colors)

Name: INTERNATIONAL RUBBER COMPANY LLC
Description:
About International Rubber Company (IRC)

Precision Rubber Sealing. Global Reach. 25+ Years of Trusted Expertise.

International Rubber Company (IRC) is a Dubai-based manufacturer of EPDM and silicone sealing profiles designed for performance, reliability, and export-readiness. For over 25 years, we’ve supported a wide range of industries — including façade systems, HVAC, industrial enclosures, and machinery OEMs — with rubber solutions built to meet international quality expectations.

Our expertise lies in:

Custom extrusion in EPDM, silicone, and sponge rubber

Vulcanized corner frames and continuous gaskets

Fast-turnaround prototyping and die development

Export logistics to over 30 countries across Europe, the Middle East,  Asia & North America

Whether it’s an airtight seal in a unitized façade, a temperature-resistant gasket for equipment, or a reliable part for industrial assembly, our strength is in understanding technical requirements and translating them into rubber profiles that perform.

At IRC, we combine material expertise with a consultative, agile approach to help manufacturers and contractors reduce risks, improve product longevity, and deliver with confidence.

We don’t just manufacture rubber.
We help seal performance into every project we touch.

Name: Precision Associates, Inc.
Description:
Precision Associates, Inc. (PAI) is a leading American manufacturer of high-performance sealing solutions and precision-molded rubber products, including USP Class VI and biomedical silicones. We serve a wide range of global industries including medical, pharmaceutical, fluid power and handling, electronics, oil and gas, aerospace, and other environmentally challenging industrial applications.

With seven decades of deep expertise in advanced material science, PAI offers more than 1,000 proprietary compounds engineered to meet demanding performance requirements. We provide complete engineering and manufacturing support for custom seals and parts needs, along with rapid shipping of standard, off the shelf O-rings and other sealing solutions.

Our commitment to quality is backed by advanced manufacturing processes, modern control systems, and 100% visual inspection prior to every shipment. Located in Minneapolis, MN our headquarters and manufacturing facility features a Class 7 Clean Room, is ITAR registered, and ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 13485:2016 certified.

When your application requires a custom solution, PAI brings together USA in-house formulation, engineering, and tooling capabilities to deliver exactly what you need, always supported by full lot traceability, dependable shipping, and immediate customer service.

Learn more and reach out to PAI at www.precisionassoc.com

Name: Custom Fabricating & Supplies (CFS)
Description:
Long known as a premier supplier of industrial masking supplies, CFS works with the finishing industry, OEMs and suppliers to solve their complex masking issues. Custom die cuts, kitting, sheeting, perforating, multi-layer laminations, zoned adhesive, island placement and kiss cutting are offered on most of our extensive library of materials. We can design custom silicone, EPDM and vinyl caps and plugs to mask threads, PEMS, voids and holes to ensure efficient and clean finishes after powder coating, e-coating, anodizing, and plating.

ISO 7, Class 10,000 Clean Room manufacturing for industries such as healthcare, pharma, electronic, military and LED lighting, which require low particulate, humidity and temperature-controlled die cutting services. Our permanent onsite clean room facility offers die cutting for web widths up to 13” with tight tolerances as small as 50 microns.

CFS manufactures custom gaskets from materials such as silicone rubber, EPDM, Poron, Santoprene, RN-8011 and Viton. Our in-house engineering team will work with you to ensure the perfect fit for your custom gasket needs. In addition to custom gasket making capabilities, CFS offers large format cutting and adhesive laminating services. We can easily provide kiss-cutting or split liners for your gaskets requiring an adhesive backing.

Custom Fabricating & Supplies is proud to have achieved the ISO 9001:2015 Certificate. We believe in the continued improvement of our organization, so we may provide our customers with the highest level of service expected from a partner. Our customers have the confidence that CFS is adhering to the systems and procedures that being ISO 9001:2015 certified demands.

Name: Haval
Description:
Food safety, innovation and quality: key values for over 30 years to Haval as a manufacturer of packaging for the food industry.

Haval started in 1984 with the production of disposables. Based on their extensive experience in the food industry, one thing was clear right from the start: a company that provides quality, puts food safety first and continues self-development as a business will be considered an asset for the food industry. This remains true today.

Development and innovation are managed internally and are part of the business operation. Continuous innovation of production techniques as well as our product range has made Haval a specialist in the field of cutlery, glasses and packaging materials. Well-organised processes for procurement, production, storage and transport ensure that products are delivered exactly in line with customer requirements.

Each year, about 5 billion disposables leave our ultramodern production site in Gemert, the Netherlands, en route to customers anywhere in Europe.

Name: Microtech Engineers
Description:
Microtech Engineers is a leading high-precision multi-cavity and 101-class plastic injection molds manufacturer. With close to 3 decades of experience designing, manufacturing, and producing plastic injection molds and components, we have established ourselves as a name to reckon with in the industry.

We have a state-of-the-art toolroom and have manufactured close to 1300 molds with many exports to North America, Europe, and Southeast Asia. We are industry leaders in manufacturing multi-cavity ( 16+ ) molds for Caps & Closures, Dispenser pumps, Electrical Connectors, and Automotive Components. Our proficiency extends to but is not limited to making unscrewing, in-mold closing, and in-mold labeling technologies with side cores. We are skilled in working with polymers such as PA6, PA66, GF/TF materials, POM PC, ABS, PP, HDPE, LLDPE, and LDPE. To support our manufacturing process, we have partnerships with Husky, Mold-Masters, Yudo, and Thermoplay for Hot Runner Systems and with Hasco, Misumi, and Meusburger for standard parts established. We have dedicated injection molding machines for in-house mold try-out and validation.

Speaking of our injection molding capability, We are  IATF 16949 and Hyundai SQ mark-certified organization. We operate 13 injection molding machines, ranging from 80 tons (Vertical) to 450 tons (Horizontal). We cater seat & door latch components, housings, adapters, knobs, safety hooks, and hood stay rod components to Tier-1 industries on a Just in Time basis. We also add value to the plastic parts through sub-assemblies and pad printing.

At Microtech Engineers, we consistently strive towards fulfilling or, more often, exceeding customers' requirements and expectations. Our policies are curated to serve the customers with the highest quality and best turnaround time. 

We hope you have found the content here informative and engaging. If you are searching for a ONE-STOP solution to Plastics Injection Molds, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Name: Faizanè S.p.A.

Da qui il nostro “motto aziendale”: Faizanè fa per te.

Et notre production de gaines ANTI FEU pour la protection des câbles, des fibres optiques ou des conduites, des hautes températures, du feu ou des projections incandescentes. Ces produits, principalement utilisés en sidérurgie et en métallurgie, sont en fort développement dans l’entreprise.

Description:
Perontecnici opera da più di 50 anni nel settore industriale e in particolar modo nel campo dei nastri trasportatori, nastri elevatori installati anche in aree ATEX, rivestimenti in gomma, poliuretano ed articoli tecnici. Le continue esperienze ci hanno portato ed introdotto in qualsiasi settore dall’acciaio, alla pietra, al vetro, allo zucchero e non per ultimo alle applicazioni medicali e farmaceutiche.

Brianza Plastica was founded in 1962 to manufacture fibreglass laminates for the industrial and commercial sectors, and has continued to expand its production, operating mainly in the construction sector. Important know-how and expertise acquired over the years and the demand for laminates with better characteristics, have made its fibreglass laminates suitable for recreational and temperature-controlled vehicles. 

Between 2006 and 2008, the Company built two new production facilities equipped with discontinuous laminating technologies and expanded the main production site of Carate Brianza with the introduction of a continuous laminating production line. Brianza Plastica is currently one of the main European manufacturer of fibreglass and also the only Company able to offer flat laminates made with two production technologies: continuous hot laminating and discontinuous cold laminating. In 2014, it opened the commercial-logistics centre of Elkhart to serve the entire US market and to strengthen its presence in the territory.

In summer 2016 a third production site for discontinuous laminates has been established in Rovigo together with a new continuous plant in Carate Brianza. These productive investments have increased the production capacity of 40%; this makes Brianza Plastica ready to face all the challenges of coming years.

Name: Protect Choc - Groupe TOTEM
Description:
Protect Choc est le 1er et seul fabricant 100% FRANÇAIS et en circuit court, de protections flexibles industrielles à mémoire de forme.  
Nous intervenons de la conception à la fabrication, et jusqu’à l’installation opérationnelle sur site. 
Notre priorité étant la sécurité du personnel piéton en entreprise, nous avons souhaité aller plus loin que la protection par barrières physiques et avons donc pensé et conçu une solution de détection, intégrée dans nos barrières, pour les zones où se croisent piétons et chariots.
Notre détection LightUS a effectivement émergé du constat que sur chaque site industriel, même avec l’installation de nos barrières flexibles, il reste des zones critiques, avec peu de visibilité pour les piétons et les caristes, et donc à risque d'accidents.
Son fonctionnement se fait par impulsions infrarouges. Le système détecte une présence, puis émet un signal lumineux rouge clignotant projeté au sol, et très visible. Et sur certains modèles, nous avons ajouté un signal sonore. 

Nous avons pour l’instant imaginé 3 déclinaisons du LightUS : 
Le Phare, pour la détection piéton/chariot et prévenir des accidents 
Les Lanternes, pour la détection de mât des chariots et donc éviter la dégradation des portes hautes ou le renversement du chariot 
Le Guide, pour la détection des poids lourds afin d’aider les chauffeurs à se garer à quai.

En quoi notre solution est-elle innovante ?
• Elle est unique car la partie opérative est intégrée dans nos protections flexibles à mémoire de forme
• La technologie utilisée LIDAR est fiable et précise
• La gamme est polyvalente
• Chaque système est autonome
• Son installation est simple et son déplacement si nécessaire également
• Pour finir, nos systèmes sont réglables, au niveau de la détection, de la projection et du volume sonore.

Protect Choc fait partie de la société TOTEM, PME familiale en pleine expansion. Nous sommes situés à Gleizé, à 30 km de Lyon, dans le Rhône.

Name: Circular Plastics World
Description:
The circular economy represents an alternative, more sustainable model to the traditional linear economy, which will further enhance industry competitiveness and resource efficiency. The unique characteristics of plastics enable them to play a major role on the road to a more sustainable and resource efficient future. However, to improve the circularity of plastics, it is essential to make sure that more and more plastic waste is recovered and doesn’t end up in landfill or in the environment.

Circular Plastics World serves as an effective business platform that aims to bring together tremendous thought leaders, innovators, and advocates in plastics circularity industry worldwide, in a common effort to keep plastics in the circular economy, out of the environment.

Since 1988, PROVER Srl designs and manufactures quality thermoplastic moulds and provides the service of moulding plastic articles with mono-material, bi-material, bi-colour, nitrogen gas injection and LSR technologies. The company highly organized, is certified UNI EN ISO 9001. Operates on a surface property of 3,000 square meters. The production unit is composed from the tooling department, in which they are made molds, and from the molding department in which there is a modern Arburg machine park that manages the molding production of plastic items for the customers.
Flagship of the company is the technique design area in which the pre-production operations and the design assistance are performed at the highest quality standard: design, engineering and rapid prototyping. The heart of Prover is the tooling department in which the moulds are built. The precision in the construction phase is granted by the preparation of qualified technicians and a cutting-edge machine tool base constantly mantained and composed by numeric-control cutters, adjustments CNC, CNC lathe, electro-erosion machines. Prover provides a series moulding service for plastic parts with some technologies: mono-material, twin-Colored, Bi-Material, Nitrogen gas injection and Liquid Silicone Rubber. A special treatment of the raw material comes first in the moulding cycle. Prover uses a wide range of plastics: from classic polyolefin resins to the latest generation materials. The periodic testing on samples assures the quality of the process. At the end of the production cycle, the validation of the product is granted by an accurate testing and of the following packaging. The management of finished plastic articles is done by a storage joined by the service of “open order” to facilitate the internal management of the job. The machine tool base is composed by Arburg presses, with a range of capacities from 20 to 400 tons, which provide exceptional quality.

Name: Mycro3D ApS
Description:
Mycro3D offers versatile solutions for microscale 3D printing at an affordable cost, without having to compromise on the quality. 
Through complex optics, high-end nano-positioners, and inventive designs, Mycro3D are democratizing high resolution 3D printing, taking the systems out of the clean-room and made them available as an easily accessible service. Enjoy the power of state-of-the-art microfabrication on demand. 


The idea of Mycro3D started at IDUN center of excellence at Technical University of Denmark, where the founders were challenged by a need to have local production of complex and versatile micro-containers for research purposes for the institute. Through hacking of complex optics devices, an idea took form. Using this affordable device featuring different wavelengths to cross-link UV-curable photopolymers (also called UV-resins), molding of simple structures in micro-scale resolution is possible. The design was intended to save both time and money, making an affordable in-house system with high versatility, allowing for quick prototyping in normal lab conditions. After intensive testing and optimization, a system capable of printing micro-and nanostructures in a cm-volume came to life. Knowing the capability and flexibility of the system, it was thought to be an idea too good not to bring to the world, and the endeavors of creating Mycro3D was started.
Location: Kongens Lyngby, Capital Region of Denmark

Name: EZRA
Description:
Working with multiple vendors slows you down.

EZRA is a one-stop manufacturing factory that turns your CAD into functional parts — quickly, and without surprises.

Everything happens under one roof in our Dongguan facility: from design reviews to tooling, production, post-processing, and inspection. You won’t be chasing suppliers or wondering what went wrong between handoffs.

Our team covers three core processes in-house:

1. Injection Molding: Plastic injection molding, insert molding, overmolding, LSR molding, rapid tooling, family & multi-cavity molds, low-volume production, and secondary operations.

2. CNC Machining: Milling, turning, 5-axis, aluminum/steel precision machining, threads and inserts, rapid prototypes to batch production.

3. 3D Printing: SLA, SLS, MJF, FDM, PolyJet — with full material support, post-processing, and design-for-print guidance.

We also handle surface finishing (bead blasting, polishing, pad printing, laser engraving, UV coating, screen printing, chemical smoothing, and color matching), and value-added services such as:

• Assembly & packaging
• Quality inspection (FAI, CMM, CoC)
• DFAM support & material certification
• Export & logistics handling

Every quote is reviewed by an engineer — not an algorithm. If a part doesn’t make sense, we’ll tell you. If it can be improved, we’ll suggest how.

We serve global teams in automotive, consumer electronics, medical devices, toys, industrial equipment, and hardware products — from early prototypes to scaled production.

If you care about how things are made, and not just how fast they ship, we’d love to connect.

Name: PKT Präzisions-Kunststoff-Teile GmbH
Description:
Wir fertigen hochpräzise Kunststoffteile mit Mikrostrukturen und/oder Mikroabmessungen bereits ab einem Teilegewicht < 0,0006g. Von Entwicklung und Konstruktion, Werkzeugbau, Produktion und Qualitätssicherung bis hin zu Machbarkeits- und Moldflow-Analysen, Entwicklung mithilfe FMEA sowie der statistischen Versuchsplanung DoE haben unsere Kunden einen kompetenten Ansprechpartner für ihr Projekt, über alle Branchen und Verfahren hinweg.
Konkret steht dieses Komplettangebot für:
- die Verarbeitung aller gängigen Materialien bis hin zum Hochtemperaturkunststoff und anspruchsvoller Thermoplaste
- einem Maschinenpark mit mehr als 70 zum Teil vollelektrisch betriebenen Spritzgießmaschinen
- eine zentrale Materialvortrocknung und – versorgung
- anspruchsvolle Hochkavitäten-Werkzeuge. Für kleinste, hochgenaue Konturen und Kavitäten kommt u.a. auch eine Sarix 3D-Mikro-Funkenerosions-Fräsmaschine zum Einsatz. Die Medizintechnik-Werkzeuge sind durchweg auf Minimalschmierung ausgelegt und verzichten weitestgehend auf Hydraulikelement
- die formnestgetrennte Bauteilablage und Verpackung, auch von Mikroteilen erfolgt direkt an der Maschine in geeignete saubere Gebinde innerhalb einer Schutzeinhausung
- eine Peripherie, die genau auf die Fertigung kleinster Teile ausgelegt ist. Dazu zählen Entnahmegeräte/Sechs-Achs-Roboter mit hohen Beschleunigungswerten, höchster Wiederholgenauigkeit von 0,03mm sowie hochgenau arbeitende Entnahmehände inklusiver überwachter Mikropräzisionssensorik. Die Teile werden nur im hierfür vorgesehenen Bereich von ≤ 0,1mm vom Entnahmemechanismus berührt
- ein Werth Werth TomoScope XS 160 zur dreidimensionalen Teilemessung nach dem Prinzip der Computertomografie in der Qualitätssicherung
Egal ob Mikro- oder Präzisionsspritzguss, technische Dünnwand-, Mehrkomponenten- oder Hybrid-Bauteile – wir gehen bei der Umsetzung ihrer Spritzgießaufgabe auch bis an den Rand des Machbaren.
Selbstverständlich sind wir auch zertifiziert nach: DIN ISO 9001,14001,45001,50001

Description:
I mer än 35 år har vi försett svensk industri med tejp och konverterade häftämnen, 

Vår samlade kompetens är djup och vi ser till att våra kunder alltid erbjuds den bästa kvaliteten och ett konkurrenskraftigt sortiment. 

Med vår erfarenhet ser vi till att kunden får förslag på rätt lösning anpassad för en specifik applikation. En lösning som leder till ett smidigare arbete för våra kunder tillsammans med en hållfast sammanfogning med ett kostnadseffektivt material. 

Där skruvar, nitar och svetsfogar förr var ett givet val för att hålla samman delar, är nu tejp ett mer intressant alternativ inom många områden. Ett val som leder till applikationer som både är säkrare och starkare sammanfogade samt ofta har ett snyggare slutresultat med jämna och opåverkade ytor.

Vi på ATC kan dessutom hjälpa dig att effektivisera din tillverkningsprocess genom att leverera tejpen precis så som du vill ha den.

Name: memoplast GmbH
Description: Prototypes and small series made of plastic Due to ever shorter development times and the individualization of products, the need for near-series prototypes and small series has grown steadily. Here, the rapid tooling process bridges the gap between generative prototyping processes and the series tool. In contrast to rapid prototyping processes, the rapid tooling process produces near-series injection molded parts from original materials. The parts produced in this way are indistinguishable from series components made from steel molds and correspond both optically and mechanically to the later series parts. With the help of the rapid tooling process and our modular memoplast master mold system, we combine precision, flexibility and speed. Here we focus entirely on your needs, whether you only need a few prototypes for component testing or a small series.

Vår verksamhet bedrivs enligt högt ställda kvalitets- och säkerhetskrav och är certifierad enligt ISO 3834 och ISO 15085, vilket säkerställer tillförlitliga svetsade konstruktioner för järnvägsapplikationer.

Vårt uppdrag är tydligt: att med kvalitet, innovation och hantverkssäkerhet bidra till driftsäkra industrier och tillförlitliga transportsystem – nu och i framtiden.

USI Corporation invested in establishing Swanson Plastics Corporation in 1986 to expand services with the production and sales of polyethylene (PE) products.

Since its establishment, Swanson Plastics Corporation has upheld a stable and steadfast business philosophy and continuously improved overall operation efficiency and service quality for polyethylene film processing, production, and development.

We work with renowned international companies in technical cooperation and R&D to achieve sustainable development for businesses and continuous growth. 

Swanson currently has 7 plants in Taiwan and overseas to meet local demands and market products in main overseas markets. The Company continues to advance its expansion plan. Name: Spherix
Description:
Spherix manufactures solid aluminosilicate ceramic (ASC) microspheres that are an average of 3 micron and 100% post-industrial. They deliver unique benefits for plastics, rubber, paints, and coatings by reducing processing time, improving yield, and lowering product costs for all polymer products and components. 

The mechanical effect of the spherical morphology produces increased dispersion, enhanced opacity, and better flow characteristics while reducing the total energy required to process. This mechanical ball-bearing effect improves surface smoothness and edge tear, resulting in more efficient melt mixing. 

Spherix delivers value in performance and sustainability in all polymer systems. The microspheres facilitate better integration of recyclate as they improve the performance of off-spec polymers to the level of prime grade. Additional benefits of Spherix are dynamic reduction of motor load, greater production output, enhanced adhesion, and higher filler loadings. Spherix also has a portfolio of surface chemistries for optimized polymer compatibility, rheology, and targeted polymer properties. As ceramics, these products are mechanically robust, non-abrasive, chemically inert particles that withstand continuous temperatures up to 1700° F.

Spherix environmentally conscious products provide new and innovative solutions for the polymer market and circular economy.

Name: Plast Petter AB
Description:
Plast Petter – Din expert inom bearbetning och förädling av mjukplast

Plast Petter är ett ledande företag med 75 års erfarenhet inom bearbetning och förädling av mjukplast. Vi erbjuder kompletta lösningar från design och konstruktion till produktion, och vi hjälper dig att förvandla idéer till högkvalitativa produkter – oavsett om det handlar om avancerad legotillverkning eller enklare kontorsartiklar. Vår spetskompetens inom svetsning, stansning, print och konvertering i mjukplast gör oss till en pålitlig partner i branschen.

Tillverkning i Sverige – Kvalitet och hållbarhet som standard
Vår produktion sker i egen fabrik på ca 8000 kvadratmeter i Hova, Sverige. Här har vi en fullutrustad maskinpark som hanterar allt från manuella till robotstyrda processer. Genom att ha full kontroll över hela produktionskedjan kan vi garantera högsta kvalitet och samtidigt minska miljöpåverkan genom effektiv materialanvändning och återvinning.

Närproducerat i Norden – Miljömedvetna och hållbara plastlösningar
Som en av få tillverkare med fullskalig produktion i Norden, erbjuder vi produkter som tillverkas nära våra kunder och med minimal miljöpåverkan. Vi använder miljövänliga material och designar produkter med lång livslängd för att främja återanvändning över återvinning. Alla våra produkter är märkta för enkel och korrekt källsortering och uppfyller kraven i kemikalieförordningen REACH.

Vår historia – Innovation och kvalitet sedan 1950-talet
Plast Petter grundades på 1950-talet av Lennart, och vi har vuxit till att bli ett av branschens äldsta och mest respekterade företag. Med en lång tradition av innovation, inklusive att vara en av de första i Sverige att arbeta med modern HF-svetsning, har vi byggt upp en stark position inom plastbearbetning. Vi fortsätter att driva utvecklingen framåt med fokus på kvalitet och hållbarhet.

Name: Gabrielia Foam
Description:
Gabrielia Foam, founded in 2005 and headquartered in Hong Kong, is a technology-driven company that integrates innovative technology, manufacturing, supply chain, and services. Gabrielia Foam specializes in the production of high-polymer foam sponge materials and possesses world-leading expertise and product lines in EPDM Foam (Ethylene Propylene Diene Monomer rubber foam). Our products offer outstanding features such as sound insulation, noise reduction, shock absorption, thermal insulation, sealing, and flame retardancy, meeting the highest global standards.

Currently, Gabrielia Foam has local teams and research centers in India, Russia, and Vietnam. We have established research collaborations with Akron University in the United States and Moscow State University in developing rubber & plastic technology. With a commitment to staying ahead of the curve through continuous innovation and a customer-centric approach, Gabrielia Foam aims to become a global leader in the EPDM foam sponge materials industry by 2025.

Gabrielia is a high-performance, closed-cell, and open-cell EPDM rubber foam insulation material designed for the European and North American markets. Introduced in 2020, it finds applications in automotive, HVAC (Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning), plumbing, and refrigeration equipment. Our manufacturing facility in Asia has already provided comprehensive solutions to leading noise control manufacturers, top-tier automotive brands, and specialty foam material providers worldwide. Gabrielia foam is extensively utilized in industries such as industrial, transportation, and sports, delivering superior performance in various fields.

Name: ELS POLAND Sp. z o.o.
Description:
ELS Poland dostarcza kompleksowe rozwiązania termoizolacyjne. Projektuje i produkuje termoizolacje dedykowane do maszyn oraz urządzeń emitujących wysokie promieniowanie cieplne. Opracowana nowatorska formuła aerogelowych mat termoizolacyjnych ELS spełnia najwyższe wymagania izolacyjności termicznej. Jest dostosowana i dedykowana do szeroko definiowanego przemysłu energochłonnego. Termomaty ELS wyposażone w izolacje z aerogelu (izolator o ekstremalnie niskim współczynniku przewodzenia ciepła, wywodzący się z technologii kosmicznych) w swojej istocie idealnie wpisuje się w potrzeby i wyzwania, stawiane przed współczesnym-energooszczędnym przemysłem. W szczególności: przetwórstwa tworzyw sztucznych, ciepłowniczym, petrochemicznym, wydobywczym oraz innych dziedzinach wymagających maksymalnej ochrony termicznej przy ograniczonych możliwościach względem małej przestrzeni i ograniczeniach wagowych.

Głównym założeniem ELS Poland jest przynoszenie realnych korzyści w zakresie zmniejszenia emisji ciepła, osiągnięcia jeszcze wyższego poziomu bezpieczeństwa pracy jak i optymalizacji  procesu produkcyjnego (m.in. obniżenie kosztów produkcji, poprzez znaczącą redukcje zużycia energii elektrycznej, potrzebnej do nagrzania i utrzymywania stałych temperatur w urządzeniach). Nieustanie dążąc do utrzymania najwyższych standardów w branży izolacji technicznych urządzeń przemysłowych, każdorazowo kadra ELS Poland projektując kompleksową termoizolację urządzenia - realizuje koncepcję zindywidualizowanego podejścia. Uwzględniając przy tym m.in. analizy parametrów procesu pracy urządzeń produkcji wyrobów z tworzyw sztucznych, kosztów produkcji ale i stawianych sobie wyzwań względem oczekiwanych rezultatów końcowych - uzyskania najwyższej efektywności izolacyjnej danego urządzenia. 

ELS Poland kieruje się ideą zrównoważonego rozwoju – wierzymy w konieczność tworzenia bardziej zrównoważonego świata.

Name: PT GRAND ANUGERAH CIPTA
Description:
PT GRAND ANUGERAH CIPTA
 Solusi Inovatif dalam Manufaktur Plastik

Selamat datang di PT GRAND ANUGERAH CIPTA, pusat inovasi dalam industri manufaktur plastik. Kami adalah perusahaan yang berkomitmen untuk memberikan solusi plastik berkualitas tinggi kepada pelanggan kami, dengan fokus pada inovasi, keberlanjutan, dan kepuasan pelanggan.

 Keahlian dan Layanan:
 Inovasi Plastik: Kami memiliki tim berpengalaman dalam pengembangan dan produksi produk plastik yang inovatif, yang memenuhi berbagai kebutuhan industri.
 Keberlanjutan: Kami memprioritaskan keberlanjutan dalam proses produksi kami, dengan menggunakan bahan daur ulang dan teknologi ramah lingkungan.
 Pelayanan Pelanggan Unggul: Kepuasan pelanggan adalah prioritas utama kami. Kami bekerja keras untuk memastikan setiap pesanan dikelola dengan sempurna.

 Solusi Berkelanjutan:
Kami percaya bahwa plastik yang diproduksi dengan tanggung jawab dapat memiliki dampak positif pada dunia. Oleh karena itu, kami berkomitmen untuk memastikan bahwa produk kami memiliki jejak lingkungan yang minimal.

Jika Anda memerlukan solusi manufaktur plastik yang handal atau ingin berkolaborasi dengan kami dalam pengembangan produk baru, jangan ragu untuk menghubungi kami. Kami siap membantu Anda mencapai tujuan Anda dalam industri plastik.

Terima kasih telah memilih PT GRAND ANUGERAH CIPTA sebagai mitra Anda dalam manufaktur plastik yang berkualitas dan berkelanjutan.

#ManufakturPlastik #Inovasi #Keberlanjutan #PelayananPelanggan #SolusiPlastik

Name: Arte Rubber
Description:
Arte Rubber is a leading manufacturer of high-quality gaskets, catering to a wide range of industrial applications. The company prides itself on its commitment to excellence, precision, and customer satisfaction, making it a trusted partner for businesses seeking reliable sealing solutions.

At the heart of Arte Rubber’s operations is its use of advanced CNC (Computer Numerical Control) technology. This cutting-edge equipment allows for the production of gaskets with exceptional precision and consistency, ensuring each product meets the exact specifications required by clients. This technological edge enhances the quality of the gaskets and reduces production times, enabling faster delivery.

Arte Rubber excels in providing customized gasket solutions. The company’s skilled engineers work closely with clients to develop gaskets tailored to their specific needs, whether it’s a complex shape or a particular material specification.

Quality is a cornerstone of Arte Rubber’s manufacturing process. The company implements stringent quality control measures at every stage, from material selection to final inspection, ensuring that each gasket meets the highest standards of reliability and durability.

Arte Rubber’s gaskets are utilized across various industries, including:
Automotive: Sealing solutions for engines, transmissions, and exhaust systems.
Aerospace: Gaskets for fuel systems and cabin sealing.
Construction: Gaskets for HVAC systems, windows, doors, and structural components.
Food and Beverage: Compliant gaskets for processing and packaging equipment.
Medical: Gaskets meeting strict medical standards for devices and equipment.

Customer satisfaction is at the heart of Arte Rubber’s business. The company offers exceptional service and support, ensuring a seamless experience from initial consultation through to after-sales service.

Name: MJ Machineries
Description:
MJ Machineries delivers precision-engineered extrusion components—led by a full spectrum of rubber, aluminum & steel rollers—to optimize HDPE/PVC pipe production. Our solutions ensure rapid, uniform cooling, exact dimensions, minimal downtime and straight, blemish-free output, all backed by custom sizing, advanced surface treatments and responsive support.

Key Products & Benefits

Rubber, Aluminum & Steel Rollers: Available in natural and synthetic rubbers (nitrile, neoprene, EPDM, silicone, PU), lightweight aluminum alloys and high-strength steel; options include anodizing, chromate conversion, nickel plating, galvanizing, powder coating and hard-chrome plating. Precision-ground finishes and custom diameters/lengths ensure perfect fit and flawless output.

Die Heads: Solid-wall designs deliver exact wall thickness and smooth surface finish; modular construction and quick-change gaps simplify maintenance and reduce scrap.

Pins & Sizers: Stabilize and size the melt stream for consistent diameter and blemish-free appearance.

Screen Changers: Automated rotary or belt systems provide continuous filtration without stopping the line, cutting downtime and waste.

Extruder Components: High-tolerance barrels, screws and breaker plates with optimized L/D ratios ensure homogeneous melt quality and stable throughput.

Industries Served
Converting & web processing, film & packaging, paper & foil plants, textiles, plywood & wood products, steel mills, cement, leather, food & confectionery, tyre & rubber goods, HDPE/PVC pipe manufacturing, water distribution, plumbing, electrical conduit, sewage/drainage, industrial & telecom piping.

Why MJ Machineries?
Superior quality at competitive prices, customer-focused partnership from custom tooling to on-site support, and an expert team committed to maximizing uptime and performance. Contact us today to elevate your extrusion line.

Name: MNR Plast
Description:
MNR Plast, 1990 yılından bu yana edindiği köklü deneyimi, ileri teknoloji ve mühendislik tecrübesiyle birleştirerek plastik parçaların tasarımını, kalıp imalatını ve seri üretimini gerçekleştirmektedir. Gelişen teknolojiyi yakından takip eden firmamız, üretim gücünü sürekli artırarak ihracat odaklı bir büyüme stratejisi izlemektedir.

Bünyemizde faaliyet gösteren Ar-Ge departmanımız, haftada en az bir yeni ürün geliştirmekte olup, 200’e yakın patent koruması altındaki ürünümüz bulunmaktadır. Toplam ürün çeşidimiz 1.250’nin üzerindedir. Ayrıca, müşteri talepleri doğrultusunda Ar-Ge repertuarımızda yer alan özel endüstriyel tasarımlar, yüksek teknolojili cihazlarla numune haline getirilerek pazara sunulmaktadır.

Firmamızda bulunan 1000 x 610 x 610 mm baskı hacmine sahip FDM teknolojili hızlı prototipleme, üç boyutlu optik tarama (tersine mühendislik) ve silikon kalıplama (MCP-Hek Tooling – dünyada ilk çift robot sistemiyle çalışan Naylon Modüllü 5.05) sistemleri, Ar-Ge alanındaki teknolojik üstünlüğümüzü desteklemektedir. Bu altyapı sayesinde tasarım süreçleri ve ürün devreye alma kabiliyetimiz önemli ölçüde güçlenmiştir.

Enjeksiyon yöntemiyle termoplastik parça üretimi gerçekleştiren MNR Plast, özellikle mühendislik plastiklerinde yüksek hassasiyetli üretim kabiliyetiyle öne çıkmaktadır. 2000 ton mengene kapama kuvveti ile 15.000 grama kadar enjeksiyon yapabilmekteyiz. Yıllık 2.000 tonun üzerinde plastik ham madde işleme kapasitesine sahip olan firmamızda, kalıp tasarımı ve imalatı tamamen kendi bünyemizde gerçekleştirilmektedir.

Plastik enjeksiyon proseslerine ek olarak, ürün gamını tamamlayıcı nitelikteki 6 bar basınçlı elektronik tekstil makinemiz ile istenilen ölçü, desen ve formda rijit veya elastik file örme üretimi yapılabilmektedir.

Son kullanıcı odaklı yaklaşımı ilke edinen MNR Plast, müşteri beklentilerini her zaman ön planda tutmakta; teknolojik gelişmelerin etkin kullanımının sürdürülebilir başarıyı artıracağına inanmaktadır.

Naše portfolio je téměř kompletní a jsem připraveni nabídnout celé stroje, ale i nezbytné náhradní díly, které jsou v tomu průmyslu spotřebním zbožím. Začínali jsem s plastifikačními šneky a válci a stále je to srdcem našeho obchodu, nicméně postupně jsem přidali všechny možné periferie, od topení až po kompletní centrální systémy chlazení i dopravy materiálu. Úspěšně se nám daří etablovat novinky na českém i slovenském trhu, jako třeba automatické vyprazdňování 25 kg pytlů na celé paletě. Spolupracujem primárně s italskými společnostmi, ale najde u nás i zastoupení francouzského lídra na trhu s kontinuálním měřením tloušťky folií.

Whether it's size, shape or design, our flexible approach ensures that your packaging stands out in the market and meets your unique needs. We take pride in our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction. Together, let's shape a future built on quality, innovation and sustainable partnerships.

Unseren Kunden bieten wir auch komplexe Erzeugnisse an, inklusive:
> lasergeschnittene Einbauteile aus Edelstahl

Wir führen auch neue Dienstleistungen ein:

Over the years, Salgomma has expanded its product range, specializing not only in all-rubber articles but also in hybrid rubber-metal and rubber-plastic components, as well as sealing gaskets and cut and extruded products in a wide range of materials.

Among the polymers processed by the company are EPDM (both sulfur and peroxide-cured), NBR, CR, NR, IR, ECO, VMQ, EAM, and AEM, also available in colored versions.

In 2019, Salgomma enters the SATA Group (www.sata-group.com), an evolution that has allowed for the optimization of internal processes and further strengthening of its commitment to the automotive sector.

Name: Davos Spa
Description:
La Davos Industria Gomma, nasce nel 1955, quando il titolare di un noto calzaturificio del Montebellunese ha sentito l’esigenza di fabbricare direttamente le suole in gomma necessarie alle calzature da montagna e pedule prodotte senza dover dipendere da produttori esterni. Lino Piccolo, l’attuale presidente della Società, era a quei tempi un collaboratore e negli anni 60 ha assunto la gestione aziendale con la carica di Amministratore Unico e Titolare.
In pochi anni, l’attività si è progressivamente sviluppata estendendo al produzione e vendita delle suole in gomma anche agli altri fabbricanti di calzature, sia del Distretto di Montebelluna, sia di altre zone della penisola italiana. In pratica, la produzione delle suole in gomma e la loro vendita nel mercato calzaturiero, ebbe un successo tale da indurre, nel giro di qualche anno, ad abbandonare l’attività del Calzaturificio, a favore della produzione delle suole in gomma e successivamente anche di Lastre in gomma verniciate per calzature, Nel 1970 la Davos diventa S.p.A. e trasferisce la sua attività nei nuovi stabilimenti di Crocetta del Montello e Cornuda (TREVISO).

Così facendo, Davos, ha aumentato notevolmente la capacità produttiva diversificando la produzione, e comprendendo oltre agli articoli in gomma per calzature, anche quello dei Pavimenti in gomma, e quello riguardante gli articoli tecnici in gomma per il settore dell’elettrodomestico ed automobilistico.
L’attenzione per l’ambiente in Davos significa soprattutto Tecnologia, criterio fondamentale nella costruzione del nuovo stabilimento. Dal 2007, l’unità produttiva e Direzionale di Cavaso del Tomba, è inserita in perfetta sintonia in un contesto naturale-ambientale di prim’ordine, e Davos si fa partecipe e partner attivo della tutela Ambientale e Paesaggistica.
L’unità produttiva di Cavaso, ora nuova sede degli Uffici Direzionali, realizza stampaggio, pomiciatura e verniciatura delle lastre semilavorate prodotte nello stabilimento di Cornuda.

SFR is dedicated to innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction. We strive to build lasting relationships with our clients by ensuring reliability, transparency, and superior service. Our team of experts is always ready to provide support and customized solutions to meet your specific needs.

Join Us:

Name: MRS Italia
Description:
M.R.S. Italia combines experience and innovation to shape concrete solutions.
From design to production, we manage the manufacturing of screws, barrels, complete plasticizing units, and other components connected to the plasticizing process.

Plasticizing Screws: production, design, and customization. We manufacture plasticizing screws based on customer drawings and/or developed through our design expertise, using a wide range of geometries and metallurgical solutions.

Barrels: we produce plasticizing barrels in different metallurgical configurations, with nitrided steels or bimetallic technology, ensuring long-term wear resistance. Our extensive metallurgical know-how is at the service of the customer to provide the most suitable solutions for each production process.

Complete Plasticizing Units: end-to-end design and manufacturing of complete plasticizing units, tailored to the customer’s needs and requirements, for extrusion and injection processes.

Other Components: thanks to its highly specialized in-house workshop, M.R.S. Italia is able to manufacture all the mechanical components of a plasticizing unit, including: feeding sections, sleeves, hopper bodies, tips, bushings, extrusion head components, and much more.

Unsere Plattform ist ausschließlich auf die Kunststoffindustrie spezialisiert und bietet einen digitalen Marktplatz für:

Spritzguss, Blasformen, Thermoformen, Vakuumguss und 3D-Druck

Prototyping & Pilotserien ebenso wie Serien- und Massenproduktion

KI-gestützte Designanalyse, automatisierte Angebote, transparente Lieferketten


 Zukunft & Roadmap
Wir bauen Schritt für Schritt ein internationales Partnernetzwerk auf und erweitern GFabrik um:

Nachhaltigkeitsmodule (Rezyklate, CO₂-Tracking)

Echtzeit-Monitoring von Fertigungsaufträgen

Digitale Schnittstellen für Logistik & Finanzen


 Unsere Vision
Wir wollen die erste digitale Plattform für die Kunststofffertigung werden, die Europa, MENA und Afrika verbindet – und damit den globalen Marktführern im Bereich Manufacturing-as-a-Service echte Konkurrenz machen.

GFabrik steht für Smart Plastics. Digital. Nachhaltig. Global.

Name: PLASTINDIA 2026 - Français
Description:
L’Avenir des Plastiques Commence Ici
 5–10 février 2026 |  Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi

PLASTINDIA 2026 est la plateforme mondiale de référence pour l’industrie des plastiques, rassemblant plus de 500 exposants internationaux provenant de plus de 80 pays pour présenter des innovations révolutionnaires, des solutions durables et des technologies de transformation. Depuis 1987, PLASTINDIA réunit des leaders mondiaux, des innovateurs et des professionnels afin de façonner l’avenir des plastiques.

À PLASTINDIA 2026, vous pourrez :

Explorer les avancées de pointe qui stimulent la révolution des plastiques

Découvrir des opportunités d’investissement à forte croissance

Vous connecter avec des OEM, des transformateurs, des acteurs technologiques et des acheteurs internationaux

Forger des collaborations avec des instituts de recherche et des experts de l’industrie

Dialoguer directement avec les décideurs politiques et les représentants du gouvernement

Découvrir l’engagement de l’industrie envers la durabilité et l’économie circulaire

Notre mission est claire : positionner l’Inde à l’avant-garde du paysage mondial des plastiques, en définissant de nouveaux standards en matière d’innovation, de durabilité et d’excellence industrielle.

Rejoignez-nous à PLASTINDIA 2026 et faites partie du mouvement qui redéfinit l’avenir des plastiques.

Name: Guangdong Joycolor New Material Co.,LTD
Description:
Guangdong Joycolor New Material Co., Ltd is a modern factory engage in high end plastic black masterbatch manufacturing for industries like plastic compounds, Injection of  automative parts, house holding compliances, electric and eletronic engineering parts, pipe, film, wires and cables& yarn spinning. 

We supply high end black masterbatch with brand JOYBLACK brand based on the carriers of PP, PE, PC, PA, AS, PS, PBT, PET, TPU, TPV and carrier free universal type.100% NEW carrier resin, no recycled materials.

High carbon black concentration and high dispersion are one of the high lights of our black masterbatch.
High concentration with low adding dosage to reach the same blackness decreased the effects to final plastic products at the same time saved cost. It also shows the technology progress.
The highest carbon black concentration of us: PE 50%, PP 40%,AS(SAN) 45%, PC 40%, PS 45%,PA 30%, carrier free universal 58%. Adding dosage vary from 0.08%-2%.

Our advanced production line is Coperion ZSK automatic twin -screw line introduced from Germany so as to get perfect dispersion property for masterbatch;

We select K-tron loss-in -weight automatic feeding system to insure raw materials are definite weigh according the formulation and solved the carbon black feeding correctly.

We choose Nordson granulation production system equipments with constant pressure to get uniform pellets with very low power rate. 
Water ring pellets cutting way and hot wind cutting way decreased the water ratio. 

So to guard our black masterbatch is highly consistency, excellent dispersion, high carbon black concentration, high jetness and high gloss.

We use 16nm-50nm carbon black suit to variety applications plastic.
We has our own carbon black factory in Xingjiang Province where has pure and cheap natural gas and crude oil. 

What's most important is we have 16 internal talents focus on the research of plastic masterbatch to supply solutions for your final articles!

Name: Enginanigan GmbH

Viele Unternehmen verlieren täglich Zeit und Effizienz, einfach, weil ihnen maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für ihre Arbeitsplätze fehlen.

Ich bin Johannes Schenk, Gründer der Enginanigan GmbH – und ich kenne die Herausforderungen im Betrieb aus eigener Erfahrung.
Vom Feinwerkmechaniker über den Handwerksmeister bis zum Maschinenbauingenieur habe ich alle Stationen selbst durchlaufen. Heute nutze ich dieses Know-how, um mit 3D-Druck funktionale Lösungen für echte Probleme in Werkstätten, Labors und Fertigungen zu entwickeln.

Unser Angebot:
 Vorrichtungsbau → für Montage, Prüfprozesse oder Serienfertigung
 Werkzeugorganisation → Halterungen, Shadowboards, Schubladeneinsätze
 Arbeitsplatzoptimierung → individuell angepasste Bauteile & Ordnungssysteme
 Bauteiloptimierung → funktionale Ersatzteile, Adapter, Verbindungen

Warum mit uns arbeiten?
 Beratung mit technischem Verständnis
 Fertigung in Industriequalität (FDM)
 Schnelle Lieferung – auch bei Sonderlösungen

 Du willst reibungslosere Abläufe in deinem Betrieb? Dann melde dich bei mir!

我們相信「包裝不只是保護產品，更是品牌傳遞信任的第一線」。從卷膜、夾鏈袋、真空袋、站立袋到殺菌耐熱包裝，我們提供一條龍製程，並通過 ISO 22000 與 HACCP 等多項品質認證，為食品與醫療產品建立安心屏障。

我們的使命是：

成為產品與消費者之間最堅實的橋樑，細心守護每一次開封的安心與感動。

我們的願景是：

致力成為「一站式包裝最佳夥伴」，從設計到製造與行銷，全方位提升品牌價值與市場競爭力。

我們堅持的四大核心價值：

1. 品質為先 — 每個細節都不妥協，堅持高標準製造流程

2. 信譽為重 — 誠信經營、重視承諾，與客戶建立長期合作關係

3. 創新為本 — 持續研發環保材料與功能性包裝，為市場帶來更多可能

4. 服務為誠 — 用專業與熱忱，主動解決客戶每一項需求

我們專門生產各式食品與日用品用的塑膠軟性包裝袋與卷膜，產品可用於真空包裝、冷凍、高溫殺菌等用途。常見應用包含雞胸肉、零食、醬料、保健品、寵物食品等。

主要產品有：

• 卷膜包材：提供給自動包裝機使用，可客製尺寸與功能

• 夾鏈袋 / 站立袋：方便重複開關、適合零食與保健食品

• 真空袋 / 殺菌袋：耐高溫、延長食品保存期限

• 側封袋 / 折腰袋等客製袋型：依產品特性設計外包裝

• 易撕膜、冷凍膜、耐熱膜等特殊功能包材

我們也提供印刷、複合與製袋一條龍服務，協助品牌打造安心、好用又有質感的包裝方案。

Name: Zapata Goma Sa

En 1971 inicia su actividad como negocio familiar minorista, el cual gracias a la dedicación, calidad de productos y calidad de atención, crece y en 1979 se transforma en una empresa comercializadora mayorista-minorista.

El prestigio comercial de ZAPATA GOMA, permite firmar en 1988 la representación exclusiva para la zona cuyo de productos YACO, reconocido en el mercado del automotor. El logro de esta representación permitió afirmar el respaldo de proveedores y clientes y consolidar el crecimiento y liderazgo en la zona.

En 1990 ZAPATA GOMA apuesta el comercio exterior y por su trayectoria comercial de más de 30 años, es designado distribuidor para todo el país de correas industriales de caucho "PIX TRASMISSIONS".

Durante los últimos 10 años, a partir del gran número de clientes, la diversidad de sectores que atiende, la amplia gama de productos que provee y la logística de distribución que posee, acorde a las necesidades del mercado, han posicionado a ZAPATA GOMA como líder en su especialidad.

El Compromiso de su personal, la capacitación permanente y el liderazgo de sus Directivos han mantenido a ZAPATA GOMA, con los principios y valores de una Empresa Familiar, que busca la permanente excelencia.

ACTUS SA is a plastics production company, located in the heart of Greece. We specialize in the production of plastic caps and closures from polyethylene (PE) and polypropylene (PP) for liquid packaging, through the process of injection molding.

Thanks to our deep knowledge and know-how in the area of thermoplastics and state of the art equipment (high-speed moulds & high-tech injection molding machines) we are able to offer complex packaging solutions that fulfill the specific requirements of your respective market segment. Our experienced team is always ready to put all your ideas into practice.

Maintaining high standards in quality is the very essence of our manufacturing approach and philosophy. There are several benefits in producing a product with the main focus being on quality and ergonomics. We strive on continuous improvement on both the quality of our products as well as the quality of service provided. We are able to achieve the latter by making timely deliveries while maintaining a flexible pricing policy for our customers.

ACTUS SA is an ISO Certified company. By applying the standards ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 22000, and continuous employee training we try and meet all modern company standards. Every stage of the production process includes constant quality control - from the initial inspection of raw materials to last stage of shipment of the finished products – enabling us to ensure that our clients receive the best possible service.

Name: Trimco a Division of Trim-Gard
Description:
For 50 years, Trimco has provided superior, industrial quality plastic extrusion parts to manufacturers across North America. From standard seals to custom-built solutions, Trimco specializes in problem solving. 

Our state-of-the art facility uses original equipment approved polymers to ensure that our product meet the highest standards of performance and reliability. 

As local provider, our reputation relies on exceeding our clients’ expectations. We are ISO-certified manufacturer, providing efficient and effective service that avoids unnecessary and costly rework, on time and on cost assurances, and the security that comes with superior workmanship. 

Call us today to discuss how Trimco can help your company avoid downtime and keep production on schedule or e-mail our contact at info@trimco.info

Name: Imold srl
Description:
Fondata nel 2010, Imold è un laboratorio di meccanica avanzata con solide competenze in meccatronica, robotica e design industriale: competenze integrate che accompagnano i progetti dalla fase di concezione fino alla produzione di serie, tramite stampaggio a iniezione, o la realizzazione di componenti unici ad alta precisione.

Imold è cultura di Innovazione che nasce e si sviluppa prima di tutto per i propri processi e che diventa competenza,  know how ed esperienza a beneficio dei propri clienti. 
Ogni fase del lavoro è costruita sulla massima integrazione tra progettazione su misura e automazione, per dare risposte concrete e personalizzate a ogni esigenza del cliente.

A qualsiasi livello di avanzamento di un nuovo prodotto, Imold è in grado di proporre un piano di fattibilità e sviluppo, fino alla produzione definitiva, sia in serie che come articoli unici (attrezzature, assiemi meccanici, dispositivi).
Collaboriamo con importanti realtà industriali, istituti di ricerca europei e startup innovative, fornendo soluzioni ingegneristiche complete, precise e scalabili.
Grazie all’esperienza pluriennale del fondatore e a una cultura aziendale fortemente orientata alla ricerca e all’innovazione, Imold è diventata un punto di riferimento per chi cerca qualità, affidabilità e competenza tecnica.

 Un’unica risorsa per affrontare e risolvere necessità produttive complesse.

CORE VALUES AND STRATEGY

Niche Market Development: We avoid homogenized price competition by emphasizing unique products and strong branding.

Name: Shared Eco
Description:
SharedEco is rethinking how households handle waste—starting with convenience.

Most homes still rely on under-sink bins, overflowing containers, and frequent trips to the garage or curb. SharedEco designs systems that remove that friction entirely.

Our flagship product, the Revider, is a wall-integrated waste and recycling system that allows household waste to be separated at the source and transferred directly outside—in one simple motion. No kitchen bins. No odours. No hauling bags through living spaces. Just a cleaner, easier daily experience.

Convenience isn’t a “nice to have.” It’s the only way new habits stick.

That’s why the Revider is designed to be intuitive, durable, and built into the natural flow of the kitchen. And because better systems should also create better outcomes, every Revider is made from 100% post-consumer reclaimed plastics, closing the loop on materials that already exist.

SharedEco’s mission is simple: make recycling and waste management easier than throwing things away—at home, in multi-unit buildings, and in future construction.

We’re building practical infrastructure for a cleaner, more efficient way of living.

Name: Bear Technologies, Inc.
Description:
Bear Technologies Inc. started in October 1991 with one goal in mind - to provide a simple, accurate, affordable, real-time production monitoring system. One engineer and one salesman began helping small companies and large corporations alike maximize their efficiencies. 3 decades later and it's still business as usual.

Being in the molding industry for over thirty years has allowed ample opportunity to listen and gather what companies desire from their monitoring software. Dedicating endless time and resources striving for perfection in attempts to create the “unicorn” of production monitoring systems.

Our product, Tracker is a NON subscription based system. With systems starting under $10k you are sure to receive a quick ROI on this need-to-have data collection and reporting asset that is easily integrated into almost all ERP and MRP systems.

Focus has been and always will be on customer satisfaction, with product and support. “Sacrificing whatever it takes to make sure we are proud to put our name on everything that goes out the door. TRACKER is an extension of ourselves; trustworthy and reliable.” All of the TRACKER production is done here in New York with an emphasis on quality. The source codes are also done in-house, which allows for quick and easy support.

Name: Reents Technologies GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei der Reents Technologies GmbH, Ihrem Spezialisten für innovative 3D-Druck-Lösungen und Rapid Prototyping, basierend in Schenefeld bei Hamburg. Seit unserer Gründung im Mai 2023 haben wir uns zu einem führenden Anbieter in der Prototypenherstellung und Kleinserienfertigung entwickelt. Unsere Dienstleistungen sind auf Präzision, Qualität und Geschwindigkeit ausgerichtet und decken ein breites Spektrum an Kundenanforderungen ab.

Unsere Dienstleistungen umfassen:

3D-Druck für Prototypen und Kleinserien: Wir realisieren Ihre Designkonzepte schnell und effizient. Unsere Technologien sind ideal für die Herstellung komplexer Geometrien und gewährleisten höchste Genauigkeit.

CAD/3D-Design: Unsere Expertise im CAD/3D-Design ermöglicht die Umsetzung Ihrer Ideen in druckbare Dateien. Wir arbeiten eng mit Ihnen zusammen, um Ihre Visionen präzise umzusetzen.

Rapid Prototyping: Beschleunigen Sie Ihren Entwicklungsprozess mit unseren Rapid-Prototyping-Diensten. Wir bieten schnelle Fertigung von Funktionsmustern, um Optimierungspotenziale frühzeitig zu erkennen.

Individuelle Lösungen: Ob dekorative Artikel, funktionale Bauteile oder spezifische Gadgets – wir bieten flexible Lösungen für Ihre individuellen Bedürfnisse.

Als Ihr Partner im 3D-Druck und Prototyping stehen wir für Innovation und Kundenzufriedenheit. Kontaktieren Sie uns, um zu erfahren, wie wir Ihre Projekte erfolgreich umsetzen können.

Name: Changya Newmaterial Technology Co.,Ltd
Description:
Changya Newmaterial Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2013, and the group is headquartered in Ningbo, China. It is a limited liability company integrating R&D, production and sales. The company mainly produces paper PLA & Plastic disposable tableware, such as straw, cutlery, microwaveable box, hinged box, cup, carry out bag, plate, dinning kit, etc.
  In 2018，Changya established a new factory in Ho Chi Minh,Vietnam.Right now,Changya Vietnam factory is under construction on a very tight schedule, project phase three is expecting to be finished in December 2022.Vietnam factory occupied more than 80,000 square meters. The manufacturing include paper bags,paper plates,paper cups,paper straws and plastic products same in Ningbo factory,full production capacity in Vietnam factory is over 500 high cube container per month.
  Changya Newmaterial Technology Co., Ltd. has developed rapidly since its establishment, a growth rate over 30% each year, and has now become a leading enterprise in the field of high-quality disposable food and kitchen supplies in China. Changya products are mainly sold in the international market, and more than 90% of the products are exported to many regions such as Europe, the United States and Australia. Changya adopts strict quality control standards for its products, and has won a variety of international certifications, including BRC, GMP NSF, ISO 22000, GMP, and it has passed LFGB, FDA and other food safe tests. At the same time, it is a member of the international human rights organizations BSCI and Sedex. It has wide recognition and good reputation in the international market.

Name: FROST SM Sp. z o. o.
Description:
Surowcem, od którego firma zaczęła działalności w 1998 roku, był spieniony polistyren (EPS), z przeznaczeniem głównie na rynek budowlany. Z czasem zwiększyliśmy powierzchnię produkcyjno-magazynową i rozbudowaliśmy park maszynowy, w którego skład wchodzą takie maszyny jak: przemysłowe plotery termiczne, automaty do rozkroju pianek, bramowy kater tnąco-frezujący. Umożliwiło to nam konfekcję takich materiałów jak pianka polietylenowa (PE), pianka poliuretanowa (PUR), a nawet wełna mineralna i skalna.

W obecnej chwili nasze wyroby wykorzystywane są w wielu branżach:
budownictwo – np. izolacja nietypowych miejsc, architektoniczne elementy dekoracyjne czy szalunki tracone, otuliny izolacyjne, kliny oraz kontr spadki wykonane ze styropianu i wełny mineralnej,
meblarstwo – np. wypełnienia meblowe, pianki tapicerskie, kasetony bonellowe, siedziska,
opakowania – np. wszelkiego rodzaju przekładki styropianowe, przekładki polietylenowe, kształtki,
automotive – np. opakowania, elementy zabezpieczające,
elektronika AGD/RTW,
transport.
Zawsze dokładamy wszelkich starań, aby wysoka jakość i estetyka były głównymi cechami naszych wyrobów, jednocześnie kładąc nacisk na jakość prowadzimy działania, które pozwalają na spełnienie wymagań i oczekiwań naszych klientów. Podejmujemy ciągłe działania w kierunku rozwoju, ponieważ tylko ciągły rozwój naszej firmy i wyprzedzanie naszej konkurencji gwarantuje nam utrzymanie się na rynku i zdobycie przewagi strategicznej.

Nadrzędnym celem Firmy FROST jest wprowadzanie na rynek, coraz to nowszych i lepszych produktów, w tym celu postanowiliśmy wprowadzić w firmie system zarządzania jakością ISO 9001. System ten funkcjonuje u nas od stycznia 2015.

Name: Dongguan Yujie Industrial Investment  Co., Ltd.
Description:
Dongguan Yujie Industrial Investment Co., Ltd. is a leading enterprise specializing in the advanced modification and innovation of high-quality Post-Consumer Recycled (PCR) plastics and Ocean-Bound Plastics (OBP). Recognized as a National High-Tech Enterprise, Yujie also serves as the Dongguan Engineering Research Center for Modified New Materials, underscoring its prominent role in the development of sustainable materials.

In alignment with China’s dual-carbon strategy, the company actively promotes low-carbon development by leveraging optimized material formulations, recycled inputs, and innovative sustainable practices. Yujie has pioneered the integration of plant-based fibers as environmentally responsible fillers and continuously advances its production processes to develop next-generation plastics characterized by enhanced stability, safety, and environmental performance.

With more than 20 years of industry experience, Yujie has built a highly qualified R&D and technical team renowned for both expertise and innovation. The company operates two manufacturing facilities and one R&D laboratory, with an annual production capacity exceeding 50,000 tons of eco-friendly materials. Its product portfolio spans nearly all mainstream plastic types, offering performance that rivals that of virgin resins.

Yujie’s commitment to quality and sustainability is evidenced by its certifications, which include GRS, OBP, ISCC, UL, and UL2809. The company also complies with internationally recognized management systems, including ISO9001, ISO14001, ISO45001, and the IATF16949 automotive quality management system. To date, Yujie holds nearly 20 invention patents and actively contributes to the development of industry group standards for new material applications, reinforcing its leadership in sustainable plastic innovation.

Name: LMP Lavorazione Materie Plastiche
Description:
Con oltre 50 anni di storia nel settore, siamo un punto di riferimento consolidato nell'industria dello stampaggio materie plastiche. La nostra azienda ha sempre adottato un approccio all'avanguardia, sposando la tecnologia più recente e cercando costantemente di innovare. Attraverso l'implementazione delle pratiche di lean manufacturing, ci impegniamo a fornire servizi di stampaggio plastico efficienti, flessibili e di altissima qualità, garantendo ai nostri clienti risultati all'altezza delle loro aspettative.
La nostra struttura si estende su oltre 10'000 metri quadrati, equipaggiata con 20 presse di ultima generazione conformi allo standard industria 4.0. Operiamo su 3 turni per garantire una produzione continua e soddisfare le esigenze dei nostri clienti in tempi rapidi. Le nostre presse, con una capacità che varia da 500 KN a 5500 KN, ci consentono di stampare una vasta gamma di pezzi, dalle dimensioni minime di 1 g fino a 1,6 Kg, offrendo la massima flessibilità e capacità produttiva.

Name: Gelastomerics
Description: Gelastomerics is a Colorado State University based startup founded in 2023, focused on the manufacture of Gelastomers, the first mechanically tunable family of hydratable thermoplastic elastomers (TPEs) that offer an easily processible, intrisically lubricious, bio-inert (PFAS-free) low-friction polymer alternative, engineered to provide exceptional mechanical performance and toughness in demanding biomedical environments while remaining drop-in compatible with standard thermal processing, molding, and extrusion technologies. Gelastomers provide the lubricity and friction-free surface character of a traditional hydrogel while exhibiting the modulus and superior elastomeric behavior of a styrenic TPE. Their intrinsic melt-processability provides a unique advantage in that they can be injection molded or melt-extruded into unique geometries, shapes, and structures. Gelastomerics is excited to produce one of the first TPEs that is inherently hydrophilic, lubricious, and fatigue and wear-resistant when hydrated. Look out for more exciting news from Gelastomerics!

Name: NaWrap
Description:
Plastic wrappers are everywhere, used once, tossed, and left to linger in our gutters, markets, and campuses for decades. All over our communities, thousands of nylon wrappers are used and discarded daily. There’s no standard system for reuse or recycling. These wrappers are light, but their damage is lasting.

NaWrap is a direct response to that problem.
We created a wrapper that behaves like nylon but breaks down naturally in just 3–4 weeks. 
It looks like plastic, works like plastic, but returns to the soil without harm.

We didn’t just design it for the lab; NaWrap is meant to be produced and used by real people in real places. It can be made with simple tools, without expensive machines, making it perfect for student cooperatives, youth groups, and small local businesses.

NaWrap is more than a wrapper; it’s a small, local answer to a big, global problem.

If you're interested in supporting sustainable solutions that are practical, affordable, and made with local materials, you can reach out.

Name: JAG PPH Spółka z o.o.
Description:
Firma „JAG” rozpoczęła działalność w 1983 r. i jest renomowanym producentem pianek poliuretanowych oraz solidnym partnerem handlowym. Cechą, która nas wyróżnia wśród innych przedsiębiorstw w tym sektorze produktów, jest wyłącznie polski kapitał i fachowe doradztwo oparte na ponad 33-letnim doświadczeniu firmy na rynku tworzyw sztucznych.

Współpracujemy z Klientami zarówno z Polski, jak i z zagranicy, zarówno z dużymi przedsiębiorstwami, jak również z klientami indywidualnymi. Wychodząc naprzeciw oczekiwaniom naszych Kontrahentów i chcąc sprostać najwyższym standardom jakości, nieustannie poszerzamy spektrum działalności i udoskonalamy proces produkcji pianek poliuretanowych.

Nasze produkty są wynikiem połączenia tradycyjnych metod produkcji z innowacyjnym podejściem do technologii, co pozwala nam sprostać oczekiwaniom nawet najbardziej wymagających Klientów. Oferujemy piankę poliuretanową do izolacji termicznej, akustycznej, a także jako element konstrukcyjny czy wykończeniowy. Wszystko to sprawia, że nasze produkty są niezastąpione w wielu sytuacjach.

Jako producent pianki poliuretanowej doskonale zdajemy sobie sprawę, że każdy Klient ma swoje indywidualne potrzeby i oczekiwania. Dlatego staramy się dostosować naszą ofertę do wymagań każdego zleceniodawcy, oferując szeroką gamę produktów o różnych parametrach technicznych oraz możliwość ich modyfikacji. Nasz zespół specjalistów służy radą i pomocą na każdym etapie współpracy, aby zapewnić jak najlepsze dopasowanie materiałów do konkretnego projektu, Ponadto, jesteśmy w stanie zaoferować naszym Klientom atrakcyjne ceny, dzięki optymalizacji procesów produkcyjnych oraz stałemu monitorowaniu rynku. Zatrudniamy profesjonalną kadrę pracowniczą, korzystamy z najnowszych technologii dostępnych na rynku, posiadamy atesty, dzięki czemu wyroby naszej produkcji spełniają najwyższe normy jakościowe.
